title: Sunan ad-Darimi 107

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ التَّوَرُّعِ عَنِ الْجَوَابِ فِيمَا لَيْسَ فِيهِ كِتَابٌ وَلَا سُنَّةٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Caution in answering that which is not found in the book or the ...

englishRaw: "What I said in my opinion thirty years ago," said Abu Hilal forty years ago.   – Sound Chain
body: "What I said in my opinion thirty years ago," said Abu Hilal forty years ago.   – Sound Chain
arabic: «مَا قُلْتُ بِرَأْيِي مُنْذُ ثَلَاثِينَ سَنَةً قَالَ أَبُو هِلَالٍ مُنْذُ أَرْبَعِينَ سَنَةً»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Abū al-Nuʿmān \u003e Abū ʿAwānah \u003e Qatādah \u003e Mā \u003e Biraʾyī Mundh Thalāthīn Sanah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو النُّعْمَانِ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَوَانَةَ عَنْ قَتَادَةَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 108

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ التَّوَرُّعِ عَنِ الْجَوَابِ فِيمَا لَيْسَ فِيهِ كِتَابٌ وَلَا سُنَّةٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Caution in answering that which is not found in the book or the ...

englishRaw: He was told, "Why don't you express your opinion about it?" He replied, "Indeed, I feel ashamed before Allah, the Almighty, to be judged on Earth based on my own opinion."   – Sound Chain
body: He was told, "Why don't you express your opinion about it?" He replied, "Indeed, I feel ashamed before Allah, the Almighty, to be judged on Earth based on my own opinion."   – Sound Chain
arabic: قِيلَ لَهُ أَلَا تَقُولُ فِيهَا بِرَأْيِكَ؟ قَالَ إِنِّي أَسْتَحْيِي مِنَ اللَّهِ ﷻ أَنْ يُدَانَ فِي الْأَرْضِ بِرَأْيِي   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Makhlad b. Mālik \u003e Ḥakkām b. Salm \u003e Abū Khaythamah \u003e ʿAbd al-ʿAzīz b. Rufayʿ \u003e Suʾil ʿAṭāʾ \u003e Shayʾ Fqāl Lā Adrī \u003e Qīl Lah Alā \u003e Fīhā Biraʾyik \u003e Innī Astaḥyī from Allāh ʿAz And Jal
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا مَخْلَدُ بْنُ مَالِكٍ ثَنَا حَكَّامُ بْنُ سَلْمٍ عَنْ أَبِي خَيْثَمَةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْعَزِيزِ بْنِ رُفَيْعٍ قَالَ سُئِلَ عَطَاءٌ عَنْ شَيْءٍ فقالَ لَا أَدْرِي قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 109

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ التَّوَرُّعِ عَنِ الْجَوَابِ فِيمَا لَيْسَ فِيهِ كِتَابٌ وَلَا سُنَّةٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Caution in answering that which is not found in the book or the ...

englishRaw: In my opinion and belief, I value that more. By Allah, I'd rather express my sincerity than inform you of my opinion.   – Weak Chain
body: In my opinion and belief, I value that more. By Allah, I'd rather express my sincerity than inform you of my opinion.   – Weak Chain
arabic: عَنْ رَأْيِي وَدِينِي عِنْدِي آثَرُ مِنْ ذَلِكَ وَاللَّهِ لَأَنْ أَتَعَنَّى بِعَنِيَّةٍ أَحَبُّ إِلَيَّ مِنْ أَنْ أُخْبِرَكَ بِرَأْيِي   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Ismāʿīl b. Abān \u003e Ḥātim \u003e Ibn Ismāʿīl \u003e ʿĪsá \u003e al-Shaʿbī \u003e Jāʾah a man Yasʾaluh \u003e Shayʾ
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ أَبَانَ أَخْبَرَنِي حَاتِمٌ هُوَ ابْنُ إِسْمَاعِيلَ عَنْ عِيسَى عَنِ الشَّعْبِيِّ قالَ جَاءَهُ رَجُلٌ يَسْأَلُهُ عَنْ شَيْءٍ فَقَالَ كَانَ ابْنُ مَسْعُودٍ يَقُولُ فِيهِ كَذَا وَكَذَا قَالَ أَخْبِرْنِي أَنْتَ بِرَأْيِكَ فَقَالَ أَلَا تَعْجَبُونَ مِنْ هَذَا؟ أَخْبَرْتُهُ عَنِ ابْنِ مَسْعُودٍ وَيَسْأَلُنِي

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 110

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ التَّوَرُّعِ عَنِ الْجَوَابِ فِيمَا لَيْسَ فِيهِ كِتَابٌ وَلَا سُنَّةٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Caution in answering that which is not found in the book or the ...

englishRaw: "Beware of practicing usury, and I swear by Him in whose hand is my soul, if you engage in usury, you will make the forbidden permissible, and you will make the permissible forbidden. However, you have not yet learned from the companions of Muhammad ﷺ . So, follow their teachings."   – Weak Chain
body: "Beware of practicing usury, and I swear by Him in whose hand is my soul, if you engage in usury, you will make the forbidden permissible, and you will make the permissible forbidden. However, you have not yet learned from the companions of Muhammad ﷺ . So, follow their teachings."   – Weak Chain
arabic: «إِيَّاكُمْ وَالْمُقَايَسَةَ وَالَّذِي نَفْسِي بِيَدِهِ لَئِنْ أَخَذْتُمْ بِالْمُقَايَسَةِ لَتُحِلُّنَّ الْحَرَامَ وَلَتُحَرِّمُنَّ الْحَلَالَ وَلَكِنْ مَا بَلَغَكُمْ عَمَّنْ حَفِظَ مِنْ أَصْحَابِ مُحَمَّدٍ ﷺ فَاعْمَلُوا بِهِ»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Ismāʿīl b. Abān \u003e Ḥātim \u003e Ibn Ismāʿīl \u003e ʿĪsá \u003e al-Shaʿbī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ أَبَانَ حَدَّثَنَا حَاتِمٌ هُوَ ابْنُ إِسْمَاعِيلَ عَنْ عِيسَى عَنِ الشَّعْبِيِّ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 111

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ التَّوَرُّعِ عَنِ الْجَوَابِ فِيمَا لَيْسَ فِيهِ كِتَابٌ وَلَا سُنَّةٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Caution in answering that which is not found in the book or the ...

englishRaw: "Abdullah, whoever divorces as Allah has commanded, Allah has clearly explained divorce. And whoever takes upon himself [the responsibility], we will clothe him with it. And Allah does not burden a soul beyond its capacity. And we will hold him accountable for it, just as you say."   – Sound Chain
body: "Abdullah, whoever divorces as Allah has commanded, Allah has clearly explained divorce. And whoever takes upon himself [the responsibility], we will clothe him with it. And Allah does not burden a soul beyond its capacity. And we will hold him accountable for it, just as you say."   – Sound Chain
arabic: عَبْدُ اللَّهِ مَنْ طَلَّقَ كَمَا أَمَرَ اللَّهُ فَقَدْ بَيَّنَ اللَّهُ الطَّلَاقَ وَمَنْ لَبَّسَ عَلَى نَفْسِهِ وَكَّلْنَا بِهِ لَبْسَهُ وَاللَّهِ لَا تُلَبِّسُونَ عَلَى أَنْفُسِكُمْ وَنَتَحَمَّلُهُ نَحْنُ هُوَ كَمَا تَقُولُونَ   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Saʿīd b. ʿĀmir \u003e Ibn ʿAwn \u003e Muḥammad b. Sīrīn \u003e ʿAlqamah \u003e Jāʾ a man \u003e ʿAbdullāh \u003e Innah Ṭallaq Āmraʾatah al-Bāriḥah Thamānī \u003e Bikalām Wāḥid \u003e Bikalām Wāḥid \u003e Fayurīdūn \u003e Yubīnūā Mink Āmraʾatak \u003e Naʿam \u003e And Jāʾah a man \u003e Innah Ṭallaq Āmraʾatah Miāʾah Ṭalqah \u003e Bikalām Wāḥid \u003e Bikalām Wāḥid \u003e Fayurīdūn \u003e Yubīnūā Mink Āmraʾatak \u003e Naʿam
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا سَعِيدُ بْنُ عَامِرٍ عَنِ ابْنِ عَوْنٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سِيرِينَ عَنْ عَلْقَمَةَ قَالَ جَاءَ رَجُلٌ إِلَى عَبْدِ اللَّهِ فَقَالَ إِنَّهُ طَلَّقَ امْرَأَتَهُ الْبَارِحَةَ ثَمَانِيًا قَالَ بِكَلَامٍ وَاحِدٍ؟ قَالَ بِكَلَامٍ وَاحِدٍ قَالَ فَيُرِيدُونَ أَنْ يُبِينُوا مِنْكَ امْرَأَتَكَ؟ قَالَ نَعَمْ قَالَ وَجَاءَهُ رَجُلٌ فَقَالَ إِنَّهُ طَلَّقَ امْرَأَتَهُ مِائَةَ طَلْقَةٍ قَالَ بِكَلَامٍ وَاحِدٍ؟ قَالَ بِكَلَامٍ وَاحِدٍ قَالَ فَيُرِيدُونَ أَنْ يُبِينُوا مِنْكَ امْرَأَتَكَ؟ قَالَ نَعَمْ فَقَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 112

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ التَّوَرُّعِ عَنِ الْجَوَابِ فِيمَا لَيْسَ فِيهِ كِتَابٌ وَلَا سُنَّةٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Caution in answering that which is not found in the book or the ...

englishRaw: "To know the right of Allah upon him is better for him than saying what he does not know."   – Sound Chain
body: "To know the right of Allah upon him is better for him than saying what he does not know."   – Sound Chain
arabic: أَنْ يَعْلَمَ حَقَّ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ خَيْرٌ لَهُ مِنْ أَنْ يَقُولَ مَا لَا يَعْلَمُ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Sulaymān b. Ḥarb \u003e Ḥammād b. Zayd \u003e Yaḥyá b. Saʿīd \u003e al-Qāsim \u003e Laʾan Yaʿīsh al-a man Jāhil Baʿd \u003e Yaʿlam Ḥaq Allāh ʿAlayh Khayr Lah Min
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ حَرْبٍ حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ زَيْدٍ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنِ الْقَاسِمِ قَالَ «لَأَنْ يَعِيشَ الرَّجُلُ جَاهِلًا بَعْدَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 113

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ التَّوَرُّعِ عَنِ الْجَوَابِ فِيمَا لَيْسَ فِيهِ كِتَابٌ وَلَا سُنَّةٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Caution in answering that which is not found in the book or the ...

englishRaw: "We swear by Allah that we do not know everything that you ask about. Even if we knew and kept it hidden, there would be no benefit in concealing it from you."   – Sound Chain
body: "We swear by Allah that we do not know everything that you ask about. Even if we knew and kept it hidden, there would be no benefit in concealing it from you."   – Sound Chain
arabic: «إِنَّا وَاللَّهِ مَا نَعْلَمُ كُلَّ مَا تَسْأَلُونَ عَنْهُ وَلَوْ عَلِمْنَا مَا كَتَمْنَاكُمْ وَلَا حَلَّ لَنَا أَنْ نَكْتُمَكُمْ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Sulaymān b. Ḥarb \u003e Ḥammād b. Zayd \u003e Ayyūb \u003e al-Qāsim Sʾl
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ حَرْبٍ حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ زَيْدٍ عَنْ أَيُّوبَ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ الْقَاسِمَ سْئلُ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 114

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ التَّوَرُّعِ عَنِ الْجَوَابِ فِيمَا لَيْسَ فِيهِ كِتَابٌ وَلَا سُنَّةٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Caution in answering that which is not found in the book or the ...

englishRaw: "I am not in need of consultation, nor am I a person of importance."   – Sound Chain
body: "I am not in need of consultation, nor am I a person of importance."   – Sound Chain
arabic: «مَا أَضْطَرُّ إِلَى مَشُورَةٍ وَمَا أَنَا مِنْ ذِي فِي شَيْءٍ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Saʿīd b. ʿĀmir \u003e Ibn ʿAwn \u003e Suʾil al-Qāsim \u003e Shayʾ Qad Sammāh \u003e Mā Aḍṭar \u003e Mashūrah And Mā
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا سَعِيدُ بْنُ عَامِرٍ عَنِ ابْنِ عَوْنٍ قَالَ سُئِلَ الْقَاسِمُ عَنْ شَيْءٍ قَدْ سَمَّاهُ فَقَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 115

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ التَّوَرُّعِ عَنِ الْجَوَابِ فِيمَا لَيْسَ فِيهِ كِتَابٌ وَلَا سُنَّةٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Caution in answering that which is not found in the book or the ...

englishRaw: "Regarding something that you do not possess, and your father was an imam, he said, 'What is more severe than that in the sight of Allah, and in the sight of those who understand from Allah, is to give a fatwa (religious ruling) without knowledge or to convey information without trustworthiness.'"   – Weak Chain
body: "Regarding something that you do not possess, and your father was an imam, he said, 'What is more severe than that in the sight of Allah, and in the sight of those who understand from Allah, is to give a fatwa (religious ruling) without knowledge or to convey information without trustworthiness.'"   – Weak Chain
arabic: عَنِ الشَّيْءِ لَا يَكُونُ عِنْدَكَ وَقَدْ كَانَ أَبُوكَ إِمَامًا قَالَ «إِنَّ أَشَدَّ مِنْ ذَلِكَ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ وَعِنْدَ مَنْ عَقَلَ عَنِ اللَّهِ أَنْ أُفْتِيَ بِغَيْرِ عِلْمٍ أَوْ أَرْوِيَ عَنْ غَيْرِ ثِقَةٍ»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Muḥammad b. Kathīr \u003e Sufyān b. ʿUyaynah \u003e Yaḥyá \u003e Lilqāsim Mā Ashad ʿAlay \u003e Tusʾal
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ كَثِيرٍ عَنْ سُفْيَانَ بْنِ عُيَيْنَةَ عَنْ يَحْيَى قَالَ قُلْتُ لِلْقَاسِمِ مَا أَشَدَّ عَلَيَّ أَنْ تُسْأَلَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 116

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ التَّوَرُّعِ عَنِ الْجَوَابِ فِيمَا لَيْسَ فِيهِ كِتَابٌ وَلَا سُنَّةٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Caution in answering that which is not found in the book or the ...

englishRaw: Whenever a matter was brought to them in which there was no evidence from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, they would gather and unanimously agree based on what they had seen. The truth is in what they have observed.
body: Whenever a matter was brought to them in which there was no evidence from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, they would gather and unanimously agree based on what they had seen. The truth is in what they have observed.
arabic: كَانُوا إِذَا نَزَلَتْ بِهِمْ قَضِيَّةٌ لَيْسَ فِيهَا مِنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ أَثَرٌ اجْتَمَعُوا لَهَا وَأَجْمَعُوا فَالْحَقُّ فِيمَا رَأَوْا فَالْحَقُّ فِيمَا رَأَوْا
chain: ʿAmr b. ʿAwn Anbʾanā Hushaym \u003e al-ʿAwwām \u003e al-Musayyab b. Rāfiʿ
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ عَوْنٍ أَنبأَنَا هُشَيْمٌ عَنِ الْعَوَّامِ عَنِ الْمُسَيَّبِ بْنِ رَافِعٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 117

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ التَّوَرُّعِ عَنِ الْجَوَابِ فِيمَا لَيْسَ فِيهِ كِتَابٌ وَلَا سُنَّةٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Caution in answering that which is not found in the book or the ...

englishRaw: Regarding the common people, with this.   – Weak Chain
body: Regarding the common people, with this.   – Weak Chain
arabic: عَنِ الْعَوَّامِ بِهَذَا   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: ʿAbdullāh \u003e Yazīd
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ أَنْبَأَنَا يَزِيدُ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 118

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ التَّوَرُّعِ عَنِ الْجَوَابِ فِيمَا لَيْسَ فِيهِ كِتَابٌ وَلَا سُنَّةٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Caution in answering that which is not found in the book or the ...

englishRaw: The Prophet ﷺ said, "Do not hasten in calamity before its occurrence. If you do not hasten it before its occurrence, the Muslims will not cease to be successful. And when it descends on them, there are those who say, 'May he be blessed and guided.' But if you hasten it, your opinions will differ amongst yourselves, and you will be affected like this and like that." He indicated with his hand, pointing to his right and left.   – Weak Chain
body: The Prophet ﷺ said, "Do not hasten in calamity before its occurrence. If you do not hasten it before its occurrence, the Muslims will not cease to be successful. And when it descends on them, there are those who say, 'May he be blessed and guided.' But if you hasten it, your opinions will differ amongst yourselves, and you will be affected like this and like that." He indicated with his hand, pointing to his right and left.   – Weak Chain
arabic: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ قَالَ «لَا تَعْجَلُوا بِالْبَلِيَّةِ قَبْلَ نُزُولِهَا فَإِنَّكُمْ إِنْ لَا تَعْجَلُوهَا قَبْلَ نُزُولِهَا لَا يَنْفَكُّ الْمُسْلِمُونَ وَفِيهِمْ إِذَا هِيَ نَزَلَتْ مَنْ إِذَا قَالَ وُفِّقَ وَسُدِّدَ وَإِنَّكُمْ إِنْ تَعْجَلُوهَا تَخْتَلِفْ بِكُمِ الْأَهْوَاءُ فَتَأْخُذُوا هَكَذَا وَهَكَذَا» وَأَشَارَ بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ وَعَنْ يَمِينِهِ وَعَنْ شِمَالِهِ   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Yaḥyá b. Ḥassān And Muḥammad b. al-Mubārak \u003e Yaḥyá b. Ḥamzah \u003e Abū Salamah al-Ḥimṣī \u003e Wahb b. ʿAmr al-Jumaḥī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ حَسَّانَ وَمُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُبَارَكِ قَالَا حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ حَمْزَةَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو سَلَمَةَ الْحِمْصِيُّ أَنَّ وَهْبَ بْنَ عَمْرٍو الْجُمَحِيَّ حَدَّثَهُ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 119

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ التَّوَرُّعِ عَنِ الْجَوَابِ فِيمَا لَيْسَ فِيهِ كِتَابٌ وَلَا سُنَّةٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Caution in answering that which is not found in the book or the ...

englishRaw: That the Prophet ﷺ was asked about a matter that occurs which is not in a book or a Sunnah, he said, "The pious believers will consider it."   – Sound Chain
body: That the Prophet ﷺ was asked about a matter that occurs which is not in a book or a Sunnah, he said, "The pious believers will consider it."   – Sound Chain
arabic: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ سُئِلَ عَنِ الْأَمْرِ يَحْدُثُ لَيْسَ فِي كِتَابٍ وَلَا سُنَّةٍ قَالَ «يَنْظُرُ فِيهِ الْعَابِدُونَ مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Muḥammad b. al-Mubārak \u003e Yaḥyá b. Ḥamzah \u003e Abū Salamah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُبَارَكِ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ حَمْزَةَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو سَلَمَةَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 120

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ التَّوَرُّعِ عَنِ الْجَوَابِ فِيمَا لَيْسَ فِيهِ كِتَابٌ وَلَا سُنَّةٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Caution in answering that which is not found in the book or the ...

englishRaw: About things I don't know what they are, and even if we knew them, we would not hide them from you.   – Sound Chain
body: About things I don't know what they are, and even if we knew them, we would not hide them from you.   – Sound Chain
arabic: عَنْ أَشْيَاءَ مَا أَدْرِي مَا هِيَ وَلَوْ عَلِمْنَاهَا مَا حَلَّ لَنَا أَنْ نَكْتُمَكُمُوهَا   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Aḥmad b. ʿAbdullāh \u003e Muʿādh b. Muʿādh \u003e Ibn ʿAwn \u003e al-Qāsim Innakum Latasʾalūnā
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ حَدَّثَنَا مُعَاذُ بْنُ مُعَاذٍ عَنِ ابْنِ عَوْنٍ قَالَ قَالَ الْقَاسِمُ إِنَّكُمْ لَتَسْأَلُونَا عَنْ أَشْيَاءَ مَا كُنَّا نَسْأَلُ عَنْهَا وَتُنَقِّرُونَ عَنْ أَشْيَاءَ مَا كُنَّا نُنَقِّرُ عَنْهَا وَتَسْأَلُونَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 121

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ التَّوَرُّعِ عَنِ الْجَوَابِ فِيمَا لَيْسَ فِيهِ كِتَابٌ وَلَا سُنَّةٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Caution in answering that which is not found in the book or the ...

englishRaw: Indeed, there will come people who will argue with you about the doubts of the Quran, so take them by the Sunnah. Surely, the people of the Sunnah are more knowledgeable about the Book of Allah, the Exalted and Glorious.   – Weak Chain
body: Indeed, there will come people who will argue with you about the doubts of the Quran, so take them by the Sunnah. Surely, the people of the Sunnah are more knowledgeable about the Book of Allah, the Exalted and Glorious.   – Weak Chain
arabic: إِنَّهُ سَيَأْتِي نَاسٌ يُجَادِلُونَكُمْ بِشُبُهَاتِ الْقُرْآنِ فَخُذُوهُمْ بِالسُّنَنِ فَإِنَّ أَصْحَابَ السُّنَنِ أَعْلَمُ بِكِتَابِ اللَّهِ ﷻ   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: ʿAbdullāh b. Ṣāliḥ \u003e al-Layth \u003e Yazīd Ibn Abū Ḥabīb \u003e ʿUmar b. al-Ashaj \u003e ʿUmar b. al-Khaṭṭāb
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ صَالِحٍ حَدَّثَنِي اللَّيْثُ حَدَّثَنِي يَزِيدُ ابْنُ أَبِي حَبِيبٍ عَنْ عُمَرَ بْنِ الْأَشَجِّ أَنَّ عُمَرَ بْنَ الْخَطَّابِ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 122

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ التَّوَرُّعِ عَنِ الْجَوَابِ فِيمَا لَيْسَ فِيهِ كِتَابٌ وَلَا سُنَّةٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Caution in answering that which is not found in the book or the ...

englishRaw: "The matter of the Children of Israel remains moderate, without any issue, until women from other nations gave birth to children from men of the Children of Israel. They then started offering their opinions, leading them astray."   – Fair Chain
body: "The matter of the Children of Israel remains moderate, without any issue, until women from other nations gave birth to children from men of the Children of Israel. They then started offering their opinions, leading them astray."   – Fair Chain
arabic: «مَا زَالَ أَمْرُ بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ مُعْتَدِلًا لَيْسَ فِيهِ شَيْءٌ حَتَّى نَشَأَ فِيهِمُ الْمُوَلَّدُونَ أَبْنَاءُ سَبَايَا الْأُمَمِ أَبْنَاءُ النِّسَاءِ الَّتِي سَبَتْ بَنُو إِسْرَائِيلَ مِنْ غَيْرِهِمْ فَقَالُوا فِيهِمْ بِالرَّأْيِ فَأَضَلُّوهُمْ»   – إسناده جيد
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿUyaynah \u003e ʿAlī \u003e Ibn Mushir \u003e Hishām \u003e Ibn ʿUrwah \u003e Muḥammad b. ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. Nawfal \u003e ʿUrwah b. al-Zubayr
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عُيَيْنَةَ حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيٌّ هُوَ ابْنُ مُسْهِرٍ عَنْ هِشَامٍ هُوَ ابْنُ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ نَوْفَلٍ عَنْ عُرْوَةَ بْنِ الزُّبَيْرِ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 123

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ كَرَاهِيَةِ الْفُتْيَا
chapter.englishTitle: The dislike of youth

englishRaw: "Curse be upon those who ask about what was not."   – Fair Chain
body: "Curse be upon those who ask about what was not."   – Fair Chain
arabic: يَلْعَنُ مَنْ سَأَلَ عَمَّا لَمْ يَكُنْ   – إسناده جيد
chain: Muslim b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Ḥammād b. Yazīd al-Minqarī from my father \u003e Jāʾ a man Yawm \u003e Ibn ʿUmar Fasaʾalah \u003e Shayʾ Lā Adrī Mā \u003e Lah Ibn ʿUmar Lā Tasʾal ʿAmmā Lam Yakun Faʾinnī \u003e ʿUmar b. al-Khaṭṭāb Riḍwān Allāh ʿAlayh
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُسْلِمُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ يَزِيدَ الْمِنْقَرِيُّ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي قَالَ جَاءَ رَجُلٌ يَوْمًا إِلَى ابْنِ عُمَرَ فَسَأَلَهُ عَنْ شَيْءٍ لَا أَدْرِي مَا هُوَ فَقَالَ لَهُ ابْنُ عُمَرَ لَا تَسْأَلْ عَمَّا لَمْ يَكُنْ فَإِنِّي سَمِعْتُ عُمَرَ بْنَ الْخَطَّابِ رِضْوَانُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 124

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ كَرَاهِيَةِ الْفُتْيَا
chapter.englishTitle: The dislike of youth

englishRaw: About this matter, was it so? If they say yes, it has happened in it according to the one who knows and the one who sees. And if they say no, he says leave it until it comes to be.
body: About this matter, was it so? If they say yes, it has happened in it according to the one who knows and the one who sees. And if they say no, he says leave it until it comes to be.
arabic: عَنِ الْأَمْرِ أَكَانَ هَذَا؟ فَإِنْ قَالُوا نَعَمْ قَدْ كَانَ حَدَّثَ فِيهِ بِالَّذِي يَعْلَمُ وَالَّذِي يَرَى وَإِنْ قَالُوا لَمْ يَكُنْ قَالَ فَذَرُوهُ حَتَّى يَكُونَ
chain: al-Ḥakam b. Nāfiʿ \u003e Shuʿayb \u003e al-Zuhrī \u003e Balaghanā
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا الْحَكَمُ بْنُ نَافِعٍ أَنبَأَنَا شُعَيْبٌ عَنِ الزُّهْرِيِّ قَالَ بَلَغَنَا أَنَّ زَيْدَ بْنَ ثَابِتٍ الْأَنْصَارِيَّ رِضْوَانُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ كَانَ يَقُولُ إِذَا سُئِلَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 125

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ كَرَاهِيَةِ الْفُتْيَا
chapter.englishTitle: The dislike of youth

englishRaw: Was this afterwards? They said no, he said let us wait until it becomes (apparent). So when it becomes (apparent), we will share it with you.
body: Was this afterwards? They said no, he said let us wait until it becomes (apparent). So when it becomes (apparent), we will share it with you.
arabic: هَلْ كَانَ هَذَا بَعْدُ؟ قَالُوا لَا قَالَ دَعُونَا حَتَّى يَكُونَ فَإِذَا كَانَ تَجَشَّمْنَاهَا لَكُمْ
chain: Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Abū Hishām al-Makhzūmī \u003e Wuhayb \u003e Dāwud \u003e ʿĀmir \u003e Suʾil ʿAmmār b. Yāsir \u003e Masʾalah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ أَنبَأَنَا أَبُو هِشَامٍ الْمَخْزُومِيُّ حَدَّثَنَا وُهَيْبٌ حَدَّثَنَا دَاوُدُ عَنْ عَامِرٍ قَالَ سُئِلَ عَمَّارُ بْنُ يَاسِرٍ عَنْ مَسْأَلَةٍ فَقَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 126

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ كَرَاهِيَةِ الْفُتْيَا
chapter.englishTitle: The dislike of youth

englishRaw: "The age of the Prophet upon him be peace, on the pulpit saying, 'I am embarrassed by Allah to be asked about something that does not exist, for Allah has made clear what exists.'"   – Sound Chain
body: "The age of the Prophet upon him be peace, on the pulpit saying, 'I am embarrassed by Allah to be asked about something that does not exist, for Allah has made clear what exists.'"   – Sound Chain
arabic: عُمَرُ رِضْوُانُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ عَلَى الْمِنْبَرِ «أُحَرِّجُ بِاللَّهِ عَلَى رَجُلٍ سَأَلَ عَمَّا لَمْ يَكُنْ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ قَدْ بَيَّنَ مَا هُوَ كَائِنٌ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Muḥammad b. Aḥmad \u003e Sufyān \u003e ʿAmr \u003e Ṭāwus
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ عَنْ عَمْرٍو عَنْ طَاوُسٍ قَالَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 127

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ كَرَاهِيَةِ الْفُتْيَا
chapter.englishTitle: The dislike of youth

englishRaw: I have never seen a people better than the companions of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. They would only ask him about thirteen matters until they were all mentioned in the Quran. Among them were the verses: "{They ask you about the sacred month}" [Al-Baqarah 217] and "{They ask you about menstruation}" [Al-Baqarah 222]. He said, "They would only ask about what would benefit them."   – Weak Chain
body: I have never seen a people better than the companions of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. They would only ask him about thirteen matters until they were all mentioned in the Quran. Among them were the verses: "{They ask you about the sacred month}" [Al-Baqarah 217] and "{They ask you about menstruation}" [Al-Baqarah 222]. He said, "They would only ask about what would benefit them."   – Weak Chain
arabic: مَا رَأَيْتُ قَوْمًا كَانُوا خَيْرًا مِنْ أَصْحَابِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ مَا سَأَلُوهُ إِلَّا عَنْ ثَلَاثَ عَشْرَةَ مَسْأَلَةً حَتَّى قُبِضَ كُلُّهُنَّ فِي الْقُرْآنِ مِنْهُنَّ {يَسْأَلُونَكَ عَنِ الشَّهْرِ الْحَرَامِ} [البقرة 217] وَ {وَيَسْأَلُونَكَ عَنِ الْمَحِيضِ} [البقرة 222] قَالَ مَا كَانُوا يَسْأَلُونَ إِلَّا عَمَّا يَنْفَعُهُمْ   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: ʿAbdullāh b. Muḥammad b. Abū Shaybah \u003e Ibn Fuḍayl \u003e ʿAṭāʾ \u003e Saʿīd \u003e Ibn ʿAbbās
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ فُضَيْلٍ عَنْ عَطَاءٍ عَنْ سَعِيدٍ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 128

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ كَرَاهِيَةِ الْفُتْيَا
chapter.englishTitle: The dislike of youth

englishRaw: To whom I have found from the companions of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ , most of them preceded before me, and I have not seen a people with a easier lifestyle and less harshness than them.   – Fair Chain
body: To whom I have found from the companions of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ , most of them preceded before me, and I have not seen a people with a easier lifestyle and less harshness than them.   – Fair Chain
arabic: لَمَنْ «أَدْرَكْتُ مِنْ أَصْحَابِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ أَكْثَرُ مِمَّنْ سَبَقَنِي مِنْهُمْ فَمَا رَأَيْتُ قَوْمًا أَيْسَرَ سِيرَةً وَلَا أَقَلَّ تَشْدِيدًا مِنْهُمْ»   – إسناده جيد
chain: ʿUthmān b. ʿUmar \u003e Ibn ʿAwn \u003e ʿUmayr b. Isḥāq
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا عُثْمَانُ بْنُ عُمَرَ أَنبَأَنَا ابْنُ عَوْنٍ عَنْ عُمَيْرِ بْنِ إِسْحَاقَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 129

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ كَرَاهِيَةِ الْفُتْيَا
chapter.englishTitle: The dislike of youth

englishRaw: About a woman who died among a people who had no guardian. He said, "I have come to understand a people who did not strengthen your restrictions and did not ask about your affairs."   – Sound Chain
body: About a woman who died among a people who had no guardian. He said, "I have come to understand a people who did not strengthen your restrictions and did not ask about your affairs."   – Sound Chain
arabic: عَنِ امْرَأَةٍ مَاتَتْ مَعَ قَوْمٍ لَيْسَ لَهَا وَلِيٌّ فَقَالَ «أَدْرَكْتُ أَقْوَامًا مَا كَانُوا يُشَدِّدُونَ تَشْدِيدَكُمْ وَلَا يَسْأَلُونَ مَسَائِلَكُمْ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: al-ʿAbbās b. Sufyān \u003e Zayd b. Ḥubāb \u003e Rajāʾ b. Abū Salamah \u003e ʿUbādah b. Nusay al-Kindī And Suʾil \u003e Āmraʾah Mātat Maʿ Qawm Lays Lahā Walī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنِي الْعَبَّاسُ بْنُ سُفْيَانَ عَنْ زَيْدِ بْنِ حُبَابٍ أَخْبَرَنِي رَجَاءُ بْنُ أَبِي سَلَمَةَ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ عُبَادَةَ بْنَ نُسَيٍّ الْكِنْدِيَّ وَسُئِلَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 130

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ كَرَاهِيَةِ الْفُتْيَا
chapter.englishTitle: The dislike of youth

englishRaw: What do you do with matters? I said, "If it weren't for matters, knowledge would be lost." He said, "Do not say that knowledge is lost. Indeed, knowledge does not get lost when the Quran is recited, but if you were to say that jurisprudence is lost."   – Weak Chain
body: What do you do with matters? I said, "If it weren't for matters, knowledge would be lost." He said, "Do not say that knowledge is lost. Indeed, knowledge does not get lost when the Quran is recited, but if you were to say that jurisprudence is lost."   – Weak Chain
arabic: لِي مَا تَصْنَعُ بِالْمَسَائِلِ؟ قُلْتُ لَوْلَا الْمَسَائِلُ لَذَهَبَ الْعِلْمُ قَالَ «لَا تَقُلْ ذَهَبَ الْعِلْمُ إِنَّهُ لَا يَذْهَبُ الْعِلْمُ مَا قُرِئَ الْقُرْآنُ وَلَكِنْ لَوْ قُلْتَ يَذْهَبُ الْفِقْهُ»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: al-ʿAbbās b. Sufyān \u003e Zayd b. Ḥubāb \u003e Rajāʾ b. Abū Salamah \u003e Khālid b. Ḥāzim \u003e Hishām b. Muslim al-Qurashī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا الْعَبَّاسُ بْنُ سُفْيَانَ أَنبَأَنَا زَيْدُ بْنُ حُبَابٍ أَخْبَرَنِي رَجَاءُ بْنُ أَبِي سَلَمَةَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي خَالِدُ بْنُ حَازِمٍ عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ الْقُرَشِيِّ قَالَ كُنْتُ مَعَ ابْنِ مُحَيْرِيزٍ بِمَرْجِ الدِّيبَاجِ فَرَأَيْتُ مِنْهُ خَلْوَةً فَسَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ مَسْأَلَةٍ فَقَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 131

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ كَرَاهِيَةِ الْفُتْيَا
chapter.englishTitle: The dislike of youth

englishRaw: O people! We do not know if we may command you with things that are forbidden for you, or prevent you from things that are permissible for you. Indeed, the last verse revealed from the Qur'an was about interest (usury), and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not clarify it for us until he passed away. So, leave that which makes you doubt for that which does not make you doubt.   – Weak Chain
body: O people! We do not know if we may command you with things that are forbidden for you, or prevent you from things that are permissible for you. Indeed, the last verse revealed from the Qur'an was about interest (usury), and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not clarify it for us until he passed away. So, leave that which makes you doubt for that which does not make you doubt.   – Weak Chain
arabic: يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ «إِنَّا لَا نَدْرِي لَعَلَّنَا نَأْمُرُكُمْ بِأَشْيَاءَ لَا تَحِلُّ لَكُمْ وَلَعَلَّنَا نُحَرِّمُ عَلَيْكُمْ أَشْيَاءَ هِيَ لَكُمْ حَلَالٌ إِنَّ آخِرَ مَا نَزَلَ مِنَ الْقُرْآنِ آيَةُ الرِّبَا وَإِنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ لَمْ يُبَيِّنْهَا لَنَا حَتَّى مَاتَ فَدَعُوا مَا يَرِيبُكُمْ إِلَى مَا لَا يَرِيبُكُمْ»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Sulaymān b. Ḥarb \u003e Ḥammād b. Salamah \u003e Dāwud \u003e al-Shaʿbī \u003e ʿUmar
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ حَرْبٍ حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ سَلَمَةَ عَنْ دَاوُدَ عَنِ الشَّعْبِيِّ أَنَّ عُمَرَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 132

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: I left Abraham's place and was received by Hammad. He handed me eight questions, so I asked him and he answered four of them and left four unanswered.
body: I left Abraham's place and was received by Hammad. He handed me eight questions, so I asked him and he answered four of them and left four unanswered.
arabic: خَرَجْتُ مِنْ عِنْدِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ فَاسْتَقْبَلَنِي حَمَّادٌ «فَحَمَّلَنِي ثَمَانِيَةَ أَبْوَابٍ مَسَائِلَ فَسَأَلْتُهُ فَأَجَابَنِي عَنْ أَرْبَعٍ وَتَرَكَ أَرْبَعًا»
chain: Salm b. Junādah \u003e Ibn Idrīs \u003e ʿAmmih
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا سَلْمُ بْنُ جُنَادَةَ حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ إِدْرِيسَ عَنْ عَمِّهِ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 133

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: "I only knew hatred in his face for something."
body: "I only knew hatred in his face for something."
arabic: عَنْ شَيْءٍ إِلَّا عَرَفْتُ الْكَرَاهِيَةَ فِي وَجْهِهِ»
chain: Qabīṣah \u003e Sufyān \u003e ʿAbd al-Malik b. Abjar \u003e Zubayd \u003e Mā Saʾalt Ibrāhīm
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قَبِيصَةُ أَخْبَرَنَا سُفْيَانُ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْمَلِكِ بْنِ أَبْجَرَ عَنْ زُبَيْدٍ قَالَ «مَا سَأَلْتُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 134

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: "About something that I have no knowledge of from the common people."   – Sound Chain
body: "About something that I have no knowledge of from the common people."   – Sound Chain
arabic: عَنْ شَيْءٍ لَا عِلْمَ لِي بِهِ مِنَ الشَّعْبِيِّ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Muḥammad b. Aḥmad \u003e Isḥāq b. Manṣūr \u003e ʿUmar b. Abū Zāʾidah \u003e Mā Raʾayt Aḥad Akthar \u003e Idhā Suʾil
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ حَدَّثَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ مَنْصُورٍ عَنْ عُمَرَ بْنِ أَبِي زَائِدَةَ قَالَ «مَا رَأَيْتُ أَحَدًا أَكْثَرَ أَنْ يَقُولَ إِذَا سُئِلَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 135

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: "When something bothered Al-Sha'bi, he would be cautious, while Ibrahim used to say, and say, and say. Abu Asim said, Al-Sha'bi was in a better condition with Ibn Awn than with Ibrahim."   – Sound Chain
body: "When something bothered Al-Sha'bi, he would be cautious, while Ibrahim used to say, and say, and say. Abu Asim said, Al-Sha'bi was in a better condition with Ibn Awn than with Ibrahim."   – Sound Chain
arabic: كَانَ الشَّعْبِيُّ إِذَا جَاءَهُ شَيْءٌ اتَّقَى وَكَانَ إِبْرَاهِيمُ يَقُولُ وَيَقُولُ وَيَقُولُ قَالَ أَبُو عَاصِمٍ كَانَ الشَّعْبِيُّ فِي هَذَا أَحْسَنَ حَالًا عِنْدَ ابْنِ عَوْنٍ مِنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Abū ʿĀṣim \u003e Ibn ʿAwn \u003e Samiʿtuh Yadhkur
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو عَاصِمٍ عَنِ ابْنِ عَوْنٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُهُ يَذْكُرُ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 136

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: There is nothing that I have not asked about, but I dislike making the permissible forbidden or the forbidden permissible.   – Sound Chain
body: There is nothing that I have not asked about, but I dislike making the permissible forbidden or the forbidden permissible.   – Sound Chain
arabic: مَا مِنْهُ شَيْءٌ إِلَّا قَدْ سَأَلْتُ عَنْهُ وَلَكِنِّي «أَكْرَهُ أَنْ أُحِلَّ حَرَامًا أَوْ أُحَرِّمَ حَلَالًا»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: ʿAbdullāh b. Saʿīd \u003e Aḥmad b. Bashīr \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e Jaʿfar b. Iyās \u003e saʿīd b. Jubayr Mā Lak Lā
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ أَنبَأَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ بَشِيرٍ حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ إِيَاسٍ قَالَ قُلْتُ لِسَعِيدِ بْنِ جُبَيْرٍ مَا لَكَ لَا تَقُولُ فِي الطَّلَاقِ شَيْئًا؟ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 137

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: That his brother's knowledge was sufficient for him.   – Sound Chain
body: That his brother's knowledge was sufficient for him.   – Sound Chain
arabic: أَنَّ أَخَاهُ كَفَاهُ الْفُتْيَا»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Abū Nuʿaym \u003e Sufyān \u003e ʿAṭāʾ b. al-Sāʾib \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. Abū Laylá
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو نُعَيْمٍ حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ عَنْ عَطَاءِ بْنِ السَّائِبِ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ عَبْدَ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنَ أَبِي لَيْلَى يَقُولُ لَقَدْ أَدْرَكْتُ فِي هَذَا الْمَسْجِدِ عِشْرِينَ وَمِائَةً مِنَ الْأَنْصَارِ «وَمَا مِنْهُمْ مِنْ أَحَدٍ يُحَدِّثُ بِحَدِيثٍ إِلَّا وَدَّ أَنَّ أَخَاهُ كَفَاهُ الْحَدِيثَ وَلَا يُسْأَلُ عَنْ فُتْيَا إِلَّا وَدَّ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 138

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: I asked the common people, "How do you usually respond when you are asked a question?" They said, "Rely on the expert and stay silent until he returns to the beginning."   – Good Chain
body: I asked the common people, "How do you usually respond when you are asked a question?" They said, "Rely on the expert and stay silent until he returns to the beginning."   – Good Chain
arabic: سَأَلْتُ الشَّعْبِيَّ كَيْفَ كُنْتُمْ تَصْنَعُونَ إِذَا سُئِلْتُمْ؟ قَالَ عَلَى الْخَبِيرِ وَقَعْتَ كَانَ إِذَا سُئِلَ الرَّجُلُ قَالَ لِصَاحِبِهِ أَفْتِهِمْ فَلَا يَزَالُ حَتَّى يَرْجِعَ إِلَى الْأَوَّلِ   – إسناده حسن
chain: Yūsuf b. Yaʿqūb al-Ṣaffār \u003e Abū Bakr \u003e Dāwud \u003e Saʾalt al-Shaʿbī Kayf Kuntum Taṣnaʿūn Idhā Suʾiltum
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا يُوسُفُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ الصَّفَّارُ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ عَنْ دَاوُدَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 139

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: Indeed, the scholar enters between Allah and His servants, so they should seek a way out for themselves.   – Sound Chain
body: Indeed, the scholar enters between Allah and His servants, so they should seek a way out for themselves.   – Sound Chain
arabic: إِنَّ «الْعَالِمَ يَدْخُلُ فِيمَا بَيْنَ اللَّهِ وَبَيْنَ عِبَادِهِ فَلْيَطْلُبْ لِنَفْسِهِ الْمَخْرَجَ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Aḥmad b. al-Ḥajjāj \u003e Sufyān \u003e Ibn al-Munkadir
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ الْحَجَّاجِ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ سُفْيَانَ عَنِ ابْنِ الْمُنْكَدِرِ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 140

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: "By Allah, I have never seen anyone who was harsher on those who defied him than the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, and I have never seen anyone who was harsher on him than Abu Bakr. And indeed, I perceive that Umar was the one who had the greatest fear for them or towards them."   – Sound Chain
body: "By Allah, I have never seen anyone who was harsher on those who defied him than the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, and I have never seen anyone who was harsher on him than Abu Bakr. And indeed, I perceive that Umar was the one who had the greatest fear for them or towards them."   – Sound Chain
arabic: عَبْدُ اللَّهِ وَالَّذِي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ «مَا رَأَيْتُ أَحَدًا كَانَ أَشَدَّ عَلَى الْمُتَنَطِّعِينَ مِنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ وَمَا رَأَيْتُ أَحَدًا كَانَ أَشَدَّ عَلَيْهِمْ مِنْ أَبِي بَكْرٍ وَإِنِّي لَأَرَى عُمَرَ كَانَ أَشَدَّ خَوْفًا عَلَيْهِمْ أَوْ لَهُمْ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Muḥammad b. Qudāmah \u003e Abū Usāmah \u003e Misʿar
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ قُدَامَةَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو أُسَامَةَ عَنْ مِسْعَرٍ قَالَ أَخْرَجَ إِلَيَّ مَعْنُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ كِتَابًا فَحَلَفَ لِي بِاللَّهِ أنَّهُ خَطُّ أَبِيهِ فَإِذَا فِيهِ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 141

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: Yes, "Follow righteousness and uprightness and do not innovate."   – Weak Chain
body: Yes, "Follow righteousness and uprightness and do not innovate."   – Weak Chain
arabic: نَعَمْ «عَلَيْكَ بِتَقْوَى اللَّهِ وَالِاسْتِقَامَةِ اتَّبِعْ وَلَا تَبْتَدِعْ»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Abū Nuʿaym \u003e Zamʿah b. Ṣāliḥ \u003e ʿUthmān b. Ḥāḍir al-Azdī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو نُعَيْمٍ حَدَّثَنَا زَمْعَةُ بْنُ صَالِحٍ عَنْ عُثْمَانَ بْنِ حَاضِرٍ الْأَزْدِيِّ قَالَ دَخَلْتُ عَلَى ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ فَقُلْتُ أَوْصِنِي فَقَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 142

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: "He was on the path as he was on the trail."   – Sound Chain
body: "He was on the path as he was on the trail."   – Sound Chain
arabic: أَنَّهُ عَلَى الطَّرِيقِ مَا كَانَ عَلَى الْأَثَرِ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Makhlad b. Mālik b. Jābir \u003e al-Naḍr b. Shumayl \u003e Ibn ʿAwn \u003e Ibn Sīrīn \u003e Kānūā Yarawn
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مَخْلَدُ بْنُ مَالِكِ بْنِ جَابِرٍ أَنبَأَنَا النَّضْرُ بْنُ شُمَيْلٍ عَنِ ابْنِ عَوْنٍ عَنِ ابْنِ سِيرِينَ قَالَ «كَانُوا يَرَوْنَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 143

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: "As long as he follows the footsteps, he is on the right path."   – Sound Chain
body: "As long as he follows the footsteps, he is on the right path."   – Sound Chain
arabic: «مَا دَامَ عَلَى الْأَثَرِ فَهُوَ عَلَى الطَّرِيقِ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Yūsuf b. Mūsá \u003e Azhar \u003e Ibn ʿAwn \u003e Ibn Sīrīn
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا يُوسُفُ بْنُ مُوسَى حَدَّثَنَا أَزْهَرُ عَنِ ابْنِ عَوْنٍ عَنِ ابْنِ سِيرِينَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 144

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: "That his family should be away from you and from unnecessary indulgence, depth and innovation, and you should stick to the old ways."
body: "That his family should be away from you and from unnecessary indulgence, depth and innovation, and you should stick to the old ways."
arabic: أَنْ يَذْهَبَ أَهْلُهُ أَلَا وَإِيَّاكُمْ وَالتَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّعَمُّقَ وَالْبِدَعَ وَعَلَيْكُمْ بِالْعَتِيقِ»
chain: Abū al-Mughīrah \u003e al-Awzāʿī \u003e Yaḥyá b. Abū Kathīr \u003e Abū Qilābah \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Masʿūd Taʿallamūā al-ʿIlm Qabl \u003e Yuqbaḍ And Qabḍuh
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو الْمُغِيرَةِ حَدَّثَنَا الْأَوْزَاعِيُّ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ أَبِي كَثِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي قِلَابَةَ قَالَ قَالَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مَسْعُودٍ «تَعَلَّمُوا الْعِلْمَ قَبْلَ أَنْ يُقْبَضَ وَقَبْضُهُ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 145

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: "That you take your companions with knowledge, for surely one of you does not know when he will be in need of it or when he will be in need of what he possesses. Indeed, you will find people who claim to invite you to the Book of Allah, yet they have abandoned it behind their backs. So, you must seek knowledge, and beware of pretentiousness, affectation, unnecessary show, and delving too deeply into matters. And you must hold fast to the ancient teachings."   – Weak Chain
body: "That you take your companions with knowledge, for surely one of you does not know when he will be in need of it or when he will be in need of what he possesses. Indeed, you will find people who claim to invite you to the Book of Allah, yet they have abandoned it behind their backs. So, you must seek knowledge, and beware of pretentiousness, affectation, unnecessary show, and delving too deeply into matters. And you must hold fast to the ancient teachings."   – Weak Chain
arabic: أَنْ يُذْهَبَ بِأَصْحَابِهِ عَلَيْكُمْ بِالْعِلْمِ فَإِنَّ أَحَدَكُمْ لَا يَدْرِي مَتَى يُفْتَقَرُ إِلَيْهِ أَوْ يُفْتَقَرُ إِلَى مَا عِنْدَهُ إِنَّكُمْ سَتَجِدُونَ أَقْوَامًا يَزْعُمُونَ أَنَّهُمْ يَدْعُونَكُمْ إِلَى كِتَابِ اللَّهِ وَقَدْ نَبَذُوهُ وَرَاءَ ظُهُورِهِمْ فَعَلَيْكُمْ بِالْعِلْمِ وَإِيَّاكُمْ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ وَإِيَّاكُمْ وَالتَّنَطُّعَ وَإِيَّاكُمْ وَالتَّعَمُّقَ وَعَلَيْكُمْ بِالْعَتِيقِ»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Sulaymān b. Ḥarb And ʾAbū al-Nuʿmān \u003e Ḥammād b. Zayd \u003e Ayyūb \u003e Abū Qilābah \u003e Ibn Masʿūd ʿAlaykum Bi-al-ʿIlm Qabl \u003e Yuqbaḍ Waqabḍuh
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ حَرْبٍ وَأَبُو النُّعْمَانِ عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ زَيْدٍ عَنْ أَيُّوبَ عَنْ أَبِي قِلَابَةَ قَالَ قَالَ ابْنُ مَسْعُودٍ «عَلَيْكُمْ بِالْعِلْمِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يُقْبَضَ وَقَبْضُهُ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 146

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: It is said that a man came to the city and started asking about the similarities of the Quran. Umar was informed and he had prepared a bunch of palm branches for him. He asked the man, "Who are you?" The man replied, "I am Abdullah the dyer." Umar took one of the palm branches and hit him with it saying, "I am Abdullah Umar." He continued hitting him until his head started bleeding. The man said, "O Commander of the Believers, that's enough, what I used to find in my head is now gone."
body: It is said that a man came to the city and started asking about the similarities of the Quran. Umar was informed and he had prepared a bunch of palm branches for him. He asked the man, "Who are you?" The man replied, "I am Abdullah the dyer." Umar took one of the palm branches and hit him with it saying, "I am Abdullah Umar." He continued hitting him until his head started bleeding. The man said, "O Commander of the Believers, that's enough, what I used to find in my head is now gone."
arabic: يُقَالُ لَهُ صَبِيغٌ قَدِمَ الْمَدِينَةَ فَجَعَلَ يَسْأَلُ عَنْ مُتَشَابِهِ الْقُرْآنِ فَأَرْسَلَ إِلَيْهِ عُمَرُ وَقَدْ أَعَدَّ لَهُ عَرَاجِينَ النَّخْلِ فَقَالَ مَنْ أَنْتَ؟ قَالَ أَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ صَبِيغٌ فَأَخَذَ عُمَرُ عُرْجُونًا مِنْ تِلْكَ الْعَرَاجِينِ فَضَرَبَهُ وَقَالَ أَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ عُمَرُ «فَجَعَلَ لَهُ ضَرْبًا حَتَّى دَمِيَ رَأْسُهُ» فَقَالَ يَا أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ حَسْبُكَ قَدْ ذَهَبَ الَّذِي كُنْتُ أَجِدُ فِي رَأْسِي
chain: Abū al-Nuʿmān \u003e Ḥammād b. Zayd \u003e Yazīd b. Ḥāzim \u003e Sulaymān b. Yasār \u003e a man
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو النُّعْمَانِ حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ زَيْدٍ حَدَّثَنَا يَزِيدُ بْنُ حَازِمٍ عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ يَسَارٍ أَنَّ رَجُلًا

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 147

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ recited: 'It is He Who has sent down to you (Muhammad) the Book (this Qur'an). In it are Verses that are entirely clear, they are the foundations of the Book, and others not entirely clear. So, as for those in whose hearts there is a deviation (from the truth), they follow that which is not entirely clear thereof, seeking Al-Fitnah (polytheism and trials), and seeking for its hidden meanings, but none knows its hidden meanings save Allah. And those who are firmly grounded in knowledge say: 'We believe in it; the whole of it (clear and unclear Verses) are from our Lord.' And none receive admonition except men of understanding." (3:7) So the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When you see those who follow what is not entirely clear thereof, beware of them.'"   – Sound
body: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ recited: 'It is He Who has sent down to you (Muhammad) the Book (this Qur'an). In it are Verses that are entirely clear, they are the foundations of the Book, and others not entirely clear. So, as for those in whose hearts there is a deviation (from the truth), they follow that which is not entirely clear thereof, seeking Al-Fitnah (polytheism and trials), and seeking for its hidden meanings, but none knows its hidden meanings save Allah. And those who are firmly grounded in knowledge say: 'We believe in it; the whole of it (clear and unclear Verses) are from our Lord.' And none receive admonition except men of understanding." (3:7) So the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When you see those who follow what is not entirely clear thereof, beware of them.'"   – Sound
arabic: تَلَا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ {هُوَ الَّذِي أَنْزَلَ عَلَيْكَ الْكِتَابَ مِنْهُ آيَاتٌ مُحْكَمَاتٌ هُنَّ أُمُّ الْكِتَابِ وَأُخَرُ مُتَشَابِهَاتٌ} [آل عمران 7] فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «إِذَا رَأَيْتُمُ الَّذِينَ يَتَّبِعُونَ مَا تَشَابَهَ مِنْهُ فَاحْذَرُوهُمْ»   – صحيح
chain: Abū al-Walīd al-Ṭayālisī \u003e Ḥammād b. Salamah And Yazīd b. Ibrāhīm \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Abū Mulaykah \u003e al-Qāsim \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو الْوَلِيدِ الطَّيَالِسِيُّ حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ سَلَمَةَ وَيَزِيدُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ أَبِي مُلَيْكَةَ عَنِ الْقَاسِمِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 148

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: "To make lawful for you something that Allah has made forbidden for you, or to make forbidden for you something that Allah has made lawful for you."   – Sound Chain
body: "To make lawful for you something that Allah has made forbidden for you, or to make forbidden for you something that Allah has made lawful for you."   – Sound Chain
arabic: أَنْ أُحِلَّ لَكَ شَيْئًا حَرَّمَهُ اللَّهُ عَلَيْكَ أَوْ أُحَرِّمَ مَا أَحَلَّهُ اللَّهُ لَكَ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: ʿAbdullāh b. Muḥammad \u003e Ḥafṣ \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e Shaqīq \u003e Suʾil ʿAbdullāh \u003e Shayʾ \u003e Innī Laʾakrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ حَدَّثَنَا حَفْصٌ عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنْ شَقِيقٍ قَالَ سُئِلَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ عَنْ شَيْءٍ فَقَالَ «إِنِّي لَأَكْرَهُ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 149

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: "To burden myself with what I do not know."   – Fair Chain
body: "To burden myself with what I do not know."   – Fair Chain
arabic: أَنْ أَتَكَلَّفَ لَهُ مَا لَا أَعْلَمُ»   – إسناده جيد
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿUyaynah \u003e Abū Isḥāq al-Fazārī \u003e Ibn ʿAwn \u003e Ibn Sīrīn \u003e Ḥumayd b. ʿAbd al-Raḥman \u003e Laʾan Aruddah Biʿiyyih Aḥab Ilay Min
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عُيَيْنَةَ عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ الْفَزَارِيِّ عَنِ ابْنِ عَوْنٍ عَنِ ابْنِ سِيرِينَ عَنْ حُمَيْدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ قَالَ «لَأَنْ أَرُدَّهُ بِعِيِّهِ أَحَبُّ إِلَيَّ مِنْ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 150

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: About some things from the Quran in the armies of the Muslims until he arrived in Egypt, and 'Amr ibn al-As sent it to 'Umar ibn al-Khattab. When the messenger came to him with the book and he read it, he said, "Where is the man?" He said, "He is on the journey." 'Umar said, "I fear that it might have been lost, and you will suffer a severe punishment from me because of it." So he brought it to him, and 'Umar said, "You are a liar." So 'Umar sent for a palm-stick and he beat him with it until he left his back bleeding, then he left him until he recovered. Then he called him to come back, and 'Umar said, "Will you ask for it again?" So 'Umar sent him to Rata'ib from Jarid, and he beat him with it until he left his back bleeding, then he left him until he recovered, then he beat him again until he left his back bleeding. Then 'Umar called him to come back, and he said, "Sabiqh, if you want to kill me, then kill me in an honorable manner. And if you want to treat me, then I swear by Allah that I have already recovered." So 'Umar permitted him to return to his land, and he wrote to Abu Musa al-Ash'ari that no one should sit with him from the Muslims. This intensified on the man, so Abu Musa wrote to 'Umar that his repentance was good. 'Umar wrote back, "Give permission for the people to sit with him."   – Weak Chain

This intensified on the man, so Abu Musa wrote to 'Umar that his repentance was good. 'Umar wrote back, "Give permission for the people to sit with him."   – Weak Chain
arabic: عَنْ أَشْيَاءَ مِنَ الْقُرْآنِ فِي أَجْنَادِ الْمُسْلِمِينَ حَتَّى قَدِمَ مِصْرَ فَبَعَثَ بِهِ عَمْرُو بْنُ الْعَاصِ إِلَى عُمَرَ بْنِ الْخَطَّابِ فَلَمَّا أَتَاهُ الرَّسُولُ بِالْكِتَابِ فَقَرَأَهُ فَقَالَ أَيْنَ الرَّجُلُ؟ فَقَالَ فِي الرَّحْلِ قَالَ عُمَرُ «أَبْصِرْ أَنْ يكونَ ذَهَبَ فَتُصِيبَكَ مِنِّي بِهِ الْعُقُوبَةُ الْمُوجِعَةُ» فَأَتَاهُ بِهِ فَقَالَ عُمَرُ «تَسْأَلُ مُحْدَثَةً» فأرْسلَ عُمَرُ إِلَى رَطَائِبَ مِنْ جَرِيدٍ فَضَرَبَهُ بِهَا حَتَّى تَرَكَ ظَهْرَهُ دَبِرَةً ثُمَّ تَرَكَهُ حَتَّى بَرَأَ ثُمَّ عَادَ لَهُ ثُمَّ تَرَكَهُ حَتَّى بَرَأَ فَدَعَا بِهِ لِيَعُودَ لَهُ قَالَ فقالَ صَبِيغٌ إِنْ كُنْتَ تُرِيدُ قَتْلِي فَاقْتُلْنِي قَتْلًا جَمِيلًا وَإِنْ كُنْتَ تُرِيدُ أَنْ تُدَاوِيَنِي فَقَدْ وَاللَّهِ بَرَأْتُ فَأَذِنَ لَهُ إِلَى أَرْضِهِ وَكَتَبَ إِلَى أَبِي مُوسَى الْأَشْعَرِيِّ أَنْ لَا يُجَالِسَهُ أَحَدٌ مِنَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ فَاشْتَدَّ ذَلِكَ عَلَى الرَّجُلِ فَكَتَبَ أَبُو مُوسَى إِلَى عُمَرَ أَنْ قَدْ حَسُنَتْ تَوْبَتُهُ فَكَتَبَ عُمَرُ أنِ ائْذَنْ لِلنَّاسِ بِمُجَالَسَتِهِ   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: ʿAbdullāh b. Ṣāliḥ \u003e al-Layth \u003e Ibn ʿAjlān \u003e Nāfiʿ a freed slave of ʿAbdullāh \u003e Ṣabīgh al-ʿIrāqī Jaʿal Yasʾal
