title: Sunan ad-Darimi 151

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: "Oh Abu Al-Mundhir, what do you say about this and that?" He said, "Oh my son, was it you who asked me about this?" He said, "No." He said, "Then postpone it until we find a solution and treat ourselves so we can inform you."   – Weak Chain
body: "Oh Abu Al-Mundhir, what do you say about this and that?" He said, "Oh my son, was it you who asked me about this?" He said, "No." He said, "Then postpone it until we find a solution and treat ourselves so we can inform you."   – Weak Chain
arabic: يَا أَبَا الْمُنْذِرِ مَا تَقُولُ فِي كَذَا وَكَذَا؟ قَالَ «يَا بُنَيَّ أَكَانَ الَّذِي سَأَلْتَنِي عَنْهُ؟» قَالَ لَا قَالَ «أَمَّا لَا» «فَأَجِّلْنِي حَتَّى يَكُونَ فَنُعَالِجَ أَنْفُسَنَا حَتَّى نُخْبِرَكَ»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Aḥmad b. ʿAbdullāh b. Yūnus \u003e Zuhayr \u003e Ismāʿīl b. Abū Khālid \u003e ʿĀmir \u003e Āstaftá a man Ubay b. Kaʿb \u003e Yā Abū al-Mundhir Mā
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ يُونُسَ حَدَّثَنَا زُهَيْرٌ حَدَّثَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ أَبِي خَالِدٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ عَامِرًا يَقُولُ اسْتَفْتَى رَجُلٌ أُبَيَّ بْنَ كَعْبٍ فَقَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 152

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: "Do you really mean what you say, oh my uncle, like this and like that?" He said, "Oh son of my brother, was this the case?" He said, "No." He said, "Then forgive us until it becomes."   – Sound Chain
body: "Do you really mean what you say, oh my uncle, like this and like that?" He said, "Oh son of my brother, was this the case?" He said, "No." He said, "Then forgive us until it becomes."   – Sound Chain
arabic: فَتًى مَا تَقُولُ يَا عَمَّاهُ كَذَا وَكَذَا؟ قَالَ يَا ابْنَ أَخِي أَكَانَ هَذَا؟ قَالَ لَا قَالَ «فَأَعْفِنَا حَتَّى يَكُونَ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Yaḥyá b. Ḥammād \u003e Abū ʿAwānah \u003e Firās \u003e ʿĀmir \u003e Masrūq
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ حَمَّادٍ أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو عَوَانَةَ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنَا عَنْ فِرَاسٍ عَنْ عَامِرٍ عَنْ مَسْرُوقٍ قَالَ كُنْتُ أَمْشِي مَعَ أُبَيِّ بْنِ كَعْبٍ فَقَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 153

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: "Regarding something for which only the answer to the question asked has been given."   – Sound Chain
body: "Regarding something for which only the answer to the question asked has been given."   – Sound Chain
arabic: عَنْ شَيْءٍ لَمْ يُجِبْ فِيهِ إِلَّا جَوَابَ الَّذِي سُئِلَ عَنْهُ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: ʿAbdullāh b. Saʿīd \u003e Abū Usāmah \u003e al-Aʿmash
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو أُسَامَةَ عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ قَالَ كَانَ إِبْرَاهِيمُ «إِذَا سُئِلَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 154

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: It means: "He used to not give a fatwa (religious ruling) regarding matters related to the private area in which there is disagreement."   – Sound Chain
body: It means: "He used to not give a fatwa (religious ruling) regarding matters related to the private area in which there is disagreement."   – Sound Chain
arabic: أَنَّهُ كَانَ «لَا يُفْتِي فِي الْفَرْجِ بِشَيْءٍ فِيهِ اخْتِلَافٌ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: al-Ḥusayn b. Manṣūr \u003e al-Ḥusayn b. al-Walīd \u003e Wuhayb \u003e Hishām \u003e Muḥammad b. Sīrīn
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ مَنْصُورٍ حَدَّثَنَا الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ الْوَلِيدِ عَنْ وُهَيْبٍ عَنْ هِشَامٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سِيرِينَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 155

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: He said, "O people, do not hasten the affliction before its descent, causing you to suffer here and there. If you do not hasten the affliction before its descent, Muslims will continuously have someone among them who, when asked a question, answers correctly." And when he was asked to be successful, he was granted success.   – Sound Chain
body: He said, "O people, do not hasten the affliction before its descent, causing you to suffer here and there. If you do not hasten the affliction before its descent, Muslims will continuously have someone among them who, when asked a question, answers correctly." And when he was asked to be successful, he was granted success.   – Sound Chain
arabic: أَنَّهُ قَالَ يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ «لَا تَعْجَلُوا بِالْبَلَاءِ قَبْلَ نُزُولِهِ فَيُذْهَبُ بِكُمْ هَاهُنَا وَهَاهُنَا فَإِنَّكُمْ إِنْ لَمْ تَعْجَلُوا بِالْبَلَاءِ قَبْلَ نُزُولِهِ لَمْ يَنْفَكَّ الْمُسْلِمُونَ أَنْ يَكُونَ فِيهِمْ مَنْ إِذَا سُئِلَ سُدِّدَ» وَإِذَا قَالَ وُفِّقَ   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Muslim b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Ḥammād b. Zayd \u003e al-Ṣalt b. Rāshid \u003e Saʾalt Ṭāwus \u003e Masʾalah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُسْلِمُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ زَيْدٍ حَدَّثَنَا الصَّلْتُ بْنُ رَاشِدٍ قَالَ سَأَلْتُ طَاوُسًا عَنْ مَسْأَلَةٍ فَقَالَ لِي كَانَ هَذَا؟ قُلْتُ نَعَمْ قَالَ آللَّهِ قُلْتُ آللَّهِ ثُمَّ قَالَ إِنَّ أَصْحَابَنَا أَخْبَرُونَا عَنْ مُعَاذِ بْنِ جَبَلٍ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 156

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: About the first of them, thirty poor people every day.   – Sound Chain
body: About the first of them, thirty poor people every day.   – Sound Chain
arabic: عَنِ الْأَوَّلِ مِنْهُمَا ثَلَاثِينَ مِسْكِينًا لِكُلِّ يَوْمٍ مِسْكِينٌ   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Bishr b. al-Ḥakam \u003e ʿAbd al-ʿAzīz b. Muḥammad \u003e ʿAmr b. Maymūn from his father \u003e Ibn ʿAbbās Saʾaltuh \u003e a man Adrakah Ramaḍānān
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا بِشْرُ بْنُ الْحَكَمِ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الْعَزِيزِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ مَيْمُونٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ أَدْرَكَهُ رَمَضَانَانِ فَقَالَ أَكَانَ أَوْ لَمْ يَكُنْ؟ قَالَ لَمْ يَكُنْ بَعْدُ قَالَ «اتْرُكْ بَلِيَّتَهُ حَتَّى تَنْزِلَ» قَالَ فَدَلَّسْنَا لَهُ رَجُلًا فَقَالَ قَدْ كَانَ فَقَالَ يُطْعِمُ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 157

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: "I used to sit with Ibn Umar one day in Makkah and with Ibn Abbas another day. Whatever Ibn Umar would say in response to a question, I do not have knowledge of more than what he would give his verdict on."   – Good Chain
body: "I used to sit with Ibn Umar one day in Makkah and with Ibn Abbas another day. Whatever Ibn Umar would say in response to a question, I do not have knowledge of more than what he would give his verdict on."   – Good Chain
arabic: كُنْتُ أَجْلِسُ بِمَكَّةَ إِلَى ابْنِ عُمَرَ يَوْمًا وَإِلَى ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ يَوْمًا فَمَا يَقُولُ ابْنُ عُمَرَ فِيمَا يُسْأَلُ لَا عِلْمَ لِي أَكْثَرُ مِمَّا يُفْتِي بِهِ   – إسناده حسن
chain: ʿAbdullāh b. ʿImrān \u003e Isḥāq b. Sulaymān \u003e al-ʿUmarī \u003e ʿUbayd b. Jurayj
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عِمْرَانَ حَدَّثَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ حَدَّثَنَا الْعُمَرِيُّ عَنْ عُبَيْدِ بْنِ جُرَيْجٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 158

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا وَكَرِهَ التَّنَطُّعَ وَالتَّبَدُّعَ
chapter.englishTitle: Who liked chivalry and disliked arrogance and ostentation

englishRaw: "Abdullah said, 'Learn, for surely none of you knows when knowledge will be sought from him.'"   – Sound Chain
body: "Abdullah said, 'Learn, for surely none of you knows when knowledge will be sought from him.'"   – Sound Chain
arabic: عَبْدُ اللَّهِ «تَعَلَّمُوا فَإِنَّ أَحَدَكُمْ لَا يَدْرِي مَتَى يُخْتلَفُ إِلَيْهِ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Muḥammad b. Yūsuf \u003e Sufyān \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e Abū Wāʾil
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يُوسُفَ عَنْ سُفْيَانَ عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنْ أَبِي وَائِلٍ قَالَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 159

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْفُتْيَا وَمَا فِيهِ مِنَ الشِّدَّةِ
chapter.englishTitle: Al-Futya and Its Intensity

englishRaw: The Prophet ﷺ said, "The bravest among you in battle is the bravest among you in facing the Fire."   – Weak, Problematic
body: The Prophet ﷺ said, "The bravest among you in battle is the bravest among you in facing the Fire."   – Weak, Problematic
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «أَجْرَؤُكُمْ عَلَى الْفُتْيَا أَجْرَؤُكُمْ عَلَى النَّارِ»   – ضعيف معضل
chain: Ibrāhīm b. Mūsá \u003e Ibn al-Mubārak \u003e Saʿīd b. Abū Ayyūb \u003e ʿUbaydullāh b. Abū Jaʿfar
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ مُوسَى حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ الْمُبَارَكِ عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنُ أَبِي أَيُّوبَ عَنْ عُبَيْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 160

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْفُتْيَا وَمَا فِيهِ مِنَ الشِّدَّةِ
chapter.englishTitle: Al-Futya and Its Intensity

englishRaw: "Whoever introduces a new opinion that is not in accordance with the Book of Allah and does not have the guidance of the Sunnah of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, then he has not perceived what he is from when he meets Allah, the Almighty and Majestic."   – Sound Chain
body: "Whoever introduces a new opinion that is not in accordance with the Book of Allah and does not have the guidance of the Sunnah of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, then he has not perceived what he is from when he meets Allah, the Almighty and Majestic."   – Sound Chain
arabic: مَنْ أَحْدَثَ رَأْيًا لَيْسَ فِي كِتَابِ اللَّهِ وَلَمْ تَمْضِ بِهِ سُنَّةٌ مَنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ لَمْ يَدْرِ عَلَى مَا هُوَ مِنْهُ إِذَا لَقِيَ اللَّهَ ﷻ   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Abū al-Mughīrah \u003e al-Awzāʿī \u003e ʿAbdah b. Abū Lubābah \u003e Ibn ʿAbbās
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو الْمُغِيرَةِ حَدَّثَنَا الْأَوْزَاعِيُّ عَنْ عَبْدَةَ بْنِ أَبِي لُبَابَةَ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 161

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْفُتْيَا وَمَا فِيهِ مِنَ الشِّدَّةِ
chapter.englishTitle: Al-Futya and Its Intensity

englishRaw: From him, from the Prophet ﷺ : "Whoever is given a fatwa (religious ruling) by someone who is not firm (knowledgeable/qualified), then indeed his sin is upon the one who gave him the fatwa."   – Good Chain
body: From him, from the Prophet ﷺ : "Whoever is given a fatwa (religious ruling) by someone who is not firm (knowledgeable/qualified), then indeed his sin is upon the one who gave him the fatwa."   – Good Chain
arabic: عنه عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ «مَنْ أُفْتِيَ بِفُتْيَا مَنْ غَيْرِ ثَبْتٍ فَإِنَّمَا إِثْمُهُ عَلَى مِنْ أَفْتَاهُ»   – إسناده حسن
chain: ʿAbdullāh b. Yazīd \u003e Saʿīd b. Abū Ayyūb \u003e Bakr b. ʿAmr al-Maʿāfirī \u003e Abū ʿUthmān Muslim b. Yasār \u003e Abū Hurayrah Rḍy Allāh ʿNh
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ يَزِيدَ حَدَّثَنَا سَعِيدُ بْنُ أَبِي أَيُّوبَ حَدَّثَنِي بَكْرُ بْنُ عَمْرٍو الْمَعَافِرِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي عُثْمَانَ مُسْلِمِ بْنُ يَسَارٍ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ رضي الله

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 162

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْفُتْيَا وَمَا فِيهِ مِنَ الشِّدَّةِ
chapter.englishTitle: Al-Futya and Its Intensity

englishRaw: "Her sin is upon him."   – Sound Chain
body: "Her sin is upon him."   – Sound Chain
arabic: عنهَا فَإِثْمُهَا عَلَيْهِ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Muḥammad b. Aḥmad \u003e Sufyān b. ʿUyaynah \u003e Abū Sinān \u003e Saʿīd b. Jubayr \u003e Ibn ʿAbbās Rḍy Allāh ʿNh
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ بْنُ عُيَيْنَةَ عَنْ أَبِي سِنَانٍ عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنُ جُبَيْرٍ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ ؓ قَالَ «مَنْ أَفْتَى بِفُتْيَا يُعَمَّى

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 163

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْفُتْيَا وَمَا فِيهِ مِنَ الشِّدَّةِ
chapter.englishTitle: Al-Futya and Its Intensity

englishRaw: Abu Bakr, when faced with an opponent, would look into the book of Allah. If he found in it something that would settle the matter between them, he would judge by it. And if it was not mentioned in the book, but he knew about it from the messenger of Allah ﷺ , he would judge by his knowledge. If it made him tired, he would come out and ask the Muslims, saying, "So and so has come to me with such and such matter. Did you know that the messenger of Allah ﷺ judged in it by a certain judgment?" Perhaps a group of people would gather to him, all of them mentioning a judgment from the messenger of Allah ﷺ regarding it. And Abu Bakr would say, "Praise be to Allah who has placed among us someone who preserves the teachings of our prophet ﷺ ." And if he found in it a sunnah from the messenger of Allah ﷺ , he would gather the heads of the people and their best ones, and consult them. When their opinions came together on a matter, he would judge by it.
body: Abu Bakr, when faced with an opponent, would look into the book of Allah. If he found in it something that would settle the matter between them, he would judge by it. And if it was not mentioned in the book, but he knew about it from the messenger of Allah ﷺ , he would judge by his knowledge. If it made him tired, he would come out and ask the Muslims, saying, "So and so has come to me with such and such matter. Did you know that the messenger of Allah ﷺ judged in it by a certain judgment?" Perhaps a group of people would gather to him, all of them mentioning a judgment from the messenger of Allah ﷺ regarding it. And Abu Bakr would say, "Praise be to Allah who has placed among us someone who preserves the teachings of our prophet ﷺ ." And if he found in it a sunnah from the messenger of Allah ﷺ , he would gather the heads of the people and their best ones, and consult them. When their opinions came together on a matter, he would judge by it.
arabic: كَانَ أَبُو بَكْرٍ إِذَا وَرَدَ عَلَيْهِ الْخَصْمُ نَظَرَ فِي كِتَابِ اللَّهِ فَإِنْ وَجَدَ فِيهِ مَا يَقْضِي بَيْنَهُمْ قَضَى بِهِ وَإِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ فِي الْكِتَابِ وَعَلِمَ مِنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ فِي ذَلِكَ الْأَمْرِ سُنَّةً قَضَى بِهِ فَإِنْ أَعْيَاهُ خَرَجَ فَسَأَلَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ وَقَالَ «أَتَانِي كَذَا وَكَذَا فَهَلْ عَلِمْتُمْ أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ قَضَى فِي ذَلِكَ بِقَضَاءٍ؟» فَرُبَّمَا اجْتَمَعَ إِلَيْهِ النَّفَرُ كُلُّهُمْ يَذْكُرُ مِنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ فِيهِ قَضَاءً فَيَقُولُ أَبُو بَكْرٍ «الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي جَعَلَ فِينَا مَنْ يَحْفَظُ عَلَى نَبِيِّنَا» ﷺ فَإِنْ أَعْيَاهُ أَنْ يَجِدَ فِيهِ سُنَّةً مِنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ جَمَعَ رُءُوسَ النَّاسِ وَخِيَارَهُمْ فَاسْتَشَارَهُمْ فَإِذَا اجْتَمَعَ رَأْيُهُمْ عَلَى أَمْرٍ قَضَى بِهِ
chain: Muḥammad b. al-Ṣalt \u003e Zuhayr \u003e Jaʿfar b. Burqān \u003e Maymūn b. Mihrān
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الصَّلْتِ حَدَّثَنَا زُهَيْرٌ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ بُرْقَانَ حَدَّثَنَا مَيْمُونُ بْنُ مِهْرَانَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 164

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْفُتْيَا وَمَا فِيهِ مِنَ الشِّدَّةِ
chapter.englishTitle: Al-Futya and Its Intensity

englishRaw: "Do you have any information about the Prophet ﷺ ? He said, 'No.' He asked, 'What about Abu Bakr?' He said, 'No.' He asked, 'What about Umar?' He said, 'No.' He asked, 'What about Uthman?' He said, 'No.' Umar said, 'I don't see her fasting, so I left and found Tawus and Ata' ibn Abi Rabah, and I asked them. Tawus said, 'She only fasts if she decides to do it herself.' Ata' also said, 'That is my opinion.'   – Sound Chain
body: "Do you have any information about the Prophet ﷺ ? He said, 'No.' He asked, 'What about Abu Bakr?' He said, 'No.' He asked, 'What about Umar?' He said, 'No.' He asked, 'What about Uthman?' He said, 'No.' Umar said, 'I don't see her fasting, so I left and found Tawus and Ata' ibn Abi Rabah, and I asked them. Tawus said, 'She only fasts if she decides to do it herself.' Ata' also said, 'That is my opinion.'   – Sound Chain
arabic: أَعَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ؟ قَالَ لَا قَالَ فَعَنْ أَبِي بَكْرٍ؟ قَالَ لَا؟ قَالَ فَعَنْ عُمَرَ؟ قَالَ لَا قَالَ فَعَنْ عُثْمَانَ؟ قَالَ لَا قَالَ عُمَرُ مَا أَرَى عَلَيْهَا صِيَامًا فَخَرَجْتُ فَوَجَدْتُ طَاوُسًا وَعَطَاءَ بْنَ أَبِي رَبَاحٍ فَسَأَلْتُهُمَا فَقَالَ طَاوُسٌ كَانَ ابْنُ عَبَّاسٍ «لَا يَرَى عَلَيْهَا صِيَامًا إِلَّا أَنْ تَجْعَلَهُ عَلَى نَفْسِهَا» قَالَ وَقَالَ عَطَاءٌ ذَلِكَ رَأْيِي   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Ibrāhīm b. Mūsá And ʿAmrū b. Zurārah \u003e ʿAbd al-ʿAzīz b. Muḥammad \u003e Abū Suhayl
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ مُوسَى وَعَمْرُو بْنُ زُرَارَةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْعَزِيزِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِي سُهَيْلٍ قَالَ كَانَ عَلَى امْرَأَتِي اعْتِكَافُ ثَلَاثَةِ أَيَّامٍ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ الْحَرَامِ فَسَأَلْتُ عُمَرَ بْنَ عَبْدِ الْعَزِيزِ وَعِنْدَهُ ابْنُ شِهَابٍ قَالَ قُلْتُ عَلَيْهَا صِيَامٌ قَالَ ابْنُ شِهَابٍ لَا يَكُونُ اعْتِكَافٌ إِلَّا بِصِيَامٍ فَقَالَ لَهُ عُمَرُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْعَزِيزِ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 165

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْفُتْيَا وَمَا فِيهِ مِنَ الشِّدَّةِ
chapter.englishTitle: Al-Futya and Its Intensity

englishRaw: When Abu Salamah arrived in Basrah, both Hassan and I went to visit him. He said to Hassan, "Are you Hassan? No one in Basrah is dearer to me for a meeting than you. This is because I heard that you give fatwas based on your opinion, but do not give fatwas based on your opinion unless it is a Sunnah from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ or a revealed book."
body: When Abu Salamah arrived in Basrah, both Hassan and I went to visit him. He said to Hassan, "Are you Hassan? No one in Basrah is dearer to me for a meeting than you. This is because I heard that you give fatwas based on your opinion, but do not give fatwas based on your opinion unless it is a Sunnah from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ or a revealed book."
arabic: لَمَّا قَدِمَ أَبُو سَلَمَةَ الْبَصْرَةَ أَتَيْتُهُ أَنَا وَالْحَسَنُ فَقَالَ لِلْحَسَنِ أَنْتَ الْحَسَنُ؟ «مَا كَانَ أَحَدٌ بِالْبَصْرَةِ أَحَبَّ إِلَيَّ لِقَاءً مِنْكَ وَذَلِكَ أَنَّهُ بَلَغَنِي أَنَّكَ تُفْتِي بِرَأْيِكَ فَلَا تُفْتِ بِرَأْيِكَ إِلَّا أَنْ تَكُونَ سُنَّةٌ عَنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ أَوْ كِتَابٌ مُنْزَلٌ»
chain: Muslim b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Abū ʿAqīl \u003e Saʿīd al-Jurayrī \u003e Abū Naḍrah
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُسْلِمُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَقِيلٍ حَدَّثَنَا سَعِيدٌ الْجُرَيْرِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي نَضْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 166

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْفُتْيَا وَمَا فِيهِ مِنَ الشِّدَّةِ
chapter.englishTitle: Al-Futya and Its Intensity

englishRaw: He (said to him), "O Abu al-Sha'tha', indeed you are one of the knowledgeable people of Basra, so do not issue fatwas except with a clear Quranic verse or a established Sunnah, for if you do anything different from that, you will be ruined, and you will cause ruin."   – Good Chain
body: He (said to him), "O Abu al-Sha'tha', indeed you are one of the knowledgeable people of Basra, so do not issue fatwas except with a clear Quranic verse or a established Sunnah, for if you do anything different from that, you will be ruined, and you will cause ruin."   – Good Chain
arabic: لَهُ «يَا أَبَا الشَّعْثَاءِ إِنَّكَ مِنْ فُقَهَاءِ الْبَصْرَةِ فَلَا تُفْتِ إِلَّا بِقُرْآنٍ نَاطِقٍ أَوْ سُنَّةٍ مَاضِيَةٍ فَإِنَّكَ إِنْ فَعَلْتَ غَيْرَ ذَلِكَ هَلَكْتَ وَأَهْلَكْتَ»   – إسناده حسن
chain: ʿIṣmah b. al-Faḍl \u003e Zayd b. al-Ḥubāb \u003e Yazīd b. ʿUqbah \u003e al-Ḍaḥḥāk \u003e Jābir b. Zayd
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عِصْمَةُ بْنُ الْفَضْلِ حَدَّثَنَا زَيْدُ بْنُ الْحُبَابِ عَنْ يَزِيدَ بْنِ عُقْبَةَ حَدَّثَنَا الضَّحَّاكُ عَنْ جَابِرِ بْنِ زَيْدٍ أَنَّ ابْنَ عُمَرَ لَقِيَهُ فِي الطَّوَافِ فَقَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 167

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْفُتْيَا وَمَا فِيهِ مِنَ الشِّدَّةِ
chapter.englishTitle: Al-Futya and Its Intensity

englishRaw: "There was a time when we did not pass so many judgments, but now that time is over. Now Allah, the Mighty and Sublime, has decreed that we reach a time when, as you see, (we are asked to pass many judgments). Whoever among you is asked to pass a judgment after this day, let him pass judgment according to what is in the Book of Allah. If he is faced with a matter that is not mentioned in the Book of Allah, let him pass judgment according to the way His Prophet [SAW] passed judgment. If he is faced with a matter that is not mentioned in the Book of Allah, and concerning which His Prophet did not pass judgment, then let him pass judgment according to the way the righteous passed judgment. And let him not say 'I am afraid, I am afraid.' For that which is lawful is clear and that which is unlawful is clear, and between them are matters which are not as clear. Leave that which makes you doubt for that which does not make you doubt."
body: "There was a time when we did not pass so many judgments, but now that time is over. Now Allah, the Mighty and Sublime, has decreed that we reach a time when, as you see, (we are asked to pass many judgments). Whoever among you is asked to pass a judgment after this day, let him pass judgment according to what is in the Book of Allah. If he is faced with a matter that is not mentioned in the Book of Allah, let him pass judgment according to the way His Prophet [SAW] passed judgment. If he is faced with a matter that is not mentioned in the Book of Allah, and concerning which His Prophet did not pass judgment, then let him pass judgment according to the way the righteous passed judgment. And let him not say 'I am afraid, I am afraid.' For that which is lawful is clear and that which is unlawful is clear, and between them are matters which are not as clear. Leave that which makes you doubt for that which does not make you doubt."
arabic: أَتَى عَلَيْنَا زَمَانٌ لَسْنَا نَقْضِي وَلَسْنَا هُنَالِكَ وَإِنَّ اللَّهَ قَدْ قَدَّرَ مِنَ الْأَمْرِ أَنْ قَدْ بَلَغْنَا مَا تَرَوْنَ «فَمَنْ عَرَضَ لَهُ قَضَاءٌ بَعْدَ الْيَوْمِ فَلْيَقْضِ فِيهِ بِمَا فِي كِتَابِ اللَّهِ ﷻ فَإِنْ جَاءَهُ مَا لَيْسَ فِي كِتَابِ اللَّهِ فَلْيَقْضِ بِمَا قَضَى بِهِ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ فَإِنْ جَاءَهُ مَا لَيْسَ فِي كِتَابِ اللَّهِ وَلَمْ يَقْضِ بِهِ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ فَلْيَقْضِ بِمَا قَضَى بِهِ الصَّالِحُونَ وَلَا يَقُلْ إِنِّي أَخَافُ وَإِنِّي أُرَى فَإِنَّ الْحَرَامَ بَيِّنٌ وَالْحَلَالَ بَيِّنٌ وَبَيْنَ ذَلِكَ أُمُورٌ مُشْتَبِهَةٌ فَدَعْ مَا يَرِيبُكَ إِلَى مَا لَا يَرِيبُكَ»
chain: Muḥammad b. Yūsuf \u003e Sufyān \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e ʿUmārah b. ʿUmayr \u003e Ḥurayth b. Ẓuhayr \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Masʿūd \u003e Atá ʿAlaynā Zamān Lasnā Naqḍī And Lasnā Hunālik Waʾin Allāh Qad Qaddar from al-Amr
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يُوسُفَ عَنْ سُفْيَانَ عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنْ عُمَارَةَ بْنِ عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ حُرَيْثِ بْنِ ظُهَيْرٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مَسْعُودٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 168

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْفُتْيَا وَمَا فِيهِ مِنَ الشِّدَّةِ
chapter.englishTitle: Al-Futya and Its Intensity

englishRaw: Regarding this matter, if it is mentioned in the Quran, then it is true. And if it is not mentioned in the Quran, but the Messenger of Allah ﷺ has mentioned it, then it is also true. And if it is not mentioned by the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, then it is conveyed from Abu Bakr and Umar. And if it is not mentioned by them, then it is his personal opinion.   – Sound Chain
body: Regarding this matter, if it is mentioned in the Quran, then it is true. And if it is not mentioned in the Quran, but the Messenger of Allah ﷺ has mentioned it, then it is also true. And if it is not mentioned by the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, then it is conveyed from Abu Bakr and Umar. And if it is not mentioned by them, then it is his personal opinion.   – Sound Chain
arabic: عَنِ الْأَمْرِ فَكَانَ فِي الْقُرْآنِ أَخْبَرَ بِهِ وَإِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ فِي الْقُرْآنِ وَكَانَ عَنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ أَخْبَرَ بِهِ فَإِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ فَعَنْ أَبِي بَكْرٍ وَعُمَرَ فَإِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ قَالَ فِيهِ بِرَأْيِهِ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: ʿAbdullāh b. Muḥammad \u003e Ibn ʿUyaynah \u003e ʿUbaydullāh b. Abū Yazīd
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ عُيَيْنَةَ عَنْ عُبَيْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ أَبِي يَزِيدَ قَالَ كَانَ ابْنُ عَبَّاسٍ «إِذَا سُئِلَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 169

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْفُتْيَا وَمَا فِيهِ مِنَ الشِّدَّةِ
chapter.englishTitle: Al-Futya and Its Intensity

englishRaw: Regarding him (the Prophet), if something comes to you that is not in the Book of Allah, then refer to the Sunnah of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and follow it. If something comes to you that is not in the Book of Allah and there is no Sunnah from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ regarding it, then look at what the people have agreed upon and follow it. However, if something comes to you that is not in the Book of Allah and there is no Sunnah of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about it, and no one before you has spoken about it, then choose whichever of the two options you wish: if you wish, you may exert your own effort and come to a conclusion, and proceed accordingly. If you wish, you may delay making a decision. And I do not see any delay in taking a decision except that it is better for you.   – Fair Chain
body: Regarding him (the Prophet), if something comes to you that is not in the Book of Allah, then refer to the Sunnah of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and follow it. If something comes to you that is not in the Book of Allah and there is no Sunnah from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ regarding it, then look at what the people have agreed upon and follow it. However, if something comes to you that is not in the Book of Allah and there is no Sunnah of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about it, and no one before you has spoken about it, then choose whichever of the two options you wish: if you wish, you may exert your own effort and come to a conclusion, and proceed accordingly. If you wish, you may delay making a decision. And I do not see any delay in taking a decision except that it is better for you.   – Fair Chain
arabic: عَنْهُ الرِّجَالُ فَإِنْ جَاءَكَ مَا لَيْسَ فِي كِتَابِ اللَّهِ فَانْظُرْ سُنَّةَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ فَاقْضِ بِهَا فَإِنْ جَاءَكَ مَا لَيْسَ فِي كِتَابِ اللَّهِ وَلَمْ يَكُنْ فِيهِ سُنَّةٌ مِنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ فَانْظُرْ مَا اجْتَمَعَ عَلَيْهِ النَّاسُ فَخُذْ بِهِ فَإِنْ جَاءَكَ مَا لَيْسَ فِي كِتَابِ اللَّهِ وَلَمْ يَكُنْ فِي سُنَّةِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ وَلَمْ يَتَكَلَّمْ فِيهِ أَحَدٌ قَبْلَكَ فَاخْتَرْ أَيَّ الْأَمْرَيْنِ شِئْتَ إِنْ شِئْتَ أَنْ تَجْتَهِدَ برأْيكَ ثُمَّ تَقَدَّمَ فَتَقَدَّمْ وَإِنْ شِئْتَ أَنْ تتأخَّرَ فَتَأَخَّرْ وَلَا أَرَى التَّأَخُّرَ إِلَّا خَيْرًا لَكَ   – إسناده جيد
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿUyaynah \u003e ʿAlī b. Mushir \u003e Abū Isḥāq \u003e al-Shaʿbī \u003e Shurayḥ
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عُيَيْنَةَ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُسْهِرٍ عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ عَنِ الشَّعْبِيِّ عَنْ شُرَيْحٍ أَنَّ عُمَرَ بْنَ الْخَطَّابِ كَتَبَ إِلَيْهِ إِنْ جَاءَكَ شَيْءٌ فِي كِتَابِ اللَّهِ فَاقْضِ بِهِ وَلَا تَلْفِتْكَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 170

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْفُتْيَا وَمَا فِيهِ مِنَ الشِّدَّةِ
chapter.englishTitle: Al-Futya and Its Intensity

englishRaw: From some people of the people of Hims, from the companions of Mu'adh, from Mu'adh, the Prophet ﷺ, when he sent him to Yemen, asked: "What would you do if you were faced with a legal matter?" He said, "I would judge according to the Book of Allah." The Prophet ﷺ said, "And if it is not in the Book of Allah?" He said, "Then I would judge according to the Sunnah of the Messenger of Allah." The Prophet ﷺ said, "And if it is not in the Sunnah of the Messenger of Allah?" He said, "I would strive to come to a conclusion based on my own reasoning." The Prophet ﷺ said, "Then you have done your best and Allah will reward the Messenger of the Messenger of Allah for what pleases the Messenger of Allah."   – Weak Chain
body: From some people of the people of Hims, from the companions of Mu'adh, from Mu'adh, the Prophet ﷺ, when he sent him to Yemen, asked: "What would you do if you were faced with a legal matter?" He said, "I would judge according to the Book of Allah." The Prophet ﷺ said, "And if it is not in the Book of Allah?" He said, "Then I would judge according to the Sunnah of the Messenger of Allah." The Prophet ﷺ said, "And if it is not in the Sunnah of the Messenger of Allah?" He said, "I would strive to come to a conclusion based on my own reasoning." The Prophet ﷺ said, "Then you have done your best and Allah will reward the Messenger of the Messenger of Allah for what pleases the Messenger of Allah."   – Weak Chain
arabic: عَنْ نَاسٍ مِنْ أَهْلِ حِمْصٍ مِنْ أَصْحَابِ مُعَاذٍ عَنْ مُعَاذٍ أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ لَمَّا بَعَثَهُ إِلَى الْيَمَنِ قَالَ أَرَأَيْتَ إِنْ عَرَضَ لَكَ قَضَاءٌ كَيْفَ تَقْضِي؟ قَالَ أَقْضِي بِكِتَابِ اللَّهِ قَالَ «فَإِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ فِي كِتَابِ اللَّهِ؟» قَالَ فَبِسُنَّةِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ قَالَ فَإِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ فِي سُنَّةِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ؟ قَالَ أَجْتَهِدُ رَأْيِي وَلَا آلُو قَالَ فَضَرَبَ صَدْرَهُ ثُمَّ قَالَ «الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي وَفَّقَ رَسُولَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ لِمَا يُرْضِي رَسُولَ اللَّهِ»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Yaḥyá b. Ḥammād \u003e Shuʿbah
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ حَمَّادٍ حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عُبَيْدِ اللَّهِ الثَّقَفِيِّ عَنِ الْحَارِثِ بْنِ عَمْرِو ابْنِ أَخِي الْمُغِيرَةِ بْنِ شُعْبَةَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 171

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْفُتْيَا وَمَا فِيهِ مِنَ الشِّدَّةِ
chapter.englishTitle: Al-Futya and Its Intensity

englishRaw: A time has come upon us, and we are not asked, nor are we there. Indeed, Allah has ordained that I have conveyed what you see. So, if you are asked about something, refer to the Book of Allah. If you do not find it in the Book of Allah, then refer to the Sunnah of the Messenger of Allah. If you do not find it in the Sunnah of the Messenger of Allah, then base your judgment on what the Muslims have unanimously agreed upon. If it is not found in what the Muslims have agreed upon, then exert your effort and do not say, "I am afraid and I fear." Indeed, that which is halal (permissible) is clear, and that which is haram (forbidden) is clear. Between the two are doubtful matters. Leave that which makes you doubt for that which does not make you doubt.
body: A time has come upon us, and we are not asked, nor are we there. Indeed, Allah has ordained that I have conveyed what you see. So, if you are asked about something, refer to the Book of Allah. If you do not find it in the Book of Allah, then refer to the Sunnah of the Messenger of Allah. If you do not find it in the Sunnah of the Messenger of Allah, then base your judgment on what the Muslims have unanimously agreed upon. If it is not found in what the Muslims have agreed upon, then exert your effort and do not say, "I am afraid and I fear." Indeed, that which is halal (permissible) is clear, and that which is haram (forbidden) is clear. Between the two are doubtful matters. Leave that which makes you doubt for that which does not make you doubt.
arabic: قَدْ أَتَى عَلَيْنَا زَمَانٌ وَمَا نُسْأَلُ وَمَا نَحْنُ هُنَاكَ وَإِنَّ اللَّهِ قَدَّرَ أَنْ بَلَغْتُ مَا تَرَوْنَ فَإِذَا سُئِلْتُمْ عَنْ شَيْءٍ فَانْظُرُوا فِي كِتَابِ اللَّهِ فَإِنْ لَمْ تَجِدُوهُ فِي كِتَابِ اللَّهِ ﷻ فَفِي سُنَّةِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ فَإِنْ لَمْ تَجِدُوهُ فِي سُنَّةِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ فَمَا أَجْمَعَ عَلَيْهِ الْمُسْلِمُونَ فَإِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ فِيمَا أَجْمَعَ عَلَيْهِ الْمُسْلِمُونَ فَاجْتَهِدْ رَأْيَكَ وَلَا تَقُلْ إِنِّي أَخَافُ وَأَخْشَى فَإِنَّ الْحَلَالَ بَيِّنٌ وَالْحَرَامَ بَيِّنٌ وَبَيْنَ ذَلِكَ أُمُورٌ مُشْتَبِهَةٌ فَدَعْ مَا يَرِيبُكَ إِلَى مَا لَا يَرِيبُكَ
chain: Yaḥyá b. Ḥammād \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e Sulaymān \u003e ʿUmārah b. ʿUmayr \u003e Ḥurayth b. Ẓuhayr \u003e Aḥsab \u003e ʿAbdullāh \u003e Qad Atá ʿAlaynā Zamān And Mā Nusʾal Wamā Naḥn Hunāk Waʾin Allāh Qaddar \u003e Balaght Mā Tarawn Faʾidhā Suʾiltum
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ حَمَّادٍ حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ عَنْ عُمَارَةَ بْنِ عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ حُرَيْثِ بْنِ ظُهَيْرٍ قَالَ أَحْسَبُ أَنَّ عَبْدَ اللَّهِ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 172

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْفُتْيَا وَمَا فِيهِ مِنَ الشِّدَّةِ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 173

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 174

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْفُتْيَا وَمَا فِيهِ مِنَ الشِّدَّةِ
chapter.englishTitle: Al-Futya and Its Intensity

englishRaw: Abdullah said, "O people, surely you will speak and you will be spoken to. So when you see something new, adhere to the original command." Hafs said, "I used to receive narration from Habib, who received it from Abu Abdur Rahman, then doubt entered my heart."   – Weak, Disconnected Chain
body: Abdullah said, "O people, surely you will speak and you will be spoken to. So when you see something new, adhere to the original command." Hafs said, "I used to receive narration from Habib, who received it from Abu Abdur Rahman, then doubt entered my heart."   – Weak, Disconnected Chain
arabic: عَبْدُ اللَّهِ «أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنَّكُمْ سَتُحْدِثُونَ وَيُحْدَثُ لَكُمْ فَإِذَا رَأَيْتُمْ مُحْدَثَةً فَعَلَيْكُمْ بِالْأَمْرِ الْأَوَّلِ» قَالَ حَفْصٌ كُنْتُ أُسْنِدُ عَنْ حَبِيبٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ ثُمَّ دَخَلَنِي مِنْهُ شَكٌّ   – ضعيف منقطع
chain: Hārūn b. Muʿāwiyah \u003e Ḥafṣ b. Ghiyāth \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e ʿAbdullāh Ayyuhā al-Nās Innakum Satuḥdithūn And Yuḥdath Lakum Faʾidhā Raʾaytum Muḥdathah Faʿalaykum Bi-al-Amr al-Awwal
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا هَارُونُ بْنُ مُعَاوِيَةَ عَنْ حَفْصِ بْنِ غِيَاثٍ حَدَّثَنَا الْأَعْمَشُ قَالَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 175

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْفُتْيَا وَمَا فِيهِ مِنَ الشِّدَّةِ
chapter.englishTitle: Al-Futya and Its Intensity

englishRaw: Omar said to Ibn Mas'ud, "Did I not inform or was I not informed that you give fatwas even though you are not a ruler? Beware of who you appoint as a ruler."
body: Omar said to Ibn Mas'ud, "Did I not inform or was I not informed that you give fatwas even though you are not a ruler? Beware of who you appoint as a ruler."
arabic: عُمَرُ لِابْنِ مَسْعُودٍ «أَلَمْ أُنْبَأْ أَوْ أُنْبِئْتُ أَنَّكَ تُفْتِي وَلَسْتَ بِأَمِيرٍ؟ وَلِّ حَارَّهَا مَنْ تَوَلَّى قَارَّهَا»
chain: Muḥammad b. al-Ṣalt \u003e Ibn al-Mubārak \u003e Ibn ʿAwn \u003e Muḥammad \u003e ʿUmar Liāb. Masʿūd Alam
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الصَّلْتِ حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ الْمُبَارَكِ عَنِ ابْنِ عَوْنٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدٍ قَالَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 176

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Section 21

englishRaw: "The one who gives fatwas to people in all matters that are asked is insane."   – Sound Chain
body: "The one who gives fatwas to people in all matters that are asked is insane."   – Sound Chain
arabic: «إِنَّ الَّذِي يُفْتِي النَّاسَ فِي كُلِّ مَا يُسْتَفْتَى لَمَجْنُونٌ»   – إسناده صحيح

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 177

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Section 21

englishRaw: Only three types of people can issue religious judgements: an Imam (religious leader), a judge, or a person who knows abrogated verses of the Quran from the abrogating ones. The people asked Hudhayfah, "Who is he?" He replied, "Umar ibn Al-Khattab or someone foolish who pretends to be knowledgeable."   – Weak Chain
body: Only three types of people can issue religious judgements: an Imam (religious leader), a judge, or a person who knows abrogated verses of the Quran from the abrogating ones. The people asked Hudhayfah, "Who is he?" He replied, "Umar ibn Al-Khattab or someone foolish who pretends to be knowledgeable."   – Weak Chain
arabic: إِنَّمَا يُفْتِي النَّاسَ ثَلَاثَةٌ رَجُلٌ إِمَامٌ أَوْ وَالٍ وَرَجُلٌ يَعْلَمُ نَاسِخَ الْقُرْآنِ مِنَ الْمَنْسُوخِ قَالُوا يَا حُذَيْفَةُ مِنْ ذَاكَ؟ قَالَ عُمَرُ بْنُ الْخَطَّابِ أَوْ أَحْمَقُ مُتَكَلِّفٌ   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Saʿīd b. ʿĀmir \u003e Hishām \u003e Muḥammad \u003e Ḥudhayfah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا سَعِيدُ بْنُ عَامِرٍ عَنْ هِشَامٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ حُذَيْفَةَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 178

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Section 21

englishRaw: Hudhaifah, one of three people, is the one who issues fatwas (religious rulings) regarding the abrogated and abrogating verses of the Qur'an. They asked, "Who is that?" 'Umar ibn al-Khattab replied, "It is a knowledgeable person who understands the abrogated and abrogating verses," and he added, "And a ruler who finds no alternative or foolish person who pretends to be knowledgeable." Then Muhammad ﷺ said, "I am not one of these two, and I hope not to be the third."
body: Hudhaifah, one of three people, is the one who issues fatwas (religious rulings) regarding the abrogated and abrogating verses of the Qur'an. They asked, "Who is that?" 'Umar ibn al-Khattab replied, "It is a knowledgeable person who understands the abrogated and abrogating verses," and he added, "And a ruler who finds no alternative or foolish person who pretends to be knowledgeable." Then Muhammad ﷺ said, "I am not one of these two, and I hope not to be the third."
arabic: حُذَيْفَةُ إِنَّمَا يُفْتِي النَّاسَ أَحَدُ ثَلَاثَةٍ رَجُلٌ عَلِمَ نَاسِخَ الْقُرْآنِ مِنْ مَنْسُوخِهِ قَالُوا وَمَنْ ذَاكَ؟ قَالَ عُمَرُ بْنُ الْخَطَّابِ قَالَ «وَأَمِيرٌ لَا يَجِدُ بُدًّا أَوْ أَحْمَقُ مُتَكَلِّفٌ» ثُمَّ قَالَ مُحَمَّدٌ فَلَسْتُ بِوَاحِدٍ مِنْ هَذَيْنِ وَأَرْجُو أَنْ لَا أَكُونَ الثَّالِثَ
chain: ʿAbdullāh b. Saʿīd \u003e Abū Usāmah \u003e Hishām b. Ḥassān \u003e Muḥammad \u003e Abū ʿUbaydah b. Ḥudhayfah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ أَنبَأَنَا أَبُو أُسَامَةَ عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ حَسَّانَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِي عُبَيْدَةَ بْنِ حُذَيْفَةَ قَالَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 179

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Section 21

englishRaw: "Whoever among you possesses knowledge, let them spread it, and whoever does not possess knowledge, let them say, 'I do not know, Allah knows best.' Indeed, when a learned person is asked about something they do not know, they will say, 'Allah knows best.' And Allah has said to his Messenger, 'Say, I do not ask you for any reward for this [Quran], nor am I a pretentious person.'" [Surah Al-An'am, 86]   – Sound
body: "Whoever among you possesses knowledge, let them spread it, and whoever does not possess knowledge, let them say, 'I do not know, Allah knows best.' Indeed, when a learned person is asked about something they do not know, they will say, 'Allah knows best.' And Allah has said to his Messenger, 'Say, I do not ask you for any reward for this [Quran], nor am I a pretentious person.'" [Surah Al-An'am, 86]   – Sound
arabic: مَنْ عَلِمَ مِنْكُمْ عِلْمًا فَلْيَقُلْ بِهِ وَمَنْ لَمْ يَعْلَمْ فَلْيَقُلْ لِمَا لَا يَعْلَمُ اللَّهُ أَعْلَمُ فَإِنَّ الْعَالِمَ إِذَا سُئِلَ عَمَّا لَا يَعْلَمُ قَالَ اللَّهُ ﷻ أَعْلَمُ وَقَدْ قَالَ اللَّهُ لِرَسُولِهِ {قُلْ مَا أَسْأَلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ وَمَا أَنَا مِنَ الْمُتَكَلِّفِينَ} [ص 86]   – صحيح
chain: Jaʿfar b. ʿAwn \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e Muslim \u003e Masrūq \u003e ʿAbdullāh
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا جَعْفَرُ بْنُ عَوْنٍ عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنْ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ مَسْرُوقٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 180

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Section 21

englishRaw: "In his sermon, he said: 'Whoever has knowledge should teach it to the people and himself, and should not speak about something he has no knowledge of, so as not to pass by the religion and be among the pretentious.'"
body: "In his sermon, he said: 'Whoever has knowledge should teach it to the people and himself, and should not speak about something he has no knowledge of, so as not to pass by the religion and be among the pretentious.'"
arabic: فِي خُطْبَتِهِ «مَنْ عَلِمَ عِلْمًا فَلْيُعَلِّمْهُ النَّاسَ وَإِيَّاهُ أَنْ يَقُولَ مَا لَا عِلْمَ لَهُ بِهِ فَيَمْرُقُ مِنَ الدِّينِ وَيَكُونَ مِنَ الْمُتَكَلِّفِينَ»
chain: Yazīd b. Hārūn \u003e Ḥumayd \u003e Abū Rajāʾ \u003e Abū al-Muhallab \u003e Abū Mūsá
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا يَزِيدُ بْنُ هَارُونَ حَدَّثَنَا حُمَيْدٌ عَنْ أَبِي رَجَاءٍ عَنْ أَبِي الْمُهَلَّبِ أَنَّ أَبَا مُوسَى قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 181

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Section 21

englishRaw: "May the blessings of Allah be upon him and may He cool their liver when I am asked about what I do not know and do not know what to say, Allah knows best."   – Weak Chain
body: "May the blessings of Allah be upon him and may He cool their liver when I am asked about what I do not know and do not know what to say, Allah knows best."   – Weak Chain
arabic: عَلِيٌّ رِضْوَانُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ وَا بَرْدَهَا عَلَى الْكَبِدِ إِذَا سُئِلْتُ عَمَّا لَا أَعْلَمُ أَنْ أَقُولَ اللَّهُ أَعْلَمُ   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: ʿAmr b. ʿAwn \u003e Khālid b. ʿAbdullāh \u003e ʿAṭāʾ b. al-Sāʾib \u003e Abū al-Bakhtarī And Zādhān
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ عَوْنٍ عَنْ خَالِدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ عَطَاءِ بْنِ السَّائِبِ عَنْ أَبِي الْبَخْتَرِيِّ وَزَاذَانَ قَالَا قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 182

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Section 21

englishRaw: It is a sign of having knowledge that, when you do not know something, you say: 'Allah knows better.' Allah said to his Prophet: 'Say: No wage do I ask of you for this (Qur'an), nor am I one of the pretenders (a person who pretends things which do not exist)' (38.86) When the Quraish troubled and stood against the Prophet ﷺ he said, "O Allah! Help me against them by afflicting them with seven years of famine like the seven years of Joseph." So they were stricken with a year of famine during which they ate bones and dead animals because of too much suffering, and one of them would see something like smoke between him and the sky because of hunger. Then they said: Our Lord! Remove the torment from us, really we are believers. (44.12) And then it was said to the Prophet (by Allah), "If we remove it from them. they will revert to their ways (of heathenism)." So the Prophet ﷺ invoked his Lord, who removed the punishment from them, but later they reverted (to heathenism), whereupon Allah punished them on the day of the Battle of Badr, and that is what Allah's Statement indicates: 'Then watch for the day that the sky will bring forth a kind of smoke plainly visible...we will indeed (then) exact retribution.' (44.10).    – Weak Chain
body: It is a sign of having knowledge that, when you do not know something, you say: 'Allah knows better.' Allah said to his Prophet: 'Say: No wage do I ask of you for this (Qur'an), nor am I one of the pretenders (a person who pretends things which do not exist)' (38.86) When the Quraish troubled and stood against the Prophet ﷺ he said, "O Allah! Help me against them by afflicting them with seven years of famine like the seven years of Joseph." So they were stricken with a year of famine during which they ate bones and dead animals because of too much suffering, and one of them would see something like smoke between him and the sky because of hunger. Then they said: Our Lord! Remove the torment from us, really we are believers. (44.12) And then it was said to the Prophet (by Allah), "If we remove it from them. they will revert to their ways (of heathenism)." So the Prophet ﷺ invoked his Lord, who removed the punishment from them, but later they reverted (to heathenism), whereupon Allah punished them on the day of the Battle of Badr, and that is what Allah's Statement indicates: 'Then watch for the day that the sky will bring forth a kind of smoke plainly visible...we will indeed (then) exact retribution.' (44.10).    – Weak Chain
arabic: أَنْ تَقُولَ لِمَا لَا تَعْلَمُ اللَّهُ أَعْلَمُ   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Abū Nuʿaym \u003e Sharīk \u003e ʿAṭāʾ b. al-Sāʾib \u003e Abū al-Bakhtarī \u003e ʿAlī Riḍwān Allāh ʿAlayh \u003e Yā Bardahā \u003e al-Kabid
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو نُعَيْمٍ حَدَّثَنَا شَرِيكٌ عَنْ عَطَاءِ بْنِ السَّائِبِ عَنْ أَبِي الْبَخْتَرِيِّ عَنْ عَلِيٍّ رِضْوَانُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ قَالَ يَا بَرْدَهَا عَلَى الْكَبِدِ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 183

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Section 21

englishRaw: "If you are asked about something you do not know, then flee." He said, "But how do we flee, O Commander of the Faithful?" He said, "You say Allah knows best."
body: "If you are asked about something you do not know, then flee." He said, "But how do we flee, O Commander of the Faithful?" He said, "You say Allah knows best."
arabic: «إِذَا سُئِلْتُمْ عَمَّا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ فَاهْرُبُوا» قَالَ وَكَيْفَ الْهَرَبُ يَا أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ؟ قَالَ تَقُولُونَ اللَّهُ أَعْلَمُ
chain: Muḥammad b. Yūsuf \u003e ʿUmayr b. ʿArfajah \u003e Razīn Abū al-Nuʿmān \u003e ʿAlī b. Abū Ṭālib \u003e Idhā Suʾiltum ʿAmmā Lā Taʿlamūn Fāhrubūā \u003e And Kayf al-Harab Yā Amīr al-Muʾminīn
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يُوسُفَ حَدَّثَنَا عُمَيْرُ بْنُ عَرْفَجَةَ حَدَّثَنَا رَزِينٌ أَبُو النُّعْمَانِ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 184

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Section 21

englishRaw: Ali placed it on the liver three times. They asked, "What does that mean, O Prince of the Believers?" He said, "It means that a person should not be asked about something they do not know, and they should say, 'Allah knows best.'"
body: Ali placed it on the liver three times. They asked, "What does that mean, O Prince of the Believers?" He said, "It means that a person should not be asked about something they do not know, and they should say, 'Allah knows best.'"
arabic: عَلِيٌّ وَا بَرْدَهَا عَلَى الْكَبِدِ ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ قَالُوا وَمَا ذَلِكَ يَا أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ؟ قَالَ أَنْ يُسْأَلَ الرَّجُلُ عَمَّا لَا يَعْلَمُ فَيَقُولُ اللَّهُ أَعْلَمُ
chain: Muḥammad b. Ḥumayd \u003e Jarīr \u003e Manṣūr \u003e Muslim al-Baṭīn \u003e ʿAzrah al-Tamīmī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ حُمَيْدٍ حَدَّثَنَا جَرِيرٌ عَنْ مَنْصُورٍ عَنْ مُسْلِمٍ الْبَطِينِ عَنْ عَزْرَةَ التَّمِيمِيِّ قَالَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 185

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Section 21

englishRaw: "I have no knowledge of it. So, when the man turned away, Ibn Umar said, 'Yes, that's what Ibn Umar said when he was asked about something he didn't know. He would say, 'I have no knowledge of it.'"   – Sound Chain
body: "I have no knowledge of it. So, when the man turned away, Ibn Umar said, 'Yes, that's what Ibn Umar said when he was asked about something he didn't know. He would say, 'I have no knowledge of it.'"   – Sound Chain
arabic: لَا عِلْمَ لِي بِهَا فَلَمَّا أَدْبَرَ الرَّجُلُ قَالَ ابْنُ عُمَرَ نِعْمَ مَا قَالَ ابْنُ عُمَرَ سُئِلَ عَمَّا لَا يَعْلَمُ فَقَالَ لَا عِلْمَ لِي بِهِ   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Farwah b. Abū al-Maghrāʾ \u003e ʿAlī b. Mushir \u003e Hishām b. ʿUrwah from his father \u003e Ibn ʿUmar \u003e a man Saʾalah \u003e Masʾalah \u003e Lā ʿIlm Lī Bihā Falammā Adbar al-a man \u003e Ibn ʿUmar Niʿm Mā \u003e Ibn ʿUmar Suʾil ʿAmmā Lā Yaʿlam
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا فَرْوَةُ بْنُ أَبِي الْمَغْرَاءِ حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ مُسْهِرٍ عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ عُمَرَ أَنَّ رَجُلًا سَأَلَهُ عَنْ مَسْأَلَةٍ فَقَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 186

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Section 21

englishRaw: "I do not know half of knowledge."   – Sound Chain
body: "I do not know half of knowledge."   – Sound Chain
arabic: «لَا أَدْرِي نِصْفُ الْعِلْمِ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Yaḥyá b. Ḥammād \u003e Abū ʿAwānah \u003e Mughīrah \u003e al-Shaʿbī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ حَمَّادٍ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَوَانَةَ عَنْ مُغِيرَةَ عَنِ الشَّعْبِيِّ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 187

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Section 21

englishRaw: "No knowledge for me, then the man turned around after the man stopped and said, 'Yes, what Ibn Umar said is true. He asks about what he does not know,' and he said, 'No knowledge for me,' meaning Ibn Umar himself."   – Good Chain
body: "No knowledge for me, then the man turned around after the man stopped and said, 'Yes, what Ibn Umar said is true. He asks about what he does not know,' and he said, 'No knowledge for me,' meaning Ibn Umar himself."   – Good Chain
arabic: لَا عِلْمَ لِي ثُمَّ الْتَفَتَ بَعْدَ أَنْ قَفَّى الرَّجُلُ فَقَالَ نِعْمَ مَا قَالَ ابْنُ عُمَرَ يسُألَ عَمَّا لَا يَعْلَمُ فَقَالَ لَا عِلْمَ لِي يَعْنِي ابْنُ عُمَرَ نَفْسَهُ   – إسناده حسن
chain: ʿAbdullāh b. Maslamah \u003e ʿAbdullāh al-ʿUmarī \u003e Nāfiʿ \u003e a man Atá Ibn ʿUmar Yasʾaluh \u003e Shayʾ \u003e Lā ʿIlm Lī Thum al-Tafat Baʿd \u003e Qaffá al-a man \u003e Niʿm Mā \u003e Ibn ʿUmar Ysuʾl ʿAmmā Lā Yaʿlam
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مَسْلَمَةَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ الْعُمَرِيُّ عَنْ نَافِعٍ أَنَّ رَجُلًا أَتَى ابْنَ عُمَرَ يَسْأَلُهُ عَنْ شَيْءٍ فَقَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 188

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Section 21

englishRaw: About something he says, "I don't know." If they respond to him, he says, "I swear to you by Allah, if I had knowledge of it."   – Weak Chain
body: About something he says, "I don't know." If they respond to him, he says, "I swear to you by Allah, if I had knowledge of it."   – Weak Chain
arabic: عَنْ شَيْءٍ يَقُولُ لَا أَدْرِي فَإِنْ رُدُّوا عَلَيْهِ قَالَ إِنْي حَلَفْتُ لَكَ بِاللَّهِ إِنْ كَانَ لِي بِهِ عِلْمٌ   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Muḥammad b. Ḥumayd \u003e Jarīr \u003e Mughīrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ حُمَيْدٍ ثَنَا جَرِيرٌ عَنْ مُغِيرَةَ قَالَ كَانَ عَامِرٌ إِذَا سُئِلَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 189

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Section 21

englishRaw: I do not mind being asked about what I know or do not know, because when I am asked about what I know, I say what I know, and when I am asked about what I do not know, I say I do not know.   – Sound Chain
body: I do not mind being asked about what I know or do not know, because when I am asked about what I know, I say what I know, and when I am asked about what I do not know, I say I do not know.   – Sound Chain
arabic: مَا أُبَالِي سُئِلْتُ عَمَّا أَعْلَمُ أَوْ مَا لَا أَعْلَمُ لِأَنِّي إِذَا سُئِلْتُ عَمَّا أَعْلَمُ قُلْتُ مَا أَعْلَمُ وَإِذَا سُئِلْتُ عَمَّا لَا أَعْلَمُ قُلْتُ لَا أَعْلَمُ   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Hārūn b. Muʿāwiyah \u003e Ḥafṣ \u003e Ashʿath \u003e Ibn Sīrīn
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا هَارُونُ بْنُ مُعَاوِيَةَ عَنْ حَفْصٍ عَنْ أَشْعَثَ عَنِ ابْنِ سِيرِينَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 190

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ
chapter.englishTitle: Section 21

englishRaw: I heard Ibrahim saying, "A cat is neither halal (permissible) nor haram (forbidden). He only used to say, 'They (the companions) used to dislike it while they used to prefer (keeping other animals).'"   – Sound Chain
body: I heard Ibrahim saying, "A cat is neither halal (permissible) nor haram (forbidden). He only used to say, 'They (the companions) used to dislike it while they used to prefer (keeping other animals).'"   – Sound Chain
arabic: سَمِعْتُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ يَقُولُ قَطُّ حَلَالٌ وَلَا حَرَامٌ إِنَّمَا كَانَ يَقُولُ «كَانُوا يتكْرهونَ وَكَانُوا يَسْتَحِبُّونَ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Hārūn \u003e Ḥafṣ \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e Mā \u003e Ibrāhīm
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا هَارُونُ عَنْ حَفْصٍ عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ قَالَ مَا

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 191

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ تَغَيُّرِ الزَّمَانِ وَمَا يَحْدُثُ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: The changes of time and what happens in it.

englishRaw: "Abdullah, how are you when you wear a temptation in which the great ones become disoriented and the small ones grow up and people take it as a tradition? And when it is changed, they say, 'The tradition has changed.' They say, 'And when will that be, O Abu Abdur Rahman?' He said, 'When your readers become numerous, your scholars become few, your leaders become many, and your trustworthy ones become few, and when the worldly life is sought through the actions of the Hereafter.'"   – Sound Chain
body: "Abdullah, how are you when you wear a temptation in which the great ones become disoriented and the small ones grow up and people take it as a tradition? And when it is changed, they say, 'The tradition has changed.' They say, 'And when will that be, O Abu Abdur Rahman?' He said, 'When your readers become numerous, your scholars become few, your leaders become many, and your trustworthy ones become few, and when the worldly life is sought through the actions of the Hereafter.'"   – Sound Chain
arabic: عَبْدُ اللَّهِ كَيْفَ أَنْتُمْ إِذَا لَبِسَتْكُمْ فِتْنَةٌ يَهْرَمُ فِيهَا الْكَبِيرُ وَيَرْبُو فِيهَا الصَّغِيرُ وَيَتَّخِذُهَا النَّاسُ سُنَّةً فَإِذَا غُيِّرَتْ قَالُوا غُيِّرَتِ السُّنَّةُ قَالُوا وَمَتَى ذَلِكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ؟ قَالَ «إِذَا كَثُرَتْ قُرَّاؤُكُمْ وَقَلَّتْ فُقَهَاؤُكُمْ وَكَثُرَتْ أُمَرَاؤُكُمْ وَقَلَّتْ أُمَنَاؤُكُمْ وَالْتُمِسَتِ الدُّنْيَا بِعَمَلِ الْآخِرَةِ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Yaʿlá \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e Shaqīq
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا يَعْلَى حَدَّثَنَا الْأَعْمَشُ عَنْ شَقِيقٍ قَالَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 192

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ تَغَيُّرِ الزَّمَانِ وَمَا يَحْدُثُ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: The changes of time and what happens in it.

englishRaw: "How are you when you are adorned with a temptation in which the elders grow feeble and the young ones flourish? When something is left from it, it is said, 'The sunnah has been abandoned.' They ask, 'When is that?' He said, 'When your scholars disappear, your ignorants increase, your reciters multiply, your jurists decrease, your leaders increase, your trustworthy individuals decrease, and worldly gains are sought through actions of the Hereafter and understanding of religion diminishes.'"   – Sound
body: "How are you when you are adorned with a temptation in which the elders grow feeble and the young ones flourish? When something is left from it, it is said, 'The sunnah has been abandoned.' They ask, 'When is that?' He said, 'When your scholars disappear, your ignorants increase, your reciters multiply, your jurists decrease, your leaders increase, your trustworthy individuals decrease, and worldly gains are sought through actions of the Hereafter and understanding of religion diminishes.'"   – Sound
arabic: كَيْفَ أَنْتُمْ إِذَا لَبِسَتْكُمْ فِتْنَةٌ يَهْرَمُ فِيهَا الْكَبِيرُ وَيَرْبُو فِيهَا الصَّغِيرُ إِذَا تُرِكَ مِنْهَا شَيْءٌ قِيلَ تُرِكَتِ السُّنَّةُ قَالُوا وَمَتَى ذَلِكَ؟ قَالَ «إِذَا ذَهَبَتْ عُلَمَاؤُكُمْ وَكَثُرَتْ جُهَلَاؤُكُمْ وَكَثُرَتْ قُرَّاؤُكُمْ وَقَلَّتْ فُقَهَاؤُكُمْ وَكَثُرَتْ أُمَرَاؤُكُمْ وَقَلَّتْ أُمَنَاؤُكُمْ وَالْتُمِسَتِ الدُّنْيَا بِعَمَلِ الْآخِرَةِ وَتُفُقِّهَ لِغَيْرِ الدِّينِ»   – صحيح
chain: ʿAmr b. ʿAwn \u003e Khālid b. ʿAbdullāh \u003e Yazīd b. Abū Ziyād \u003e Ibrāhīm \u003e ʿAlqamah \u003e ʿAbdullāh
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ عَوْنٍ عَنْ خَالِدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ يَزِيدَ بْنِ أَبِي زِيَادٍ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ عَلْقَمَةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 193

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ تَغَيُّرِ الزَّمَانِ وَمَا يَحْدُثُ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: The changes of time and what happens in it.

englishRaw: It is said, "Woe to those who indulge in matters other than worship and those who make the prohibited permissible by means of doubtful actions."   – Weak Chain
body: It is said, "Woe to those who indulge in matters other than worship and those who make the prohibited permissible by means of doubtful actions."   – Weak Chain
arabic: يُقَالُ «وَيْلٌ لِلْمُتَفَقِّهِينَ لِغَيْرِ الْعِبَادَةِ وَالْمُسْتَحِلِّينَ الحرماتِ بِالشُّبُهَاتِ»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Abū al-Mughīrah \u003e al-Awzāʿī \u003e Unbiʾt
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو الْمُغِيرَةِ حَدَّثَنَا الْأَوْزَاعِيُّ قَالَ أُنْبِئْتُ أَنَّهُ كَانَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 194

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ تَغَيُّرِ الزَّمَانِ وَمَا يَحْدُثُ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: The changes of time and what happens in it.

englishRaw: "Every year that comes to you is worse than the year before it. I do not mean by this that it brings more crops or a better leader, but your scholars, elites, and jurists will die, and you will not find their successors. Then a people will come who will judge matters according to their own opinions."   – Weak Chain
body: "Every year that comes to you is worse than the year before it. I do not mean by this that it brings more crops or a better leader, but your scholars, elites, and jurists will die, and you will not find their successors. Then a people will come who will judge matters according to their own opinions."   – Weak Chain
arabic: «لَا يَأْتِي عَلَيْكُمْ عَامٌ إِلَّا وَهُوَ شَرٌّ مِنَ الَّذِي كَانَ قَبْلَهُ أَمَا إِنِّي لَسْتُ أَعْنِي عَامًا أَخْصَبَ مِنْ عَامٍ وَلَا أَمِيرًا خَيْرًا مِنْ أَمِيرٍ وَلَكِنْ عُلَمَاؤُكُمْ وَخِيَارُكُمْ وَفُقَهَاؤُكُمْ يَذْهَبُونَ ثُمَّ لَا تَجِدُونَ مِنْهُمْ خَلَفًا وَيَجِيءُ قَوْمٌ يَقِيسُونَ الْأُمُورَ بِرَأْيِهِمْ»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Ṣāliḥ b. Suhayl a freed slave of Yaḥyá b. Abū Zāʾidah \u003e Yaḥyá \u003e Mujālid \u003e al-Shaʿbī \u003e Masrūq \u003e ʿAbdullāh
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا صَالِحُ بْنُ سُهَيْلٍ مَوْلَى يَحْيَى بْنِ أَبِي زَائِدَةَ ثَنَا يَحْيَى عَنْ مُجَالِدٍ عَنِ الشَّعْبِيِّ عَنْ مَسْرُوقٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 195

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ تَغَيُّرِ الزَّمَانِ وَمَا يَحْدُثُ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: The changes of time and what happens in it.

englishRaw: "The first one who judged Iblis (Satan) and that the sun and moon are not to be worshipped except by measurements."   – Fair Chain
body: "The first one who judged Iblis (Satan) and that the sun and moon are not to be worshipped except by measurements."   – Fair Chain
arabic: «أَوَّلُ مَنْ قَاسَ إِبْلِيسُ وَمَا عُبِدَتِ الشَّمْسُ وَالْقَمَرُ إِلَّا بِالْمَقَايِيسِ»   – إسناده جيد
chain: Muḥammad b. Aḥmad b. Abū Khalaf \u003e Yaḥyá b. Sulaym \u003e Dāwud b. Abū Hind \u003e Ibn Sīrīn
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِي خَلَفٍ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ سُلَيْمٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ دَاوُدَ بْنَ أَبِي هِنْدٍ عَنِ ابْنِ سِيرِينَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 196

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ تَغَيُّرِ الزَّمَانِ وَمَا يَحْدُثُ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: The changes of time and what happens in it.

englishRaw: He recited this verse: "You created me from fire, and You created him from clay." [Al-A'raf 12]. He said, "Iblees (Satan) was arrogant, and he was the first of those who were arrogant."   – Weak Chain
body: He recited this verse: "You created me from fire, and You created him from clay." [Al-A'raf 12]. He said, "Iblees (Satan) was arrogant, and he was the first of those who were arrogant."   – Weak Chain
arabic: أَنَّهُ تَلَا هَذِهِ الْآيَةَ {خَلَقْتَنِي مِنْ نَارٍ وَخَلَقْتَهُ مِنْ طِينٍ} [الأعراف 12] قَالَ «قَاسَ إِبْلِيسُ وَهُوَ أَوَّلُ مَنْ قَاسَ»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Muḥammad b. Kathīr \u003e Ibn Shawdhab \u003e Maṭar \u003e al-Ḥasan
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ كَثِيرٍ عَنِ ابْنِ شَوْذَبٍ عَنْ مَطَرٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 198

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ تَغَيُّرِ الزَّمَانِ وَمَا يَحْدُثُ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: The changes of time and what happens in it.

englishRaw: By Allah, if you adhere to regulations, you will surely make the permissible forbidden and make the forbidden permissible.   – Sound Chain
body: By Allah, if you adhere to regulations, you will surely make the permissible forbidden and make the forbidden permissible.   – Sound Chain
arabic: وَاللَّهِ «لَئِنْ أَخَذْتُمْ بِالْمَقَايِيسِ لَتُحَرِّمُنَّ الْحَلَالَ وَلَتُحِلُّنَّ الْحَرَامَ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Ṣadaqah b. al-Faḍl \u003e Abū Khālid al-Aḥmar \u003e Ismāʿīl \u003e al-Shaʿbī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا صَدَقَةُ بْنُ الْفَضْلِ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو خَالِدٍ الْأَحْمَرُ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِيلَ عَنِ الشَّعْبِيِّ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 199

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ تَغَيُّرِ الزَّمَانِ وَمَا يَحْدُثُ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: The changes of time and what happens in it.

englishRaw: He used to say, "What I disliked most was when someone asked his companion, and he would respond, 'Have you seen?' while he did not compare."
body: He used to say, "What I disliked most was when someone asked his companion, and he would respond, 'Have you seen?' while he did not compare."
arabic: أَنَّهُ كَانَ يَقُولُ مَا أَبْغَضَ إِلَيَّ أَرَأَيْتَ أَرَأَيْتَ يَسْأَلُ الرَّجُلُ صَاحِبَهُ فَيَقُولُ أَرَأَيْتَ وَكَانَ لَا يُقَايِسُ
chain: al-Ḥasan b. Bishr from my father \u003e Ismāʿīl \u003e ʿĀmir
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا الْحَسَنُ بْنُ بِشْرٍ حَدَّثَنَا أَبِي عَنْ إِسْمَاعِيلَ عَنْ عَامِرٍ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 200

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ تَغَيُّرِ الزَّمَانِ وَمَا يَحْدُثُ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: The changes of time and what happens in it.

englishRaw: "Would you like me to sit with you, my friends?"   – Sound Chain
body: "Would you like me to sit with you, my friends?"   – Sound Chain
arabic: أَنْ أُجَالِسَ أَصْحَابَ أَرَأَيْتَ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Ṣadaqah b. al-Faḍl \u003e Yaḥyá b. Saʿīd \u003e al-Zibriqān \u003e Nahānī Abū Wāʾil
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا صَدَقَةُ بْنُ الْفَضْلِ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ سَعِيدٍ عَنِ الزِّبْرِقَانِ قَالَ «نَهَانِي أَبُو وَائِلٍ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 201

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ تَغَيُّرِ الزَّمَانِ وَمَا يَحْدُثُ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: The changes of time and what happens in it.

englishRaw: That those were present during the time of the Prophet ﷺ when the majority of the Qur'an was revealed, they ask you, they ask you.   – Sound Chain
body: That those were present during the time of the Prophet ﷺ when the majority of the Qur'an was revealed, they ask you, they ask you.   – Sound Chain
arabic: أَنَّ هَؤُلَاءِ كَانُوا عَلَى عَهْدِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ لَنَزَلَتْ عَامَّةُ الْقُرْآنِ يَسْأَلُونَكَ يَسْأَلُونَكَ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Ṣadaqah b. al-Faḍl \u003e Ibn ʿUyaynah \u003e Ismāʿīl \u003e al-Shaʿbī \u003e Law
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا صَدَقَةُ بْنُ الْفَضْلِ أَنبَأَنَا ابْنُ عُيَيْنَةَ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِيلَ عَنِ الشَّعْبِيِّ قَالَ «لَوْ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 202

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ تَغَيُّرِ الزَّمَانِ وَمَا يَحْدُثُ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: The changes of time and what happens in it.

englishRaw: "O Abu Hamza, by Allah, I have spoken the truth even if I may have found trouble in doing so. And indeed, there is a time when I may become a scholar amongst the people of Kufa, during a time of adversity."   – Weak Chain
body: "O Abu Hamza, by Allah, I have spoken the truth even if I may have found trouble in doing so. And indeed, there is a time when I may become a scholar amongst the people of Kufa, during a time of adversity."   – Weak Chain
arabic: لِي إِبْرَاهِيمُ يَا أَبَا حَمْزَةَ «وَاللَّهِ لَقَدْ تَكَلَّمْتُ وَلَوْ وَجَدْتُ بُدًّا مَا تَكَلَّمْتُ وَإِنَّ زَمَانًا أَكُونُ فِيهِ فَقِيهَ أَهْلِ الْكُوفَةِ زَمَانُ سُوءٍ»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Ismāʿīl b. Abān \u003e Muḥammad \u003e Ibn Ṭalḥah \u003e Maymūn Abū Ḥamzah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ أَبَانَ أَخْبَرَنِي مُحَمَّدٌ هُوَ ابْنُ طَلْحَةَ عَنْ مَيْمُونٍ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ قَالَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 203

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ تَغَيُّرِ الزَّمَانِ وَمَا يَحْدُثُ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: The changes of time and what happens in it.

englishRaw: Omar, with stubbornness, meaning in speech.   – Weak Chain
body: Omar, with stubbornness, meaning in speech.   – Weak Chain
arabic: عُمَرُ إِيَّاي وَالْمُكَايَلَةَ يَعْنِي فِي الْكَلَامِ   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Abū Nuʿaym \u003e Sufyān \u003e Layth \u003e Mujāhid
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو نُعَيْمٍ حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ عَنْ لَيْثٍ عَنْ مُجَاهِدٍ قَالَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 204

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ تَغَيُّرِ الزَّمَانِ وَمَا يَحْدُثُ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: The changes of time and what happens in it.

englishRaw: I witnessed a dispute, and a man from Murad came to him and said, "O Abu Umamah, what is the blood money for the fingers?" He replied, "Ten dirhams, ten dirhams." The man said, "Subhan Allah! Are these fingers equal?" He joined the ring finger with the thumb and said, "O Abu Umamah, are your ear and hand equal?" Because the ear covers the hair, the turban, and has half of the blood money, and the hand has the other half. Woe unto you! The sunnah has preceded your analogy, so follow it and do not innovate, for you will not go astray as long as you adhere to the tradition." Abu Bakr said, "Then Ash-Sha'bi told me, 'O Dhu al-Iyyad, if one of your tribesmen is killed and this baby is in his cradle, would their blood money be the same?' I said, 'Yes.' He said, 'So where is the analogy?'"   – Weak
body: I witnessed a dispute, and a man from Murad came to him and said, "O Abu Umamah, what is the blood money for the fingers?" He replied, "Ten dirhams, ten dirhams." The man said, "Subhan Allah! Are these fingers equal?" He joined the ring finger with the thumb and said, "O Abu Umamah, are your ear and hand equal?" Because the ear covers the hair, the turban, and has half of the blood money, and the hand has the other half. Woe unto you! The sunnah has preceded your analogy, so follow it and do not innovate, for you will not go astray as long as you adhere to the tradition." Abu Bakr said, "Then Ash-Sha'bi told me, 'O Dhu al-Iyyad, if one of your tribesmen is killed and this baby is in his cradle, would their blood money be the same?' I said, 'Yes.' He said, 'So where is the analogy?'"   – Weak
arabic: شَهِدْتُ شُرَيْحًا وَجَاءَهُ رَجُلٌ مِنْ مُرَادٍ فَقَالَ يَا أَبَا أُمَيَّةَ مَا دِيَةُ الْأَصَابِعِ؟ قَالَ «عَشْرٌ عَشْرٌ» قَالَ يَا سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ أَسَوَاءٌ هَاتَانِ؟ جَمَعَ بَيْنَ الْخِنْصِرِ وَالْإِبْهَامِ فَقَالَ شُرَيْحٌ يَا سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ أَسَوَاءٌ أُذُنُكَ وَيَدُكَ؟ فَإِنَّ الْأُذُنَ يُوَارِيهَا الشَّعْرُ وَالْكُمَّةُ وَالْعِمَامَةُ فِيهَا نِصْفُ الدِّيَةِ وَفِي الْيَدِ نِصْفُ الدِّيَةِ وَيْحَكَ إِنَّ السُّنَّةَ سَبَقَتْ قِيَاسَكُمْ فَاتَّبِعْ وَلَا تَبْتَدِعْ فَإِنَّكَ لَنْ تَضِلَّ مَا أَخَذْتَ بِالْأَثَرِ قَالَ أَبُو بَكْرٍ فَقَالَ لِي الشَّعْبِيُّ يَا هُذَلِيُّ لَوْ أَنَّ أَحْنَفَكُمْ قُتِلَ وَهَذَا الصَّبِيُّ فِي مَهْدِهِ أَكَانَ دِيَتُهُمَا سَوَاءً؟ قُلْتُ نَعَمْ قَالَ فَأَيْنَ الْقِيَاسُ؟   – ضعيف
chain: Ḥajjāj al-Baṣrī \u003e Abū Bakr al-Hudhalī \u003e al-Shaʿbī \u003e Shahidt Shurayḥ And Jāʾah a man from Murād \u003e Yā Abū Umayyah Mā Diyah al-Aṣābiʿ \u003e ʿAshr ʿAshr
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا حَجَّاجٌ الْبَصْرِيُّ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ الْهُذَلِيُّ عَنِ الشَّعْبِيِّ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 205

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ تَغَيُّرِ الزَّمَانِ وَمَا يَحْدُثُ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: The changes of time and what happens in it.

englishRaw: From the Messenger of Allah صلى الله عليه وسلم, regarding "Perhaps I am being followed", Mu'adh said, "Beware of what he has brought, for what he has brought is misguidance."   – Sound Chain
body: From the Messenger of Allah صلى الله عليه وسلم, regarding "Perhaps I am being followed", Mu'adh said, "Beware of what he has brought, for what he has brought is misguidance."   – Sound Chain
arabic: عَنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ لَعَلِّي أُتَّبَعُ قَالَ مُعَاذٌ فَإِيَّاكُمْ وَمَا جَاءَ بِهِ فَإِنَّ مَا جَاءَ بِهِ ضَلَالَةٌ   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Marwān b. Muḥammad \u003e Saʿīd \u003e Rabīʿah b. Yazīd \u003e Muʿādh b. Jabal Yuftaḥ al-Qurān \u003e al-Nās Ḥattá Yaqraʾah al-Marʾah And al-Ṣṣabī Wa-al-Rrajul
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مَرْوَانُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ حَدَّثَنَا سَعِيدٌ عَنْ رَبِيعَةَ بْنِ يَزِيدَ قَالَ قَالَ مُعَاذُ بْنُ جَبَلٍ يُفْتَحُ الْقُرْآنُ عَلَى النَّاسِ حَتَّى يَقْرَأَهُ الْمَرْأَةُ وَالصَّبِيُّ وَالرَّجُلُ فَيَقُولُ الرَّجُلُ قَدْ قَرَأْتُ الْقُرْآنَ فَلَمْ أُتَّبَعُ وَاللَّهِ لَأَقُومَنَّ بِهِ فِيهِمْ لَعَلِّي أُتَّبَعُ فَيَقُومُ بِهِ فِيهِمْ فَلَا يُتَّبَعُ فَيَقُولُ قَدْ قَرَأْتُ الْقُرْآنَ فَلَمْ أُتَّبَعْ وَقَدْ قُمْتُ بِهِ فِيهِمْ فَلَمْ أُتَّبَعْ لَأَحتَظِرَنَّ فِي بَيْتِي مَسْجِدًا لَعَلِّي أُتَّبَعُ فَيَحْتَظِرُ فِي بَيْتِهِ مَسْجِدًا فَلَا يُتَّبَعُ فَيَقُولُ قَدْ قَرَأْتُ الْقُرْآنَ فَلَمْ أُتَّبَعْ وَقُمْتُ بِهِ فِيهِمْ فَلَمْ أُتَّبَعْ وَقَدِ احْتظرْتُ فِي بَيْتِي مَسْجِدًا فَلَمْ أُتَّبَعْ وَاللَّهِ لَآتِيَنَّهُمْ بِحَدِيثٍ لَا يَجِدُونَهُ فِي كِتَابِ اللَّهِ جَلَّ وَعَلَا وَلَمْ يَسْمَعُوهُ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 206

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ أَخْذِ الرَّأْيِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the detestation/dislike of taking an opinion

englishRaw: From the Messenger of Allah, take what he has said and discard what they have said based on their opinions, and throw it into the trash.   – Sound Chain
body: From the Messenger of Allah, take what he has said and discard what they have said based on their opinions, and throw it into the trash.   – Sound Chain
arabic: عَنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ فَخُذْ بِهِ وَمَا قَالُوهُ بِرَأْيِهِمْ فَأَلْقِهِ فِي الْحُشِّ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Muḥammad b. Yūsuf \u003e Mālik \u003e Ibn Mighwal \u003e Qāl Lī al-Shaʿbī Mā Ḥaddathūk Haʾulāʾ
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يُوسُفَ حَدَّثَنَا مَالِكٌ هُوَ ابْنُ مِغْوَلٍ قَالَ قَالَ لِيَ الشَّعْبِيُّ «مَا حَدَّثُوكَ هَؤُلَاءِ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 207

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ أَخْذِ الرَّأْيِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the detestation/dislike of taking an opinion

englishRaw: "They do not ask me, and I do not ask them. One of them only says, "Have you seen, have you seen?"   – Good Chain
body: "They do not ask me, and I do not ask them. One of them only says, "Have you seen, have you seen?"   – Good Chain
arabic: أَنْ لَا يَسْأَلُونِي وَلَا أَسْأَلُهُمْ إِنَّمَا يَقُولُ أَحَدُهُمْ أَرَأَيْتَ أَرَأَيْتَ؟   – إسناده حسن
chain: Zayd b. Ḥubāb \u003e Rajāʾ b. Abū Salamah \u003e ʿAbdah b. Abū Lubābah \u003e Qad Raḍīt from Ahl Zamānī Haʾulāʾ \u003e Lā Yasʾalūnī And Lā Asʾaluhum Innamā
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنِا الْعَبَّاسُ بْنُ سُفْيَانَ عَنْ زَيْدِ بْنِ حُبَابٍ أَخْبَرَنِي رَجَاءُ بْنُ أَبِي سَلَمَةَ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ عَبْدَةَ بْنَ أَبِي لُبَابَةَ يَقُولُ قَدْ رَضِيتُ مِنْ أَهْلِ زَمَانِي هَؤُلَاءِ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 208

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ أَخْذِ الرَّأْيِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the detestation/dislike of taking an opinion

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ drew a line for us one day and said, "This is the way of Allah." Then he drew lines to his right and left and said, "These are various paths, on each of them there is a devil who calls to it." Then he recited, "And that this is My path, which is straight, so follow it; and do not follow [other] ways, for they will separate you from His way." [Surah Al-An'am: 153]   – Good Chain
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ drew a line for us one day and said, "This is the way of Allah." Then he drew lines to his right and left and said, "These are various paths, on each of them there is a devil who calls to it." Then he recited, "And that this is My path, which is straight, so follow it; and do not follow [other] ways, for they will separate you from His way." [Surah Al-An'am: 153]   – Good Chain
arabic: خَطَّ لَنَا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ يَوْمًا خَطًّا ثُمَّ قَالَ «هَذَا سَبِيلُ اللَّهِ» ثُمَّ خَطَّ خُطُوطًا عَنْ يَمِينِهِ وَعَنْ شِمَالِهِ ثُمَّ قَالَ «هَذِهِ سُبُلٌ عَلَى كُلِّ سَبِيلٍ مِنْهَا شَيْطَانٌ يَدْعُو إِلَيْهِ» ثُمَّ تَلَا {وَأَنَّ هَذَا صِرَاطِي مُسْتَقِيمًا فَاتَّبِعُوهُ وَلَا تَتَّبِعُوا السُّبُلَ فَتَفَرَّقَ بِكُمْ عَنْ سَبِيلِهِ} [الأنعام 153]   – إسناده حسن
chain: ʿAffān \u003e Ḥammād b. Zayd \u003e ʿĀṣim Ibn Bahdalah \u003e Abū Wāʾil \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Masʿūd
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَفَّانُ حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ زَيْدٍ حَدَّثَنَا عَاصِمُ ابْنُ بَهْدَلَةَ عَنْ أَبِي وَائِلٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مَسْعُودٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 209

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ أَخْذِ الرَّأْيِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the detestation/dislike of taking an opinion

englishRaw: About mujahid [And do not follow the ways] [Al-Anam 153] He said: Bid'ah (innovation in religion) and doubtful matters.   – Sound Chain
body: About mujahid [And do not follow the ways] [Al-Anam 153] He said: Bid'ah (innovation in religion) and doubtful matters.   – Sound Chain
arabic: عَنْ مُجَاهِدٍ {وَلَا تَتَّبِعُوا السُّبُلَ} [الأنعام 153] قَالَ الْبِدَعَ وَالشُّبُهَاتِ   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Muḥammad b. Yūsuf \u003e And Rqāʾ \u003e Ibn Abū Najīḥ \u003e Mujāhid Walā Tattabiʿūā al-Subul al-Nʿām 153
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يُوسُفَ حَدَّثَنَا وَرْقَاءُ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي نَجِيحٍ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 210

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ أَخْذِ الرَّأْيِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the detestation/dislike of taking an opinion

englishRaw: Abu Abdurrahman came out to you and we said, "There is no need." So he sat with us until he left. When he left, we all got up and went to him. Abu Musa said to him, "O Abu Abdurrahman, I saw something in the mosque that I disapproved of but did not witness it before. Alhamdulillah, it turned out to be something good." He asked, "What is it?" Abu Musa said, "I saw some people sitting in circles, waiting for the prayer. In each circle, there was a man holding a pebble in his hand. He would say, 'Say Allahu Akbar one hundred times,' and they would say it one hundred times. Then he would say, 'Say Alhamdulillah one hundred times,' and they would say it one hundred times. Finally, he would say, 'Say SubhanAllah one hundred times,' and they would say it one hundred times." Abu Abdurrahman asked, "What did you say to them?" Abu Musa replied, "I did not say anything to them and I was waiting for your opinion or command." Abu Abdurrahman said, "Shouldn't you ask them to count their sins? I guarantee that nothing will be lost from their good deeds." Then he continued walking and we followed him until he reached one of those circles and stood among them. He asked, "What are you all doing?" They said, "O Abu Abdurrahman, we are counting the takbeer, tahleel, and tasbeeh with this pebble." He said, "Count your sins, for I guarantee that nothing will be lost from your good deeds. Woe to you, O nation of Muhammad, how quickly you will be destroyed! These are the Companions of your Prophet ﷺ, still present. His clothes have not faded and his utensils have not been broken. By the One who holds my soul in His hand, you are on a path more guided than the path of Muhammad ﷺ, or are you opening the door of misguidance?" They said, "By Allah, O Abu Abdurrahman, we only seek goodness." He said, "How many seekers of goodness will not achieve it? The Messenger of Allah ﷺ informed us that there are people who recite the Quran, but it does not pass their throats. And by Allah, I do not know if most of them are among you." Then he turned away from them. Amr ibn Salama said, "We see many of those circles criticizing us on the Day of Nahrwan along with the Khawarij."   – Fair Chain

arabic: أَخَرَجَ إِلَيْكُمْ أَبُو عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ قُلْنَا لَا بَعْدُ فَجَلَسَ مَعَنَا حَتَّى خَرَجَ فَلَمَّا خَرَجَ قُمْنَا إِلَيْهِ جَمِيعًا فَقَالَ لَهُ أَبُو مُوسَى يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ إِنِّي رَأَيْتُ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ آنِفًا أَمْرًا أَنْكَرْتُهُ وَلَمْ أَرَ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ إِلَّا خَيْرًا قَالَ فَمَا هُوَ؟ فَقَالَ إِنْ عِشْتَ فَسَتَرَاهُ قَالَ رَأَيْتُ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ قَوْمًا حِلَقًا جُلُوسًا يَنْتَظِرُونَ الصَّلَاةَ فِي كُلِّ حَلْقَةٍ رَجُلٌ وَفِي أَيْدِيهِمْ حصًا فَيَقُولُ كَبِّرُوا مِائَةً فَيُكَبِّرُونَ مِائَةً فَيَقُولُ هَلِّلُوا مِائَةً فَيُهَلِّلُونَ مِائَةً وَيَقُولُ سَبِّحُوا مِائَةً فَيُسَبِّحُونَ مِائَةً قَالَ فَمَاذَا قُلْتَ لَهُمْ؟ قَالَ مَا قُلْتُ لَهُمْ شَيْئًا انْتِظَارَ رَأْيِكَ أَوِ انْتظارَ أَمْرِكَ قَالَ «أَفَلَا أَمَرْتَهُمْ أَنْ يَعُدُّوا سَيِّئَاتِهِمْ وَضَمِنْتَ لَهُمْ أَنْ لَا يَضِيعَ مِنْ حَسَنَاتِهِمْ» ثُمَّ مَضَى وَمَضَيْنَا مَعَهُ حَتَّى أَتَى حَلْقَةً مِنْ تِلْكَ الْحِلَقِ فَوَقَفَ عَلَيْهِمْ فَقَالَ «مَا هَذَا الَّذِي أَرَاكُمْ تَصْنَعُونَ؟» قَالُوا يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ حصًا نَعُدُّ بِهِ التَّكْبِيرَ وَالتَّهْلِيلَ وَالتَّسْبِيحَ قَالَ «فَعُدُّوا سَيِّئَاتِكُمْ فَأَنَا ضَامِنٌ أَنْ لَا يَضِيعَ مِنْ حَسَنَاتِكُمْ شَيْءٌ وَيْحَكُمْ يَا أُمَّةَ مُحَمَّدٍ مَا أَسْرَعَ هَلَكَتَكُمْ هَؤُلَاءِ صَحَابَةُ نَبِيِّكُمْ ﷺ مُتَوَافِرُونَ وَهَذِهِ ثِيَابُهُ لَمْ تَبْلَ وَآنِيَتُهُ لَمْ تُكْسَرْ وَالَّذِي نَفْسِي بِيَدِهِ إِنَّكُمْ لَعَلَى مِلَّةٍ هِيَ أَهْدَى مِنْ مِلَّةِ مُحَمَّدٍ ﷺ أوْ مُفْتَتِحُو بَابِ ضَلَالَةٍ» قَالُوا وَاللَّهِ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ مَا أَرَدْنَا إِلَّا الْخَيْرَ قَالَ «وَكَمْ مِنْ مُرِيدٍ لِلْخَيْرِ لَنْ يُصِيبَهُ إِنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ حَدَّثَنَا أَنَّ» قَوْمًا يَقْرَءُونَ الْقُرْآنَ لَا يُجَاوِزُ تَرَاقِيَهُمْ وَايْمُ اللَّهِ مَا أَدْرِي لَعَلَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ مِنْكُمْ ثُمَّ تَوَلَّى عَنْهُمْ فَقَالَ عَمْرُو بْنُ سَلَمَةَ رَأَيْنَا عَامَّةَ أُولَئِكَ الْحِلَقِ يُطَاعِنُونَا يَوْمَ النَّهْرَوَانِ مَعَ الْخَوَارِجِ   – إسناده جيد
chain: al-Ḥakam b. al-Mubārak \u003e ʿAmr b. Yaḥyá \u003e Abū from his father
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا الْحَكَمُ بْنُ الْمُبَارَكِ أَنبَأَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ يَحْيَى قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبِي يُحَدِّثُ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ كُنَّا نَجْلِسُ عَلَى بَابِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مَسْعُودٍ قَبْلَ صَلَاةِ الْغَدَاةِ فَإِذَا خَرَجَ مَشَيْنَا مَعَهُ إِلَى الْمَسْجِدِ فَجَاءَنَا أَبُو مُوسَى الْأَشْعَرِيُّ فَقَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 211

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ أَخْذِ الرَّأْيِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the detestation/dislike of taking an opinion

englishRaw: "Abdullah said, 'Follow and do not innovate, for you have been sufficed.'"
body: "Abdullah said, 'Follow and do not innovate, for you have been sufficed.'"
arabic: عَبْدُ اللَّهِ «اتَّبِعُوا وَلَا تَبْتَدِعُوا فَقَدْ كُفِيتُمْ»
chain: Yaʿlá \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e Ḥabīb \u003e Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥman
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا يَعْلَى حَدَّثَنَا الْأَعْمَشُ عَنْ حَبِيبٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ قَالَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 212

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ أَخْذِ الرَّأْيِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the detestation/dislike of taking an opinion

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ delivered a speech, praised Allah and thanked Him, then he said: "Verily, the best guidance is the guidance of Muhammad ﷺ , and the worst of matters are those newly invented (in religion), and every innovation is misguidance."   – Good Chain
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ delivered a speech, praised Allah and thanked Him, then he said: "Verily, the best guidance is the guidance of Muhammad ﷺ , and the worst of matters are those newly invented (in religion), and every innovation is misguidance."   – Good Chain
arabic: خَطَبَنَا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ فَحَمِدَ اللَّهَ وَأَثْنَى عَلَيْهِ ثُمَّ قَالَ «إِنَّ أَفْضَلَ الْهَدْيِ هَدْيُ مُحَمَّدٍ ﷺ وَشَرَّ الْأُمُورِ مُحْدَثَاتُهَا وَكُلَّ بِدْعَةٍ ضَلَالَةٌ»   – إسناده حسن
chain: Muḥammad b. Aḥmad b. Abū Khalaf \u003e Yaḥyá b. Sulaym \u003e Jaʿfar b. Muḥammad from his father \u003e Jābir b. ʿAbdullāh al-Anṣārī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِي خَلَفٍ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ سُلَيْمٍ حَدَّثَنِي جَعْفَرُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ جَابِرِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْأَنْصَارِيِّ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 213

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ أَخْذِ الرَّأْيِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the detestation/dislike of taking an opinion

englishRaw: "The most truthful word is the word of Allah Almighty, and the best guidance is the guidance of Muhammad ﷺ . The most miserable person is the one who is miserable in the womb of his mother. The worst narrations are the narrations of lies, and the worst matters are the newly-invented ones. And everything that is coming is near."   – Fair Chain
body: "The most truthful word is the word of Allah Almighty, and the best guidance is the guidance of Muhammad ﷺ . The most miserable person is the one who is miserable in the womb of his mother. The worst narrations are the narrations of lies, and the worst matters are the newly-invented ones. And everything that is coming is near."   – Fair Chain
arabic: «إِنَّ أَصْدَقَ الْقَوْلِ قَوْلُ اللَّهِ ﷻ وَإِنَّ أَحْسَنَ الْهَدْيِ هَدْيُ مُحَمَّدٍ ﷺ وَالشَّقِيُّ مَنْ شَقِيَ فِي بَطْنِ أُمِّهِ وَإِنَّ شَرَّ الرَّوَايَا رَوَايَا الْكَذِبِ وَشَرَّ الْأُمُورِ مُحْدَثَاتُهَا وَكُلَّ مَا هُوَ آتٍ قَرِيبٌ»   – إسناده جيد
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿUyaynah \u003e Abū Isḥāq al-Fazārī \u003e Aslam al-Minqarī \u003e Bilād b. ʿIṣmah \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Masʿūd
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عُيَيْنَةَ عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ الْفَزَارِيِّ عَنْ أَسْلَمَ الْمِنْقَرِيِّ عَنْ بِلَادِ بْنِ عِصْمَةَ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ عَبْدَ اللَّهِ بْنَ مَسْعُودٍ يَقُولُ وَكَانَ إِذَا كَانَ عَشِيَّةَ الْخَمِيسِ ليْلةِ الْجُمُعَةِ قَامَ فَقَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 214

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ أَخْذِ الرَّأْيِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the detestation/dislike of taking an opinion

englishRaw: "A man who adopts an innovation shall refer back to the Sunnah."   – Weak Chain
