body: "A man who adopts an innovation shall refer back to the Sunnah."   – Weak Chain
arabic: «مَا أَخَذَ رَجُلٌ بِبِدْعَةٍ فَرَاجَعَ سُنَّةً»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿUyaynah \u003e Abū Isḥāq al-Fazārī \u003e Layth \u003e Ayyūb \u003e Ibn Sīrīn
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عُيَيْنَةَ عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ الْفَزَارِيِّ عَنْ لَيْثٍ عَنْ أَيُّوبَ عَنِ ابْنِ سِيرِينَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 215

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ أَخْذِ الرَّأْيِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the detestation/dislike of taking an opinion

englishRaw: From the Prophet ﷺ, he said, "Verily, what I fear for my nation is the misleading leaders."   – Sound Chain
body: From the Prophet ﷺ, he said, "Verily, what I fear for my nation is the misleading leaders."   – Sound Chain
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ أَنَّهُ قَالَ «إِنَّمَا أَخَافُ عَلَى أُمَّتِي الْأَئِمَّةَ الْمُضِلِّينَ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Sulaymān b. Ḥarb \u003e Ḥammād b. Zayd \u003e Ayyūb \u003e Abū Qilābah \u003e Abū Asmāʾ \u003e Thawbān
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ حَرْبٍ حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ زَيْدٍ عَنْ أَيُّوبَ عَنْ أَبِي قِلَابَةَ عَنْ أَبِي أَسْمَاءَ عَنْ ثَوْبَانَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 216

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ أَخْذِ الرَّأْيِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the detestation/dislike of taking an opinion

englishRaw: A man entered upon us at noon, so I said, "O Abdullah, where have you come from?" He replied, "I came with my companion to a brothel, where my companion went in seeking pleasure. Meanwhile, I entered to find some shade and have a drink." Then, I went to a sour pit and perhaps she may have said to me, "Then, I went to a sour pit and gave him some to drink from it, so he drank and I drank." She said, "And I observed him, so I said, 'O Abdullah, who are you?' He said, 'I am Abu Bakr.' I said, 'Are you Abu Bakr, the companion of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ whom I have heard about?' He said, 'Yes.' She said, 'Then, I mentioned the conquest of Khaybar and our expedition against each other during the pre-Islamic period, and what Allah brought us of unity and severing the ties of those who opposed us. Ibn 'Awn showed us his fingers and described it for us. Mu'adh and Ahmad also showed it for us.' So I said, 'O Abdullah, until when do you think this matter of the people will continue?' He said, 'As long as the Imams are upright.' I said, 'Who are the Imams?' He said, 'Have you not seen a chief among a group, and they follow him and obey him? Such are not the upright ones.'"   – Good Chain
body: A man entered upon us at noon, so I said, "O Abdullah, where have you come from?" He replied, "I came with my companion to a brothel, where my companion went in seeking pleasure. Meanwhile, I entered to find some shade and have a drink." Then, I went to a sour pit and perhaps she may have said to me, "Then, I went to a sour pit and gave him some to drink from it, so he drank and I drank." She said, "And I observed him, so I said, 'O Abdullah, who are you?' He said, 'I am Abu Bakr.' I said, 'Are you Abu Bakr, the companion of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ whom I have heard about?' He said, 'Yes.' She said, 'Then, I mentioned the conquest of Khaybar and our expedition against each other during the pre-Islamic period, and what Allah brought us of unity and severing the ties of those who opposed us. Ibn 'Awn showed us his fingers and described it for us. Mu'adh and Ahmad also showed it for us.' So I said, 'O Abdullah, until when do you think this matter of the people will continue?' He said, 'As long as the Imams are upright.' I said, 'Who are the Imams?' He said, 'Have you not seen a chief among a group, and they follow him and obey him? Such are not the upright ones.'"   – Good Chain
arabic: دَخَلَ عَلَيْنَا رَجُلٌ بِالظَّهِيرَةِ فَقُلْتُ يَا عَبْدَ اللَّهِ مِنْ أَيْنَ أَقْبَلْتَ؟ قَالَ «أَقْبَلْتُ أَنَا وَصَاحِبٌ لِي فِي بُغَاءٍ لَنَا فَانْطَلَقَ صَاحِبِي يَبْغِي وَدَخَلْتُ أَنَا أَسْتَظِلُّ بِالظِّلِّ وَأَشْرَبُ مِنَ الشَّرَابِ» فَقُمْتُ إِلَى لُبَيْنَةٍ حَامِضَةٍ ورُبَّما قَالَتْ فَقُمْتُ إِلَى ضَيْحَةٍ حَامِضَةٍ فَسَقَيْتُهُ مِنْهَا فَشَرِبَ وَشَرِبْتُ قَالَتْ وَتَوَسَّمْتُهُ فَقُلْتُ يَا عَبْدَ اللَّهِ مَنْ أَنْتَ؟ فَقَالَ «أَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ» قُلْتُ أَنْتَ أَبُو بَكْرٍ صَاحِبُ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ الَّذِي سَمِعْتُ بِهِ؟ قَالَ «نَعَمْ» قَالَتْ فَذَكَرْتُ غَزْوَنَا خَثْعَمًا وَغَزْوَةَ بَعْضِنَا بَعْضًا فِي الْجَاهِلِيَّةِ وَمَا جَاءَ اللَّهُ بِهِ مِنَ الْأُلْفَةِ وَأَطْنَابِ الْفَسَاطِيطِ وَشَبَّكَ ابْنُ عَوْنٍ أَصَابِعَهُ وَوَصَفَهُ لَنَا مُعَاذٌ وَشَبَّكَ أَحْمَدُ فَقُلْتُ يَا عَبْدَ اللَّهِ حَتَّى مَتَى تَرَى أَمْرَ النَّاسِ هَذَا؟ قَالَ «مَا اسْتَقَامَتِ الْأَئِمَّةُ» قُلْتُ مَا الْأَئِمَّةُ؟ قَالَ «أَمَا رَأَيْتَ السَّيِّدَ يَكُونُ فِي الْحِوَاءِ فَيَتَّبِعُونَهُ وَيُطِيعُونَهُ؟ فَمَا اسْتَقَامَ أُولَئِكَ»   – إسناده حسن
chain: Aḥmad b. ʿAbdullāh Abū al-Walīd al-Harawī \u003e Muʿādh b. Muʿādh \u003e Ibn ʿAwn \u003e ʿAmr b. Saʿīd \u003e Abū Zurʿah b. ʿAmr b. Jarīr \u003e Ḥayyah b. Abū Ḥayyah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ أَبُو الْوَلِيدِ الْهَرَوِيُّ حَدَّثَنَا مُعَاذُ بْنُ مُعَاذٍ عَنِ ابْنِ عَوْنٍ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ أَبِي زُرْعَةَ بْنِ عَمْرِو بْنِ جَرِيرٍ عَنْ حَيَّةَ بِنْتِ أَبِي حَيَّةَ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 217

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ أَخْذِ الرَّأْيِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the detestation/dislike of taking an opinion

englishRaw: “The thing that I most fear for my nation is the action of the people of Lut.”     – Sound
body: “The thing that I most fear for my nation is the action of the people of Lut.”     – Sound
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «إِنَّ أَخْوَفُ مَا أَخَافُ عَلَيْكُمُ الْأَئِمَّةَ الْمُضِلِّينَ»   – صحيح
chain: Muḥammad b. al-Ṣalt \u003e Ibrāhīm b. Saʿd from his father \u003e Akh Liʿadī b. Arṭāh \u003e Abū al-Dardāʾ
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الصَّلْتِ حَدَّثَنَا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ سَعْدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ أَخٍ لِعَدِيِّ بْنِ أَرْطَاةَ عَنْ أَبِي الدَّرْدَاءِ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 218

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ أَخْذِ الرَّأْيِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the detestation/dislike of taking an opinion

englishRaw: Abu Bakr went to a lady from the Ahmas tribe called Zainab bint Al-Muhajir and found that she refused to speak. He asked, "Why does she not speak." The people said, "She has intended to perform Hajj without speaking." He said to her, "Speak, for it is illegal not to speak, as it is an action of the pre-islamic period of ignorance. So she spoke and said, "Who are you?" He said, "A man from the Emigrants." She asked, "Which Emigrants?" He replied, "From Quraish." She asked, "From what branch of Quraish are you?" He said, "You ask too many questions; I am Abu Bakr." She said, "How long shall we enjoy this good order (i.e. Islamic religion) which Allah has brought after the period of ignorance?" He said, "You will enjoy it as long as your Imams keep on abiding by its rules and regulations." She asked, "What are the Imams?" He said, "Were there not heads and chiefs of your nation who used to order the people and they used to obey them?" She said, "Yes." He said, "So they (i.e. the Imams) are those whom I meant."    – Sound Chain
body: Abu Bakr went to a lady from the Ahmas tribe called Zainab bint Al-Muhajir and found that she refused to speak. He asked, "Why does she not speak." The people said, "She has intended to perform Hajj without speaking." He said to her, "Speak, for it is illegal not to speak, as it is an action of the pre-islamic period of ignorance. So she spoke and said, "Who are you?" He said, "A man from the Emigrants." She asked, "Which Emigrants?" He replied, "From Quraish." She asked, "From what branch of Quraish are you?" He said, "You ask too many questions; I am Abu Bakr." She said, "How long shall we enjoy this good order (i.e. Islamic religion) which Allah has brought after the period of ignorance?" He said, "You will enjoy it as long as your Imams keep on abiding by its rules and regulations." She asked, "What are the Imams?" He said, "Were there not heads and chiefs of your nation who used to order the people and they used to obey them?" She said, "Yes." He said, "So they (i.e. the Imams) are those whom I meant."    – Sound Chain
arabic: دَخَلَ أَبُو بَكْرٍ رِضْوَانُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ عَلَى امْرَأَةٍ مِنْ أَحْمَسَ يُقَالُ لَهَا زَيْنَبُ قَالَ «فَرَآهَا لَا تَتَكَلَّمُ» فَقَالَ مَا لَهَا لَا تَتَكَلَّمُ؟ قَالُوا نَوَتْ حَجَّةً مُصْمِتَةً فَقَالَ لَهَا «تَكَلَّمِي فَإِنَّ هَذَا لَا يَحِلُّ هَذَا مِنْ عَمَلِ الْجَاهِلِيَّةِ» قَالَ فَتَكَلَّمَتْ فَقَالَتْ مَنْ أَنْتَ قَالَ أَنَا امْرُؤٌ مِنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ قَالَتْ مِنْ أَيِّ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ؟ قَالَ «مِنْ قُرَيْشٍ» قَالَتْ فَمِنْ أَيِّ قُرَيْشٍ أَنْتَ؟ قَالَ إِنَّكِ لَسَئُولٌ أَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ قَالَتْ مَا بَقَاؤُنَا عَلَى هَذَا الْأَمْرِ الصَّالِحِ الَّذِي جَاءَ اللَّهُ بِهِ بَعْدَ الْجَاهِلِيَّةِ؟ فَقَالَ «بَقَاؤُكُمْ عليْهِ مَا اسْتَقَامَتْ بِكُمْ أَئِمَّتُكُمْ» قَالَتْ وَمَا الْأَئِمَّةُ؟ قَالَ «أَمَا كَانَ لِقَوْمِكِ رُؤَسَاءُ وَأَشْرَافٌ يَأْمُرُونَهُمْ فَيُطِيعُونَهُمْ؟» قَالَتْ بَلَى قَالَ «فَهُمْ مِثْلُ أُولَئِكَ عَلَى النَّاسِ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Abū al-Nuʿmān \u003e Abū ʿAwānah \u003e Bayān b. Bishr \u003e Qays b. Abū Ḥāzim
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو النُّعْمَانِ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَوَانَةَ عَنْ بَيَانٍ بْنِ بِشْرٍ عَنْ قَيْسِ بْنِ أَبِي حَازِمٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 219

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ أَخْذِ الرَّأْيِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the detestation/dislike of taking an opinion

englishRaw: I saw Ibn Mas'ud giving advice to men and women, saying, "Whoever meets a man or a woman, the first greeting should be the first greeting, as you are upon the primordial nature." Abdullah said, "The first greeting is the correct way."   – Sound Chain
body: I saw Ibn Mas'ud giving advice to men and women, saying, "Whoever meets a man or a woman, the first greeting should be the first greeting, as you are upon the primordial nature." Abdullah said, "The first greeting is the correct way."   – Sound Chain
arabic: رَأَيْتُ ابْنَ مَسْعُودٍ يُوصِي الرِّجَالَ وَالنِّسَاءَ وَيَقُولُ «مَنْ أَدْرَكَ مِنْكمْ مِنَ امْرَأَةٍ أَوْ رَجُلٍ فَالسَّمْتَ الْأَوَّلَ السَّمْتُ الْأَوَّلُ فَإِنَّكُمْ عَلَى الْفِطْرَةِ» قَالَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ السَّمْتُ الطَّرِيقُ   – إسناده صحيح
chain: ʿAbdullāh b. Muḥammad \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. Mahdī \u003e Sufyān \u003e Wāṣil \u003e Āmraʾah Yuqāl Lahā ʿĀʾidhah \u003e Raʾayt Ibn Masʿūd Yūṣī al-Rijāl And al-Nnisāʾ
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ مَهْدِيٍّ عَنْ سُفْيَانَ عَنْ وَاصِلٍ عَنِ امْرَأَةٍ يُقَالُ لَهَا عَائِذَةُ قَالَتْ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 220

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ أَخْذِ الرَّأْيِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the detestation/dislike of taking an opinion

englishRaw: For me, Omar said: "Do you know what destroys Islam?" I said, "No." He said, "It is destroyed by the slip of a knowledgeable person, the arguments of a hypocrite with the Book, and the judgments of misguided leaders."   – Sound Chain
body: For me, Omar said: "Do you know what destroys Islam?" I said, "No." He said, "It is destroyed by the slip of a knowledgeable person, the arguments of a hypocrite with the Book, and the judgments of misguided leaders."   – Sound Chain
arabic: لِي عُمَرُ «هَلْ تَعْرِفُ مَا يَهْدِمُ الْإِسْلَامَ؟» قَالَ قُلْتُ لَا قَالَ «يَهْدِمُهُ زَلَّةُ الْعَالِمِ وَجِدَالُ الْمُنَافِقِ بِالْكِتَابِ وَحُكْمُ الْأَئِمَّةِ الْمُضِلِّينَ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿUyaynah \u003e ʿAlī \u003e Ibn Mushir \u003e Abū Isḥāq \u003e al-Shaʿbī \u003e Ziyād b. Ḥudayr \u003e Qāl Lī ʿUmar Hal Taʿrif Mā Yahdim al-Islām \u003e Qult Lā
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عُيَيْنَةَ أَنبَأَنَا عَلِيٌّ هُوَ ابْنُ مُسْهِرٍ عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ عَنِ الشَّعْبِيِّ عَنْ زِيَادِ بْنِ حُدَيْرٍ قَالَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 221

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ أَخْذِ الرَّأْيِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the detestation/dislike of taking an opinion

englishRaw: "Do not sit with the people of disputes, for they delve into the signs of Allah."   – Weak Chain
body: "Do not sit with the people of disputes, for they delve into the signs of Allah."   – Weak Chain
arabic: «لَا تُجَالِسُوا أَصْحَابَ الْخُصُومَاتِ فَإِنَّهُمْ يَخُوضُونَ فِي آيَاتِ اللَّهِ»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Hārūn \u003e Ḥafṣ b. Ghiyāth \u003e Layth \u003e al-Ḥakam \u003e Muḥammad b. ʿAlī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا هَارُونُ عَنْ حَفْصِ بْنِ غِيَاثٍ عَنْ لَيْثٍ عَنِ الْحَكَمِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 222

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ أَخْذِ الرَّأْيِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the detestation/dislike of taking an opinion

englishRaw: "Your tradition, By Allah, there is no deity except Him, stands between extravagance and deprivation. So be patient with it, may Allah have mercy on you. As the people of the Sunnah were the fewest of people in the past, they are also the fewest of people in what remains, those who did not join the people of divisions in their divisions, nor with the people of innovations in their innovations. They have persevered upon their Sunnah until they meet their Lord. So may you be like that, if Allah wills."   – Weak Chain
body: "Your tradition, By Allah, there is no deity except Him, stands between extravagance and deprivation. So be patient with it, may Allah have mercy on you. As the people of the Sunnah were the fewest of people in the past, they are also the fewest of people in what remains, those who did not join the people of divisions in their divisions, nor with the people of innovations in their innovations. They have persevered upon their Sunnah until they meet their Lord. So may you be like that, if Allah wills."   – Weak Chain
arabic: سُنَّتُكُمْ وَاللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ بَيْنَهُمَا بَيْنَ الْغَالِي وَالْجَافِي فَاصْبِرُوا عَلَيْهَا رَحِمَكُمُ اللَّهُ فَإِنَّ أَهْلَ السُّنَّةِ كَانُوا أَقَلَّ النَّاسِ فِيمَا مَضَى وَهُمْ أَقَلُّ النَّاسِ فِيمَا بَقِيَ الَّذِينَ لَمْ يَذْهَبُوا مَعَ أَهْلِ الْإِتْرَافِ فِي إِتْرَافِهِمْ وَلَا مَعَ أَهْلِ الْبِدَعِ فِي بِدَعِهِمْ وَصَبَرُوا عَلَى سُنَّتِهِمْ حَتَّى لَقُوا رَبَّهُمْ فكذاكمْ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ فَكُونُوا   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: al-Ḥusayn b. Manṣūr \u003e Abū Usāmah \u003e Sharīk \u003e al-Mubārak \u003e al-Ḥasan
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ مَنْصُورٍ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو أُسَامَةَ عَنْ شَرِيكٍ عَنْ المُبَارَكٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 223

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ أَخْذِ الرَّأْيِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the detestation/dislike of taking an opinion

englishRaw: "The intention in the Sunnah is better than the effort in innovation."   – Fair Chain
body: "The intention in the Sunnah is better than the effort in innovation."   – Fair Chain
arabic: «الْقَصْدُ فِي السُّنَّةِ خَيْرٌ مِنَ الِاجْتِهَادِ فِي الْبِدْعَةِ»   – إسناده جيد
chain: Mūsá b. Khālid \u003e ʿĪsá b. Yūnus \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e ʿUmārah And Mālik b. al-Ḥārith \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. Yazīd \u003e ʿAbdullāh
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُوسَى بْنُ خَالِدٍ حَدَّثَنَا عِيسَى بْنُ يُونُسَ عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنْ عُمَارَةَ وَمَالِكِ بْنِ الْحَارِثِ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ يَزِيدَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 224

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الِاقْتِدَاءِ بِالْعُلَمَاءِ
chapter.englishTitle: Imitating the Scholars

englishRaw: "I have encountered people, if not for surpassing one of them in intelligence, I would not have surpassed him. It is enough to praise a people to differ from their actions."   – Weak Chain
body: "I have encountered people, if not for surpassing one of them in intelligence, I would not have surpassed him. It is enough to praise a people to differ from their actions."   – Weak Chain
arabic: «لَقَدْ أَدْرَكْتُ أَقْوَامًا لَوْ لَمْ يُجَاوِزْ أَحَدُهُمْ ظُفْرًا لَمَا جَاوَزْتُهُ كَفَى إِزْرَاءً عَلَى قَوْمٍ أَنْ تُخَالَفَ أَفْعَالُهُمْ»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Manṣūr b. Salamah al-Khuzāʿī \u003e Sharīk \u003e Abū Ḥamzah \u003e Ibrāhīm
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مَنْصُورُ بْنُ سَلَمَةَ الْخُزَاعِيُّ عَنْ شَرِيكٍ عَنْ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 225

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الِاقْتِدَاءِ بِالْعُلَمَاءِ
chapter.englishTitle: Imitating the Scholars

englishRaw: "Regarding Ata', obey Allah, obey the Messenger, and those in authority among you." [Surah An-Nisa' 4:59] The people of knowledge and understanding have said that obeying the Messenger entails following the book (Quran) and the Sunnah (his teachings and practices)."   – Sound Chain
body: "Regarding Ata', obey Allah, obey the Messenger, and those in authority among you." [Surah An-Nisa' 4:59] The people of knowledge and understanding have said that obeying the Messenger entails following the book (Quran) and the Sunnah (his teachings and practices)."   – Sound Chain
arabic: عَنْ عَطَاءٍ {أَطِيعُوا اللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُوا الرَّسُولَ وَأُولِي الْأَمْرِ مِنْكُمْ} [النساء 59] قَالَ أُولُو الْعِلْمِ وَالْفِقْهِ وَطَاعَةُ الرَّسُولِ اتِّبَاعُ الْكِتَابِ وَالسُّنَّةِ   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Yaʿlá \u003e ʿAbd al-Malik
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا يَعْلَى حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الْمَلِكِ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 226

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الِاقْتِدَاءِ بِالْعُلَمَاءِ
chapter.englishTitle: Imitating the Scholars

englishRaw: "Regarding something that I had a severe issue with, I said, may Allah have mercy on you, look into it. He said, 'If the path becomes clear to me and I find evidence, I will not hold back.'"   – Sound Chain
body: "Regarding something that I had a severe issue with, I said, may Allah have mercy on you, look into it. He said, 'If the path becomes clear to me and I find evidence, I will not hold back.'"   – Sound Chain
arabic: عَنْ شَيْءٍ وَكَانَتْ عِنْدِي مَسْأَلَةٌ شَدِيدَةٌ فَقُلْتُ رَحِمَكَ اللَّهُ انْظُرْ فِيهَا قَالَ «إِذَا وَضَحَ لِيَ الطَّرِيقُ وَوَجَدْتُ الْأَثَرَ لَمْ أَحْبَسْ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Muḥammad b. Yūsuf \u003e Ibrāhīm b. Adham \u003e Saʾalt Ibn Shubrumah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يُوسُفَ حَدَّثَنَا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ أَدْهَمَ قَالَ سَأَلْتُ ابْنَ شُبْرُمَةَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 227

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الِاقْتِدَاءِ بِالْعُلَمَاءِ
chapter.englishTitle: Imitating the Scholars

englishRaw: The Prophet Muhammad ﷺ said: "Learn knowledge and teach it to others. Learn the obligations (religious duties) and teach them to others. Learn the Quran and teach it to others. For surely, I am a person who will be taken (passed away), and knowledge will decrease, and trials will appear, until two people will differ in a matter of obligation and not find anyone to settle the difference between them."   – Weak
body: The Prophet Muhammad ﷺ said: "Learn knowledge and teach it to others. Learn the obligations (religious duties) and teach them to others. Learn the Quran and teach it to others. For surely, I am a person who will be taken (passed away), and knowledge will decrease, and trials will appear, until two people will differ in a matter of obligation and not find anyone to settle the difference between them."   – Weak
arabic: لِي رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «تَعَلَّمُوا الْعِلْمَ وَعَلِّمُوهُ النَّاسَ تَعَلَّمُوا الْفَرَائِضَ وَعَلِّمُوهُا النَّاسَ تَعَلَّمُوا الْقُرْآنَ وَعَلِّمُوهُ النَّاسَ فَإِنِّي امْرُؤٌ مَقْبُوضٌ وَالْعِلْمُ سَيَنْقُصُ وَتَظْهَرُ الْفِتَنُ حَتَّى يَخْتَلِفَ اثْنَانِ فِي فَرِيضَةٍ لَا يَجِدَانِ أَحَدًا يَفْصِلُ بَيْنَهُمَا»   – ضعيف
chain: ʿUthmān b. al-Haytham \u003e ʿAwf \u003e a man Yuqāl Lah Sulaymān b. Jābir from Ahl Hajar \u003e Ibn Masʿūd
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عُثْمَانُ بْنُ الْهَيْثَمِ حَدَّثَنَا عَوْفٌ عَنْ رَجُلٍ يُقَالُ لَهُ سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ جَابِرٍ مِنْ أَهْلِ هَجَرَ قَالَ قَالَ ابْنُ مَسْعُودٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 228

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الِاقْتِدَاءِ بِالْعُلَمَاءِ
chapter.englishTitle: Imitating the Scholars

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ sent Mu'adh bin Jabal and Abu Musa to Yemen and said, "Support and help each other and make things easy for people. Do not cause disagreements." When they arrived in Yemen, Mu'adh delivered a sermon to the people, urging them to embrace Islam and encouraging them to understand the Quran. He said, "If you do so, then ask me, and I will inform you about the people of Paradise and the people of Hell." They said to Mu'adh, "You have ordered us that when we understand and read, we should ask you to inform us about the people of Paradise and the people of Hell." Mu'adh replied, "When a person is mentioned with goodness, he is from the people of Paradise. And when a person is mentioned with evil, he is from the people of Hell."   – Weak Chain
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ sent Mu'adh bin Jabal and Abu Musa to Yemen and said, "Support and help each other and make things easy for people. Do not cause disagreements." When they arrived in Yemen, Mu'adh delivered a sermon to the people, urging them to embrace Islam and encouraging them to understand the Quran. He said, "If you do so, then ask me, and I will inform you about the people of Paradise and the people of Hell." They said to Mu'adh, "You have ordered us that when we understand and read, we should ask you to inform us about the people of Paradise and the people of Hell." Mu'adh replied, "When a person is mentioned with goodness, he is from the people of Paradise. And when a person is mentioned with evil, he is from the people of Hell."   – Weak Chain
arabic: أَرْسَلَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ مُعَاذَ بْنَ جَبَلٍ وَأَبَا مُوسَى إِلَى الْيَمَنِ قَالَ «تَسَانَدَا وَتَطَاوَعَا ويسِّرا وَلَا تُنَفِّرَا» فَقَدِمَا الْيَمَنَ فَخَطَبَ النَّاسَ مُعَاذٌ فَحَضَّهُمْ عَلَى الْإِسْلَامِ وَأَمَرَهُمْ بِالتَّفَقُّهِ فِي القرْآنِ وَقَالَ إِذَا فَعَلْتُمْ ذَلِكَ فَاسْأَلُونِي أُخْبِرْكُمْ عَنْ أَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ مِنْ أَهْلِ النَّارِ فَمَكَثُوا مَا شَاءَ اللَّهُ أَنْ يَمْكُثُوا فَقَالُوا لِمُعَاذٍ قَدْ كُنْتَ أَمَرْتَنَا إِذَا نَحْنُ تَفَقَّهْنَا وَقَرَأْنَا أَنْ نَسْأَلَكَ فَتُخْبِرَنَا بِأَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ مِنْ أَهْلِ النَّارِ فَقَالَ لَهُمْ مُعَاذٌ إِذَا ذُكِرَ الرَّجُلُ بِخَيْرٍ فَهُوَ مِنْ أَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ وَإِذَا ذُكِرَ بِشَرٍّ فَهُوَ مِنْ أَهْلِ النَّارِ   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Yaʿqūb b. Ibrāhīm \u003e ʿUmar b. Abū Khalīfah \u003e Ziyād b. Mikhrāq Dhakar \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. ʿUmar
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا يَعْقُوبُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ حَدَّثَنَا عُمَرُ بْنُ أَبِي خَلِيفَةَ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ زِيَادَ بْنَ مِخْرَاقٍ ذَكَرَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عُمَرَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 229

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الِاقْتِدَاءِ بِالْعُلَمَاءِ
chapter.englishTitle: Imitating the Scholars

englishRaw: It was said to Messenger of Allah ﷺ as to who was the most worthy of respect amongst people. He said: The most God-conscious amongst you They said: It is not this that we are asking about, whereupon he said: Then he is Yusuf, the Apostle of Aliah and the son of Allah's Apostle, Ya'qub, who was also the son of Allah's Apostle, the friend of Allah (Ibrahim) They said: This is not what we are asking you. He said: You mean the tribes of Arabia? Those who are good in pre-Islamic days are good in Islam (after embracing Islam) when they get an understanding of it.    – Sound Chain
body: It was said to Messenger of Allah ﷺ as to who was the most worthy of respect amongst people. He said: The most God-conscious amongst you They said: It is not this that we are asking about, whereupon he said: Then he is Yusuf, the Apostle of Aliah and the son of Allah's Apostle, Ya'qub, who was also the son of Allah's Apostle, the friend of Allah (Ibrahim) They said: This is not what we are asking you. He said: You mean the tribes of Arabia? Those who are good in pre-Islamic days are good in Islam (after embracing Islam) when they get an understanding of it.    – Sound Chain
arabic: قِيلَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ أَيُّ النَّاسِ أَكْرَمُ؟ قَالَ «أَتْقَاهُمْ» قَالُوا لَيْسَ عَنْ هَذَا نَسْأَلُكَ قَالَ «فَيُوسُفُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ نَبِيُّ اللَّهِ ابْنُ نَبِيِّ اللَّهِ ابْنِ خَلِيلِ اللَّهِ» قَالُوا لَيْسَ عَنْ هَذَا نَسْأَلُكَ قَالَ «فَعَنْ مَعَادِنِ الْعَرَبِ تَسْأَلُونِي؟ خِيَارُهُمْ فِي الْجَاهِلِيَّةِ خِيَارُهُمْ فِي الْإِسْلَامِ إِذَا فَقُهُوا»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Yaʿqūb b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Yaḥyá b. Saʿīd al-Qaṭṭān \u003e ʿUbaydullāh \u003e Saʿīd b. Abū Saʿīd from his father \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا يَعْقُوبُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ سَعِيدٍ الْقَطَّانُ عَنْ عُبَيْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ سَعِيدَ بْنَ أَبِي سَعِيدٍ يُحَدِّثُ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 230

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الِاقْتِدَاءِ بِالْعُلَمَاءِ
chapter.englishTitle: Imitating the Scholars

englishRaw: I heard Messenger of Allah ﷺ saying, "If Allah wants to do good to a person, He makes him comprehend the religion. I am just a distributor, but the grant is from Allah. (And remember) that this nation (true Muslims) will keep on following Allah's teachings strictly and they will not be harmed by any one going on a different path till Allah's order (Day of Judgment) is established."    – Weak Chain
body: I heard Messenger of Allah ﷺ saying, "If Allah wants to do good to a person, He makes him comprehend the religion. I am just a distributor, but the grant is from Allah. (And remember) that this nation (true Muslims) will keep on following Allah's teachings strictly and they will not be harmed by any one going on a different path till Allah's order (Day of Judgment) is established."    – Weak Chain
arabic: سَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ يَقُولُ «مَنْ يُرِدِ اللَّهُ بِهِ خَيْرًا يُفَقِّهْهُ فِي الدِّينِ»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: ʿAbdullāh \u003e Ibn Ṣāliḥ \u003e al-Layth \u003e Yazīd b. ʿAbdullāh b. Usāmah b. al-Hād \u003e ʿAbd al-Wahhāb \u003e Ibn Shihāb \u003e Ḥumayd b. ʿAbd al-Raḥman \u003e Muʿāwiyah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ هُوَ ابْنُ صَالِحٍ حَدَّثَنِي اللَّيْثُ عَنْ يَزِيدَ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ أُسَامَةَ بْنِ الْهَادِ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْوَهَّابِ عَنِ ابْنِ شِهَابٍ عَنْ حُمَيْدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ عَنْ مُعَاوِيَةَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 231

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الِاقْتِدَاءِ بِالْعُلَمَاءِ
chapter.englishTitle: Imitating the Scholars

englishRaw: "The Messenger of Allah said: 'When Allah wills good for a person, He causes him to understand the religion.'"    – Sound Chain
body: "The Messenger of Allah said: 'When Allah wills good for a person, He causes him to understand the religion.'"    – Sound Chain
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «مَنْ يُرِدِ اللَّهُ بِهِ خَيْرًا يُفَقِّهْهُ فِي الدِّينِ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Saʿīd b. Sulaymān \u003e Ismāʿīl b. Jaʿfar \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Saʿīd b. Abū Hind from his father \u003e Ibn ʿAbbās
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا سَعِيدُ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِيلَ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ سَعِيدِ بْنِ أَبِي هِنْدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 232

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الِاقْتِدَاءِ بِالْعُلَمَاءِ
chapter.englishTitle: Imitating the Scholars

englishRaw: I heard Messenger of Allah ﷺ saying, "If Allah wants to do good to a person, He makes him comprehend the religion. I am just a distributor, but the grant is from Allah. (And remember) that this nation (true Muslims) will keep on following Allah's teachings strictly and they will not be harmed by any one going on a different path till Allah's order (Day of Judgment) is established."    – Sound Chain
body: I heard Messenger of Allah ﷺ saying, "If Allah wants to do good to a person, He makes him comprehend the religion. I am just a distributor, but the grant is from Allah. (And remember) that this nation (true Muslims) will keep on following Allah's teachings strictly and they will not be harmed by any one going on a different path till Allah's order (Day of Judgment) is established."    – Sound Chain
arabic: سَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ يَقُولُ «مَنْ يُرِدِ اللَّهُ بِهِ خَيْرًا يُفَقِّهْهُ فِي الدِّينِ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Yazīd b. Hārūn \u003e Ḥammād b. Salamah \u003e Jabalah b. ʿAṭiyyah \u003e Ibn Muḥayrīz \u003e Muʿāwiyah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا يَزِيدُ بْنُ هَارُونَ أَنبَأَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ سَلَمَةَ عَنْ جَبَلَةَ بْنِ عَطِيَّةَ عَنِ ابْنِ مُحَيْرِيزٍ عَنْ مُعَاوِيَةَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 233

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الِاقْتِدَاءِ بِالْعُلَمَاءِ
chapter.englishTitle: Imitating the Scholars

englishRaw: "He witnessed the sermon of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ on the Day of Arafah during the Farewell Pilgrimage. The Prophet ﷺ said, 'O people, I swear by Allah, I do not know whether I will meet you again after this day at this place. May Allah have mercy on those who hear my words today and convey them to others. Perhaps someone who is present, but not the most knowledgeable, may convey it to someone who is more knowledgeable than him.'"   – Sound
body: "He witnessed the sermon of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ on the Day of Arafah during the Farewell Pilgrimage. The Prophet ﷺ said, 'O people, I swear by Allah, I do not know whether I will meet you again after this day at this place. May Allah have mercy on those who hear my words today and convey them to others. Perhaps someone who is present, but not the most knowledgeable, may convey it to someone who is more knowledgeable than him.'"   – Sound
arabic: أَنَّهُ شَهِدَ خُطْبَةَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ فِي يَوْمِ عَرَفَةَ فِي حَجَّةِ الْوَدَاعِ «أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنِّي وَاللَّهِ لَا أَدْرِي لَعَلِّي لَا أَلْقَاكُمْ بَعْدَ يَوْمِي هَذَا بِمَكَانِي هَذَا فَرَحِمَ اللَّهُ مَنْ سَمِعَ مَقَالَتِي الْيَوْمَ فَوَعَاهَا فَرُبَّ حَامِلِ فِقْهٍ وَلَا فِقْهَ لَهُ وَرُبَّ حَامِلِ فِقْهٍ إِلَى مَنْ هُوَ أَفْقَهُ مِنْهُ»   – صحيح
chain: Sulaymān b. Dāwud al-Zahrānī \u003e Ismāʿīl \u003e Ibn Jaʿfar \u003e ʿAmr b. Abū ʿAmr \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. al-Ḥūwayrith \u003e Muḥammad b. Jubayr b. Muṭʿim from his father
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ دَاوُدَ الزَّهْرَانِيُّ أَنبَأَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ هُوَ ابْنُ جَعْفَرٍ حَدَّثَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ أَبِي عَمْرٍو عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ الْحُوَيْرِثِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ جُبَيْرِ بْنِ مُطْعِمٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 234

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الِاقْتِدَاءِ بِالْعُلَمَاءِ
chapter.englishTitle: Imitating the Scholars

englishRaw: "The Messenger of Allah said: 'May Allah cause to flourish a slave (of His) who hears my words and understands them, then he conveys them from me. There are those who have knowledge but no understanding, and there may be those who convey knowledge to those who may have more understanding of it than they do.'"     – Sound
body: "The Messenger of Allah said: 'May Allah cause to flourish a slave (of His) who hears my words and understands them, then he conveys them from me. There are those who have knowledge but no understanding, and there may be those who convey knowledge to those who may have more understanding of it than they do.'"     – Sound
arabic: قَامَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ بِالْخَيْفِ مِنْ مِنًى فَقَالَ «نَضَّرَ اللَّهُ عَبْدًا سَمِعَ مَقَالَتِي فَوَعَاهَا ثُمَّ أَدَّاهَا إِلَى مَنْ لَمْ يَسْمَعْهَا فَرُبَّ حَامِلِ فِقْهٍ لَا فِقْهَ لَهُ وَرُبَّ حَامِلِ فِقْهٍ إِلَى مَنْ هُوَ أَفْقَهُ مِنْهُ»   – صحيح
chain: Aḥmad b. Khālid \u003e Muḥammad \u003e Ibn Isḥāq \u003e al-Zuhrī \u003e Muḥammad b. Jubayr b. Muṭʿim from his father
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ خَالِدٍ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدٌ هُوَ ابْنُ إِسْحَاقَ عَنِ الزُّهْرِيِّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ جُبَيْرِ بْنِ مُطْعِمٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 235

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الِاقْتِدَاءِ بِالْعُلَمَاءِ
chapter.englishTitle: Imitating the Scholars

englishRaw: So I said, "I did not leave Marwan except that he asked me about something, so I went to him and asked him. He said, 'Yes, he asked me about a hadith that I heard from the Messenger of Allah, peace be upon him.' He said, 'May Allah brighten the face of a person who hears a hadith from us and memorizes it, then conveys it to someone who has better understanding of it. There are many carriers of fiqh (knowledge) who are not scholars, and there are many carriers of fiqh who convey it to someone who has better understanding than them.'"   – Sound Chain
body: So I said, "I did not leave Marwan except that he asked me about something, so I went to him and asked him. He said, 'Yes, he asked me about a hadith that I heard from the Messenger of Allah, peace be upon him.' He said, 'May Allah brighten the face of a person who hears a hadith from us and memorizes it, then conveys it to someone who has better understanding of it. There are many carriers of fiqh (knowledge) who are not scholars, and there are many carriers of fiqh who convey it to someone who has better understanding than them.'"   – Sound Chain
arabic: فَقُلْتُ مَا خَرَجَ هَذِهِ السَّاعَةَ مِنْ عِنْدِ مَرْوَانَ إِلَّا وَقَدْ سَأَلَهُ عَنْ شَيْءٍ فَأَتَيْتُهُ فَسَأَلْتُهُ قَالَ نَعَمْ سَأَلَنِي عَنْ حَدِيثٍ سَمِعْتُهُ مِنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ قَالَ «نَضَّرَ اللَّهُ امْرَأً سَمِعَ مِنَّا حَدِيثًا فَحَفِظَهُ فَأَدَّاهُ إِلَى مَنْ هُوَ أَحْفَظُ مِنْهُ فَرُبَّ حَامِلِ فِقْهٍ لَيْسَ بِفَقِيهٍ وَرُبَّ حَامِلِ فِقْهٍ إِلَى مَنْ هُوَ أَفْقَهُ مِنْهُ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: ʿIṣmah b. al-Faḍl \u003e Ḥaramī b. ʿUmārah \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e ʿUmar b. Sulaymān \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. Abān b. ʿUthmān from his father
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عِصْمَةُ بْنُ الْفَضْلِ حَدَّثَنَا حَرَمِيُّ بْنُ عُمَارَةَ عَنْ شُعْبَةَ عَنْ عُمَرَ بْنِ سُلَيْمَانَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبَانَ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ خَرَجَ زَيْدُ بْنُ ثَابِتٍ مِنْ عِنْدِ مَرْوَانَ بْنِ الْحَكَمِ بِنِصْفِ النَّهَارِ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 236

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الِاقْتِدَاءِ بِالْعُلَمَاءِ
chapter.englishTitle: Imitating the Scholars

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ delivered a speech and said, "May Allah bless the person who hears a narration from us and conveys it as he heard it, for perhaps the conveyer understands it better than the listener."   – Sound
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ delivered a speech and said, "May Allah bless the person who hears a narration from us and conveys it as he heard it, for perhaps the conveyer understands it better than the listener."   – Sound
arabic: خَطَبَنَا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ فَقَالَ «نَضَّرَ اللَّهُ امْرءًا سَمِعَ مِنَّا حَدِيثًا فَبَلَّغَهُ كَمَا سَمِعَهُ فَرُبَّ مُبَلَّغٍ أَوْعَى مِنْ سَامِعٍ»   – صحيح
chain: Yaḥyá b. Mūsá \u003e ʿAmr b. Muḥammad al-Qurashī \u003e Isrāʾīl \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. Zubayd al-Yāmī \u003e Abū al-ʿAjlān \u003e Abū al-Dardāʾ
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ مُوسَى حَدَّثَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الْقُرَشِيُّ أَنبَأَنَا إِسْرَائِيلُ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ زُبَيْدٍ الْيَامِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي الْعَجْلَانِ عَنْ أَبِي الدَّرْدَاءِ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 237

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ اتِّقَاءِ الْحَدِيثِ عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ وَالتَّثَبُّتِ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Beware of narrating the Prophet's hadith (sayings) and verifying...

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: “Whoever tells a lie about me deliberately, let him take his place in Hell.”    – Sound Chain
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: “Whoever tells a lie about me deliberately, let him take his place in Hell.”    – Sound Chain
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «مَنْ كَذَبَ عَلَيَّ مُتَعَمِّدًا فَلْيَتَبَوَّأْ مَقْعَدَهُ مِنَ النَّارِ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿĪsá \u003e Hushaym \u003e Abū al-Zubayr \u003e Jābir
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عِيسَى حَدَّثَنَا هُشَيْمٌ أَنبَأَنَا أَبُو الزُّبَيْرِ عَنْ جَابِرٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 238

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ اتِّقَاءِ الْحَدِيثِ عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ وَالتَّثَبُّتِ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Beware of narrating the Prophet's hadith (sayings) and verifying...

englishRaw: ‘Whoever lies upon me intentionally, then let him take his seat in the Fire’.    – Weak Chain
body: ‘Whoever lies upon me intentionally, then let him take his seat in the Fire’.    – Weak Chain
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ قَالَ «مَنْ كَذَبَ عَلَيَّ مُتَعَمِّدًا فَلْيَتَبَوَّأْ مَقْعَدَهُ مِنَ النَّارِ»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿĪsá \u003e Abū ʿAwānah \u003e ʿAbd al-Aʿlá \u003e Saʿīd b. Jubayr \u003e Ibn ʿAbbās
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عِيسَى حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَوَانَةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْأَعْلَى عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ جُبَيْرٍ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 239

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ اتِّقَاءِ الْحَدِيثِ عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ وَالتَّثَبُّتِ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Beware of narrating the Prophet's hadith (sayings) and verifying...

englishRaw: He heard the Prophet ﷺ saying, "Whoever invents a lie about me, let him take his place in Hellfire."   – Sound
body: He heard the Prophet ﷺ saying, "Whoever invents a lie about me, let him take his place in Hellfire."   – Sound
arabic: أَنَّهُ سَمِعَ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ يَقُولُ «مَنْ حَدَّثَ عَنِّي كَذِبًا فَلْيَتَبَوَّأْ مَقْعَدَهُ مِنَ النَّارِ»   – صحيح
chain: ʿAbdullāh b. Ṣāliḥ \u003e al-Layth \u003e Yazīd b. ʿAbdullāh \u003e ʿUmar b. ʿAbdullāh b. ʿUrwah \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. ʿUrwah \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. al-Zubayr \u003e al-Zubayr
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ صَالِحٍ حَدَّثَنِي اللَّيْثُ حَدَّثَنِي يَزِيدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ عُمَرَ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ الزُّبَيْرِ عَنِ الزُّبَيْرِ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 240

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ اتِّقَاءِ الْحَدِيثِ عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ وَالتَّثَبُّتِ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Beware of narrating the Prophet's hadith (sayings) and verifying...

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: “Whoever tells a lie about me deliberately, let him take his place in Hell.”    – Sound
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: “Whoever tells a lie about me deliberately, let him take his place in Hell.”    – Sound
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ قَالَ «مَنْ كَذَبَ عَلَيَّ مُتَعَمِّدًا فَلْيَتَبَوَّأْ مَقْعَدَهُ مِنَ النَّارِ»   – صحيح
chain: Muḥammad b. Ḥumayd \u003e al-Ṣabbāḥ b. Muḥārib \u003e ʿUmar b. ʿAbdullāh b. Yaʿlá b. Murrah from his father from his grandfather
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ حُمَيْدٍ حَدَّثَنِي الصَّبَّاحُ بْنُ مُحَارِبٍ عَنْ عُمَرَ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ يَعْلَى بْنِ مُرَّةَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ جَدِّهِ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 241

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ اتِّقَاءِ الْحَدِيثِ عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ وَالتَّثَبُّتِ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Beware of narrating the Prophet's hadith (sayings) and verifying...

englishRaw: "That I may not mistakenly attribute to you things I have heard from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ or things the Messenger of Allah ﷺ had said, for I have heard him ﷺ saying, 'Whoever lies on me intentionally, let him take his seat in the Fire.'"   – Sound Chain
body: "That I may not mistakenly attribute to you things I have heard from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ or things the Messenger of Allah ﷺ had said, for I have heard him ﷺ saying, 'Whoever lies on me intentionally, let him take his seat in the Fire.'"   – Sound Chain
arabic: أَنْ أُخْطِئَ لَحَدَّثْتُكُمْ بِأَشْيَاءَ سَمِعْتُهَا مِنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ أَوْ قَالَهَا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ وَذَاكَ أَنِّي سَمِعْتُهُ ﷺ يَقُولُ «مَنْ كَذَبَ عَلَيَّ مُتَعَمِّدًا فَلْيَتَبَوَّأْ مَقْعَدَهُ مِنَ النَّارِ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Asad b. Mūsá \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e ʿAttāb \u003e Anas b. Mālik \u003e Lawlā Annī Akhshá
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَسَدُ بْنُ مُوسَى حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ عَنْ عَتَّابٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَنَسَ بْنَ مَالِكٍ يَقُولُ لَوْلَا أَنِّي أَخْشَى

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 242

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ اتِّقَاءِ الْحَدِيثِ عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ وَالتَّثَبُّتِ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Beware of narrating the Prophet's hadith (sayings) and verifying...

englishRaw: ‘Whoever lies upon me intentionally, then let him take his seat in the Fire’.    – Sound Chain
body: ‘Whoever lies upon me intentionally, then let him take his seat in the Fire’.    – Sound Chain
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ أَنَّهُ قَالَ «مَنْ كَذَبَ عَلَيَّ مُتَعَمِّدًا فَلْيَتَبَوَّأْ مَقْعَدَهُ مِنَ النَّارِ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿAbdullāh \u003e Abū Dāwud \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e ʿAbd al-ʿAzīz \u003e Ḥammād b. Abū Sulaymān \u003e al-Taymī \u003e ʿAttāb a freed slave of Ibn Hurmuz Samiʿūā Anas b. Mālik
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ أَنبَأَنَا أَبُو دَاوُدَ عَنْ شُعْبَةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْعَزِيزِ وَعَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ أَبِي سُلَيْمَانَ وَعَنِ التَّيْمِيِّ وَعَنْ عَتَّابٍ مَوْلَى ابْنِ هُرْمُزَ سَمِعُوا أَنَسَ بْنَ مَالِكٍ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 243

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ اتِّقَاءِ الْحَدِيثِ عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ وَالتَّثَبُّتِ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Beware of narrating the Prophet's hadith (sayings) and verifying...

englishRaw: "While he was on this pulpit, I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saying: ' Beware of narrating too many Ahadith from me. Whoever attributes something to me, let him speak the truth faithfully. Whoever attributes to say something that I did not say, let him take his place in Hell."     – Sound Chain
body: "While he was on this pulpit, I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saying: ' Beware of narrating too many Ahadith from me. Whoever attributes something to me, let him speak the truth faithfully. Whoever attributes to say something that I did not say, let him take his place in Hell."     – Sound Chain
arabic: سَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ يَقُولُ عَلَى الْمِنْبَرِ «يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِيَّاكُمْ وَكَثْرَةَ الْحَدِيثِ عَنِّي فَمَنْ قَالَ عَلَيَّ فَلَا يَقُلْ إِلَّا حَقًّا أَوْ إِلَّا صِدْقًا وَمَنْ قَالَ عَلَيَّ مَا لَمْ أَقُلْ فَلْيَتَبَوَّأْ مَقْعَدَهُ مِنَ النَّارِ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Aḥmad b. Khālid \u003e Muḥammad \u003e Ibn Isḥāq \u003e Maʿbad b. Kaʿb \u003e Abū Qatādah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ خَالِدٍ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدٌ هُوَ ابْنُ إِسْحَاقَ عَنْ مَعْبَدِ بْنِ كَعْبٍ عَنْ أَبِي قَتَادَةَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 244

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ اتِّقَاءِ الْحَدِيثِ عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ وَالتَّثَبُّتِ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Beware of narrating the Prophet's hadith (sayings) and verifying...

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: “Whoever tells a lie about me deliberately, let him take his place in Hell.”    – Sound Chain
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: “Whoever tells a lie about me deliberately, let him take his place in Hell.”    – Sound Chain
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «مَنْ كَذَبَ عَلَيَّ مُتَعَمِّدًا فَلْيَتَبَوَّأْ مَقْعَدَهُ مِنَ النَّارِ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Hārūn b. Muʿāwiyah \u003e Ibrāhīm b. Sulaymān \u003e ʿĀṣim al-Aḥwal \u003e Muḥammad b. Bishr \u003e Anas
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا هَارُونُ بْنُ مُعَاوِيَةَ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ سُلَيْمَانَ عَنْ عَاصِمٍ الْأَحْوَلِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ بِشْرٍ عَنْ أَنَسٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 245

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي ذَهَابِ الْعِلْمِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the Departure of Knowledge

englishRaw: the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Allah will not take away knowledge by removing it from people (from their hearts). Rather He will take away knowledge by taking away the scholars, then when there are no scholars left, the people will take the ignorant as their leaders. They will be asked questions and they will issue verdicts without knowledge, thus they will go astray and lead others astray.'"    – Sound
body: the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Allah will not take away knowledge by removing it from people (from their hearts). Rather He will take away knowledge by taking away the scholars, then when there are no scholars left, the people will take the ignorant as their leaders. They will be asked questions and they will issue verdicts without knowledge, thus they will go astray and lead others astray.'"    – Sound
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ إِنَّ اللَّهَ لَا يَقْبِضُ الْعِلْمَ انْتِزَاعًا يَنْتَزِعُهُ مِنَ النَّاسِ وَلَكِنْ قَبْضُ الْعِلْمِ قَبْضُ الْعُلَمَاءِ فَإِذَا لَمْ يُبْقِ عَالِمًا اتَّخَذَ النَّاسُ رُءُوسًا جُهَّالًا فَسُئِلُوا فَأَفْتَوْا بِغَيْرِ عِلْمٍ فَضَلُّوا وَأَضَلُّوا   – صحيح
chain: Jaʿfar b. ʿAwn \u003e Hishām from his father \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. ʿAmr
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا جَعْفَرُ بْنُ عَوْنٍ أَنبَأَنَا هِشَامٌ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 246

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي ذَهَابِ الْعِلْمِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the Departure of Knowledge

englishRaw: From the Messenger of Allah ﷺ , he said, "Acquire knowledge before it disappears." They asked, "How does knowledge disappear, O Prophet of Allah, when we have the Book of Allah among us?" He became angry and then said, "May your mothers lose you! Wasn't the Torah and the Gospel among the children of Israel? Yet they did not benefit from them at all. The disappearance of knowledge is when its carriers vanish."   – Weak Chain
body: From the Messenger of Allah ﷺ , he said, "Acquire knowledge before it disappears." They asked, "How does knowledge disappear, O Prophet of Allah, when we have the Book of Allah among us?" He became angry and then said, "May your mothers lose you! Wasn't the Torah and the Gospel among the children of Israel? Yet they did not benefit from them at all. The disappearance of knowledge is when its carriers vanish."   – Weak Chain
arabic: عَنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ أَنَّهُ قَالَ «خُذُوا الْعِلْمَ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَذْهَبَ» قَالُوا وَكَيْفَ يَذْهَبُ الْعِلْمُ يَا نَبِيَّ اللَّهِ وَفِينَا كِتَابُ اللَّهِ؟ قَالَ فَغَضِبَ ثُمَّ قَالَ «ثَكِلَتْكُمْ أُمَّهَاتُكُمْ أَوَلَمْ تَكُنِ التَّوْرَاةُ وَالْإِنْجِيلُ فِي بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ فَلَمْ يُغْنِيَا عَنْهُمْ شَيْئًا؟ إِنَّ ذَهَابَ الْعِلْمِ أَنْ يَذْهَبَ حَمَلَتُهُ إِنَّ ذَهَابَ الْعِلْمِ أَنْ يَذْهَبَ حَمَلَتُهُ»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Mūsá b. Khālid \u003e Muʿtamir b. Sulaymān \u003e al-Ḥajjāj \u003e al-Walīd b. ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. By Mālik \u003e al-Qāsim Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥman a freed slave of ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. Yazīd \u003e Abū Umāmah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُوسَى بْنُ خَالِدٍ أَنبَأَنَا مُعْتَمِرُ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ عَنِ الْحَجَّاجِ عَنِ الْوَلِيدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أبي مَالِكٍ عَنِ الْقَاسِمِ أَبِي عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ مَوْلَى عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ يَزِيدَ عَنْ أَبِي أُمَامَةَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 247

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي ذَهَابِ الْعِلْمِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the Departure of Knowledge

englishRaw: "When their scholars perish"   – Sound Chain
body: "When their scholars perish"   – Sound Chain
arabic: «إِذَا هَلَكَ عُلَمَاؤُهُمْ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Abū al-Nuʿmān \u003e Thābit b. Yazīd \u003e Hilāl \u003e Ibn Khabbāb \u003e Saʾalt Saʿīd b. Jubayr Qult Yā Abū ʿAbdullāh Mā ʿAlāmah Halāk al-Nās
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو النُّعْمَانِ حَدَّثَنَا ثَابِتُ بْنُ يَزِيدَ حَدَّثَنَا هِلَالٌ هُوَ ابْنُ خَبَّابٍ قَالَ سَأَلْتُ سَعِيدَ بْنَ جُبَيْرٍ قُلْتُ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ مَا عَلَامَةُ هَلَاكِ النَّاسِ؟ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 248

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي ذَهَابِ الْعِلْمِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the Departure of Knowledge

englishRaw: "People will continue to be in good as long as the first one remains to learn or teach the other. But if the first one dies before teaching or learning from the other, people perish."   – Weak Chain
body: "People will continue to be in good as long as the first one remains to learn or teach the other. But if the first one dies before teaching or learning from the other, people perish."   – Weak Chain
arabic: لَا يَزَالُ النَّاسُ بِخَيْرٍ مَا بَقِيَ الْأَوَّلُ حَتَّى يَتَعَلَّمَ أَوْ يُعَلِّمَ الْآخِرَ فَإِذا هَلَكَ الْأَوَّلُ قَبْلَ أَنْ يُعَلِّمَ أَوْ يَتَعَلَّمَ الْآخِرُ هَلَكَ النَّاسُ   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Mālik b. Ismāʿīl
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مَالِكُ بْنُ إِسْمَاعِيلَ حَدَّثَنَا مَسْعُودُ بْنُ سَعْدٍ الْجُعْفِيُّ عَنْ عَطَاءِ بْنِ السَّائِبِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ رُبَيِّعَةَ عَنْ سَلْمَانَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 249

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي ذَهَابِ الْعِلْمِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the Departure of Knowledge

englishRaw: "Do you know where knowledge has gone?" We said, "No." He said, "The departure of the scholars."   – Sound Chain
body: "Do you know where knowledge has gone?" We said, "No." He said, "The departure of the scholars."   – Sound Chain
arabic: «هَلْ تَدْرُونَ مَا ذَهَابُ الْعِلْمِ؟» قُلْنَا لَا قَالَ «ذَهَابُ الْعُلَمَاءِ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Muḥammad b. al-Ṣalt \u003e Abū Kudaynah \u003e Qābūs from his father \u003e Ibn ʿAbbās \u003e Hal Tadrūn Mā Dhahāb al-ʿIlm Qulnā Lā
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الصَّلْتِ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو كُدَيْنَةَ عَنْ قَابُوسَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 250

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي ذَهَابِ الْعِلْمِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the Departure of Knowledge

englishRaw: I said, "Like how a garment is shaken off and how a coin is hardened." He said, "No, and indeed this is the way the knowledge is seized from the scholars."   – Weak Chain
body: I said, "Like how a garment is shaken off and how a coin is hardened." He said, "No, and indeed this is the way the knowledge is seized from the scholars."   – Weak Chain
arabic: قُلْتُ كَمَا يُنْفَضُ الثَّوْبُ وَكَمَا يَقْسُو الدِّرْهَمُ قَالَ «لَا» وَإِنَّ ذَلِكَ لَمِنْهُ قَبْضُ الْعِلْمِ قَبْضُ الْعُلَمَاءِ   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Muḥammad b. Asʿad \u003e Abū Bakr \u003e ʿĀṣim \u003e Abū Wāʾil \u003e Ḥudhayfah Atadrī Kayf Yunqaṣ al-ʿIlm \u003e Kamā Yunfaḍ al-Thawb And Kamā Yaqsū al-Dirham
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَسْعَدَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ عَنْ عَاصِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي وَائِلٍ قَالَ قَالَ حُذَيْفَةُ «أَتَدْرِي كَيْفَ يُنْقَصُ الْعِلْمُ؟» قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 251

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي ذَهَابِ الْعِلْمِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the Departure of Knowledge

englishRaw: Why do I see your scholars go while your ignorant ones do not learn? Learn before knowledge is lifted, for the lifting of knowledge is the departure of scholars.   – Weak Chain
body: Why do I see your scholars go while your ignorant ones do not learn? Learn before knowledge is lifted, for the lifting of knowledge is the departure of scholars.   – Weak Chain
arabic: «مَا لِي أَرَى عُلَمَاءَكُمْ يَذْهَبُونَ وَجُهَّالَكُمْ لَا يَتَعَلَّمُونَ؟ تعلَّموا قَبْلَ أَنْ يُرْفَعَ الْعِلْمُ فَإِنَّ رَفْعَ الْعِلْمِ ذَهَابُ الْعُلَمَاءِ»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Muḥammad b. al-Ṣalt \u003e Manṣūr b. Abū al-Aswad \u003e Ḥuṣayn \u003e Sālim b. Abū al-Jaʿd \u003e Abū al-Dardāʾ
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الصَّلْتِ عَنْ مَنْصُورِ بْنِ أَبِي الْأَسْوَدِ عَنْ حُصَيْنٍ عَنْ سَالِمِ بْنِ أَبِي الْجَعْدِ عَنْ أَبِي الدَّرْدَاءِ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 252

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي ذَهَابِ الْعِلْمِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the Departure of Knowledge

englishRaw: "People are knowledgeable and educated, and there is no good in anything after that."   – Weak Chain
body: "People are knowledgeable and educated, and there is no good in anything after that."   – Weak Chain
arabic: «النَّاسُ عَالِمٌ وَمُتَعَلِّمٌ وَلَا خَيْرَ فِيمَا بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Aḥmad b. Asad Abū ʿĀṣim \u003e ʿAbthar \u003e Burd \u003e Sulaymān b. Mūsá \u003e Abū al-Dardāʾ
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ أَسَدٍ أَبُو عَاصِمٍ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْثَرٌ عَنْ بُرْدٍ عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ مُوسَى عَنْ أَبِي الدَّرْدَاءِ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 253

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي ذَهَابِ الْعِلْمِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the Departure of Knowledge

englishRaw: The teacher of goodness and the learner in reward are equal, and there is no better (reward) for the rest of the people.
body: The teacher of goodness and the learner in reward are equal, and there is no better (reward) for the rest of the people.
arabic: «مُعَلِّمُ الْخَيْرِ وَالْمُتَعَلِّمُ فِي الْأَجْرِ سَوَاءٌ وَلَيْسَ لِسَائِرِ النَّاسِ بَعْدُ خَيْرٌ»
chain: Aḥmad b. Asad Abū ʿĀṣim \u003e ʿAbthar \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e Sālim \u003e Abū al-Dardāʾ
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ أَسَدٍ أَبُو عَاصِمٍ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْثَرٌ عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنْ سَالِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي الدَّرْدَاءِ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 254

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي ذَهَابِ الْعِلْمِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the Departure of Knowledge

englishRaw: "Be a scholar, a learner, or a listener, and do not be the fourth, for it will lead to your destruction."   – Weak Chain
body: "Be a scholar, a learner, or a listener, and do not be the fourth, for it will lead to your destruction."   – Weak Chain
arabic: «اغْدُ عَالِمًا أَوْ مُتَعَلِّمًا أَوْ مُسْتَمِعًا وَلَا تَكُنِ الرَّابِعَ فَتَهْلِكَ»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Qabīṣah \u003e Sufyān \u003e ʿAṭāʾ b. al-Sāʾib \u003e al-Ḥasan \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Masʿūd
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا قَبِيصَةُ أَنبَأَنَا سُفْيَانُ عَنْ عَطَاءِ بْنِ السَّائِبِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مَسْعُودٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 255

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي ذَهَابِ الْعِلْمِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the Departure of Knowledge

englishRaw: Salman said, "People will continue to be in good as long as the first person learns, and when the first person dies before the last person learns, people will perish."
body: Salman said, "People will continue to be in good as long as the first person learns, and when the first person dies before the last person learns, people will perish."
arabic: سَلْمَانُ «لَا يَزَالُ النَّاسُ بِخَيْرٍ مَا بَقِيَ الْأَوَّلُ حَتَّى يَتَعَلَّمَ الْآخِرُ فَإِذَا هَلَكَ الْأَوَّلُ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَتَعَلَّمَ الْآخِرُ هَلَكَ النَّاسُ»
chain: ʿAmr b. ʿAwn \u003e Khālid \u003e ʿAṭāʾ b. al-Sāʾib \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Rubayyiʿah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ عَوْنٍ أَنبَأَنَا خَالِدٌ عَنْ عَطَاءِ بْنِ السَّائِبِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ رُبَيِّعَةَ قَالَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 256

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي ذَهَابِ الْعِلْمِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the Departure of Knowledge

englishRaw: "To be blackened/ darkened"   – Sound Chain
body: "To be blackened/ darkened"   – Sound Chain
arabic: أَنْ تُسَوَّدُوا»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: And Hb b. Jarīr And ʿUthmān b. ʿUmar \u003e Ibn ʿAwn \u003e Muḥammad \u003e al-Aḥnaf \u003e ʿUmar Tafaqqahūā Qabl
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا وَهْبُ بْنُ جَرِيرٍ وَعُثْمَانُ بْنُ عُمَرَ قَالَا أَنبَأَنَا ابْنُ عَوْنٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْأَحْنَفِ قَالَ قَالَ عُمَرُ «تَفَقَّهُوا قَبْلَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 257

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابٌ فِي ذَهَابِ الْعِلْمِ
chapter.englishTitle: In the Departure of Knowledge

englishRaw: "People excelled in building during the time of Umar, so Umar said, 'O tribe of Arabs, the land, the land! There is no Islam without a community, and there is no community without leadership, and there is no leadership without obedience. Whoever guides his people towards understanding will have a good life for himself and his people, and whoever leads his people astray from understanding will bring destruction upon himself and his people.'"   – Weak Chain
body: "People excelled in building during the time of Umar, so Umar said, 'O tribe of Arabs, the land, the land! There is no Islam without a community, and there is no community without leadership, and there is no leadership without obedience. Whoever guides his people towards understanding will have a good life for himself and his people, and whoever leads his people astray from understanding will bring destruction upon himself and his people.'"   – Weak Chain
arabic: تَطَاوَلَ النَّاسُ فِي الْبِنَاءِ فِي زَمَنِ عُمَرَ فَقَالَ عُمَرُ «يَا مَعْشَرَ الْعُرَيْبِ الْأَرْضَ الْأَرْضَ إِنَّهُ لَا إِسْلَامَ إِلَّا بِجَمَاعَةٍ وَلَا جَمَاعَةَ إِلَّا بِإِمَارَةٍ وَلَا إِمَارَةَ إِلَّا بِطَاعَةٍ فَمَنْ سَوَّدَهُ قَوْمُهُ عَلَى الْفِقْهِ كَانَ حَيَاةً لَهُ وَلَهُمْ وَمَنْ سَوَّدَهُ قَوْمُهُ عَلَى غَيْرِ فِقْهٍ كَانَ هَلَاكًا لَهُ وَلَهُمْ»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Yazīd b. Hārūn \u003e Baqiyyah \u003e Ṣafwān b. Rustum \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. Maysarah \u003e Tamīm al-Dārī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا يَزِيدُ بْنُ هَارُونَ أَنبَأَنَا بَقِيَّةُ حَدَّثَنِي صَفْوَانُ بْنُ رُسْتُمَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ مَيْسَرَةَ عَنْ تَمِيمٍ الدَّارِيِّ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 258

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْعَمَلِ بِالْعِلْمِ وَحُسْنِ النِّيَّةِ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Working with knowledge and good intentions in it

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Allah the Almighty says: 'I do not accept all the words of the wise, but I accept his concerns and desires. If his concerns and desires are in obedience to Me, I make his silence a praise for Me and a dignity. But if he does not speak...   – Weak Chain
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Allah the Almighty says: 'I do not accept all the words of the wise, but I accept his concerns and desires. If his concerns and desires are in obedience to Me, I make his silence a praise for Me and a dignity. But if he does not speak...   – Weak Chain
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ قَالَ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى إِنِّي لَسْتُ كُلَّ كَلَامِ الْحَكِيمِ أَتَقَبَّلُ وَلَكِنِّي أَتَقَبَّلُ هَمَّهُ وَهَوَاهُ فَإِنْ كَانَ هَمُّهُ وَهَوَاهُ فِي طَاعَتِي جَعَلْتُ صَمْتَهُ حَمْدًا لِي وَوَقَارًا وَإِنْ لَمْ يَتَكَلَّمْ   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Muḥammad b. al-Mubārak \u003e Baqiyyah \u003e Ṣadaqah b. ʿAbdullāh \u003e al-Muhāṣir b. Ḥabīb
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُبَارَكِ أَنبَأَنَا بَقِيَّةُ حَدَّثَنَا صَدَقَةُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ أَنَّ الْمُهَاصِرَ بْنَ حَبِيبٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 259

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْعَمَلِ بِالْعِلْمِ وَحُسْنِ النِّيَّةِ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Working with knowledge and good intentions in it

englishRaw: "I spread knowledge in the end of time so that men, women, slaves, free people, young, and old may acquire it. When I do that with them, I have taken them by my right upon them."   – Sound Chain
body: "I spread knowledge in the end of time so that men, women, slaves, free people, young, and old may acquire it. When I do that with them, I have taken them by my right upon them."   – Sound Chain
arabic: «أَبُثُّ الْعِلْمَ فِي آخِرِ الزَّمَانِ حَتَّى يَعْلَمَهُ الرَّجُلُ وَالْمَرْأَةُ وَالْعَبْدُ وَالْحُرُّ وَالصَّغِيرُ وَالْكَبِيرُ فَإِذَا فَعَلْتُ ذَلِكَ بِهِمْ أَخَذْتُهُمْ بِحَقِّي عَلَيْهِمْ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Makhlad b. Mālik \u003e Ḥajjāj b. Muḥammad \u003e Layth b. Saʿd \u003e Muʿāwiyah b. Ṣāliḥ \u003e Abū al-Zāhiriyyah Yarfaʿ al-Ḥadīth n Allāh
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مَخْلَدُ بْنُ مَالِكٍ عَنْ حَجَّاجِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ لَيْثِ بْنِ سَعْدٍ عَنْ مُعَاوِيَةَ بْنِ صَالِحٍ عَنْ أَبِي الزَّاهِرِيَّةِ يَرْفَعُ الْحَدِيثَ أنَّ اللَّهَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 260

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْعَمَلِ بِالْعِلْمِ وَحُسْنِ النِّيَّةِ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Working with knowledge and good intentions in it

englishRaw: "Whoever seeks something from this knowledge and intends with it what is with Allah, he will attain it if Allah wills. And whoever intends with it worldly gain, then that is his portion from it by Allah."   – Sound Chain
body: "Whoever seeks something from this knowledge and intends with it what is with Allah, he will attain it if Allah wills. And whoever intends with it worldly gain, then that is his portion from it by Allah."   – Sound Chain
arabic: «مَنْ طَلَبَ شَيْئًا مِنْ هَذَا الْعِلْمِ فَأَرَادَ بِهِ مَا عِنْدَ اللَّهِ يُدْرِكْ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ وَمَنْ أَرَادَ بِهِ الدُّنْيَا فَذَاكَ وَاللَّهِ حَظُّهُ مِنْهُ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Makhlad b. Mālik \u003e Makhlad b. Ḥusayn \u003e Hishām \u003e al-Ḥasan
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مَخْلَدُ بْنُ مَالِكٍ حَدَّثَنَا مَخْلَدُ بْنُ حُسَيْنٍ عَنْ هِشَامٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 261

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْعَمَلِ بِالْعِلْمِ وَحُسْنِ النِّيَّةِ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Working with knowledge and good intentions in it

englishRaw: Ibn Mas'ood said: "Do not seek knowledge for three reasons: to argue with fools, to debate with scholars, and to attract people's attention towards yourselves. Seek with your words what is with Allah, for it will endure and remain, while everything else will eventually perish."   – Weak Chain
body: Ibn Mas'ood said: "Do not seek knowledge for three reasons: to argue with fools, to debate with scholars, and to attract people's attention towards yourselves. Seek with your words what is with Allah, for it will endure and remain, while everything else will eventually perish."   – Weak Chain
arabic: ابْنُ مَسْعُودٍ «لَا تَعَلَّمُوا الْعِلْمَ لِثَلَاثٍ لِتُمَارُوا بِهِ السُّفَهَاءَ وَتُجَادِلُوا بِهِ الْعُلَمَاءَ وَلِتَصْرِفُوا بِهِ وُجُوهَ النَّاسِ إِلَيْكُمْ وَابْتَغُوا بِقَوْلِكُمْ مَا عِنْدَ اللَّهِ فَإِنَّهُ يَدُومُ وَيَبْقَى وَيَنْفَدُ مَا سِوَاهُ»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Yaʿlá \u003e Muḥammad b. ʿAwn \u003e Ibrāhīm b. ʿĪsá
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا يَعْلَى حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَوْنٍ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ عِيسَى قَالَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 262

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْعَمَلِ بِالْعِلْمِ وَحُسْنِ النِّيَّةِ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Working with knowledge and good intentions in it

englishRaw: "Be the springs of knowledge, the lamps of guidance, the abodes of houses, the lanterns of the night, the renewers of hearts, the creators of garments. You are known to the people of the heavens and hidden to the people of the earth."   – Weak Chain
body: "Be the springs of knowledge, the lamps of guidance, the abodes of houses, the lanterns of the night, the renewers of hearts, the creators of garments. You are known to the people of the heavens and hidden to the people of the earth."   – Weak Chain
arabic: «كُونُوا يَنَابِيعَ الْعِلْمِ مَصَابِيحَ الْهُدَى أَحْلَاسَ الْبُيُوتِ سُرُجَ اللَّيْلِ جُدُدَ الْقُلُوبِ خُلْقَانَ الثِّيَابِ تُعْرَفُونَ فِي أَهْلِ السَّمَاءِ وَتَخْفَوْنَ عَلَى أَهْلِ الْأَرْضِ»   – إسناده ضعيف
chainArabic: وَبِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 263

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْعَمَلِ بِالْعِلْمِ وَحُسْنِ النِّيَّةِ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Working with knowledge and good intentions in it

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "No one seeks this knowledge except for worldly gains, but Allah will prohibit them from entering Paradise on the Day of Judgment."   – Sound Chain
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "No one seeks this knowledge except for worldly gains, but Allah will prohibit them from entering Paradise on the Day of Judgment."   – Sound Chain
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «لَا يَطْلُبُ هَذَا الْعِلْمَ أَحَدٌ لَا يُرِيدُ بِهِ إِلَّا الدُّنْيَا إِلَّا حَرَّمَ اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ عَرْفَ الْجَنَّةِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Abū ʿĀṣim \u003e Muḥammad b. ʿUmārah b. Ḥazm \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. ʿAbd al-Raḥman
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو عَاصِمٍ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عُمَارَةَ بْنِ حَزْمٍ حَدَّثَنِي عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 264

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْعَمَلِ بِالْعِلْمِ وَحُسْنِ النِّيَّةِ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Working with knowledge and good intentions in it

englishRaw: "The knowledgeable one is the one who fears Allah, Mighty and Majestic."   – Sound Chain
body: "The knowledgeable one is the one who fears Allah, Mighty and Majestic."   – Sound Chain
arabic: «الْعَالِمُ مَنْ يَخَافُ اللَّهَ» ﷻ   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Mujāhid b. Mūsá \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Numayr \u003e Mālik b. Mighwal \u003e a man Lilshhaʿbī Aftinī Ayyuhā al-ʿĀlim
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُجَاهِدُ بْنُ مُوسَى حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ نُمَيْرٍ عَنْ مَالِكِ بْنِ مِغْوَلٍ قَالَ قَالَ رَجُلٌ لِلشَّعْبِيِّ أَفْتِنِي أَيُّهَا الْعَالِمُ فَقَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 265

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْعَمَلِ بِالْعِلْمِ وَحُسْنِ النِّيَّةِ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Working with knowledge and good intentions in it

englishRaw: "Learn knowledge so that you may be recognized by it and act upon it so that you may be considered amongst its people. For surely, there will come a time after this where the people will not recognize their own nineteen attributes, and none will be safe from it except for every sleeper. Those are the leaders of guidance and the lanterns of knowledge, they are not the followers of mischief or the spreaders of lies." Abu Muhammad said, "A sleeper is oblivious to evil, and the spreaders of lies talk excessively, and the gossipers are those who pass on rumors."
body: "Learn knowledge so that you may be recognized by it and act upon it so that you may be considered amongst its people. For surely, there will come a time after this where the people will not recognize their own nineteen attributes, and none will be safe from it except for every sleeper. Those are the leaders of guidance and the lanterns of knowledge, they are not the followers of mischief or the spreaders of lies." Abu Muhammad said, "A sleeper is oblivious to evil, and the spreaders of lies talk excessively, and the gossipers are those who pass on rumors."
arabic: «تَعَلَّمُوا الْعِلْمَ تُعْرَفُوا بِهِ وَاعْمَلُوا بِهِ تَكُونُوا مِنْ أَهْلِهِ فَإِنَّهُ سَيَأْتِي بَعْدَ هَذَا زَمَانٌ لَا يَعْرِفُ فِيهِ تِسْعَةُ عُشَرَائِهِمُ الْمَعْرُوفَ وَلَا يَنْجُو مِنْهُ إِلَّا كُلُّ نُوَمَةٍ فَأُولَئِكَ أَئِمَّةُ الْهُدَى وَمَصَابِيحُ الْعِلْمِ لَيْسُوا بِالْمَسَايِيحِ وَلَا الْمَذَايِيعِ الْبُذْرِ» قَالَ أَبُو مُحَمَّدٍ نُوَمَةٌ غَافِلٌ عَنِ الشَّرِّ الْمَذَايِيعُ كَثِيرُ الْكَلَامِ وَالْبُذْرُ النَّمَّامُونَ
chain: ʿUthmān b. ʿUmar \u003e ʿUmar b. Mazyad \u003e Awfá b. Dalham \u003e Balaghah \u003e ʿAlī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عُثْمَانُ بْنُ عُمَرَ حَدَّثَنَا عُمَرُ بْنُ مَزْيَدٍ عَنْ أَوْفَى بْنِ دَلْهَمٍ أَنَّهُ بَلَغَهُ عَنْ عَلِيٍّ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 266

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْعَمَلِ بِالْعِلْمِ وَحُسْنِ النِّيَّةِ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Working with knowledge and good intentions in it

englishRaw: "To know that Allah will not reward you with knowledge until you act upon it."   – Weak
body: "To know that Allah will not reward you with knowledge until you act upon it."   – Weak
arabic: أَنْ تَعْلَمُوا فَلَنْ يَأْجُرَكُمُ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى بِالْعِلْمِ حَتَّى تَعْمَلُوا»   – ضعيف
chain: Marwān b. Muḥammad \u003e Saʿīd b. ʿAbd al-ʿAzīz \u003e Yazīd b. Jābir \u003e Muʿādh b. Jabal Āʿmalūā Mā Shiʾtum Baʿd
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مَرْوَانُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ حَدَّثَنَا سَعِيدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْعَزِيزِ عَنْ يَزِيدَ بْنِ جَابِرٍ قَالَ قَالَ مُعَاذُ بْنُ جَبَلٍ «اعْمَلُوا مَا شِئْتُمْ بَعْدَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 267

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْعَمَلِ بِالْعِلْمِ وَحُسْنِ النِّيَّةِ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Working with knowledge and good intentions in it

englishRaw: "We speak or find in books that whoever Allah, the Almighty, bestows knowledge upon and acts upon it in a way of guidance, He will deprive him of his intellect until Allah takes it back."   – Weak
body: "We speak or find in books that whoever Allah, the Almighty, bestows knowledge upon and acts upon it in a way of guidance, He will deprive him of his intellect until Allah takes it back."   – Weak
arabic: «إِنَّا لَنَتَحَدَّثُ أَوْ نَجِدُ فِي الْكُتُبِ أَنَّهُ مَا آتَى اللَّهُ سُبْحَانَهُ عَبْدًا عِلْمًا فَعَمِلَ بِهِ عَلَى سَبِيلِ الْهُدَى فَيَسْلُبَهُ عَقْلَهُ حَتَّى يَقْبِضَهُ اللَّهُ إِلَيْهِ»   – ضعيف
chain: ʿAbdullāh b. Khālid b. Ḥāzim \u003e al-Walīd b. Mazyad \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. Yazīd b. Jābir \u003e Saʿd \u003e Atá Ibn Munabbih Fasaʾalah \u003e al-Ḥasan \u003e Lah Kayf ʿAqluh Faʾakhbarah Thum
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ خَالِدِ بْنِ حَازِمٍ حَدَّثَنَا الْوَلِيدُ بْنُ مَزْيَدٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ عَبْدَ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنَ يَزِيدَ بْنِ جَابِرٍ يُحَدِّثُ عَنْ سَعْدٍ أَنَّهُ أَتَى ابْنَ مُنَبِّهٍ فَسَأَلَهُ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ وَقَالَ لَهُ كَيْفَ عَقْلُهُ؟ فَأَخْبَرَهُ ثُمَّ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 268

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْعَمَلِ بِالْعِلْمِ وَحُسْنِ النِّيَّةِ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Working with knowledge and good intentions in it

englishRaw: I heard Abu Darda say, "Indeed, from the worst of people in the sight of Allah on the Day of Resurrection is a scholar who does not benefit from his knowledge."   – Weak Chain
body: I heard Abu Darda say, "Indeed, from the worst of people in the sight of Allah on the Day of Resurrection is a scholar who does not benefit from his knowledge."   – Weak Chain
arabic: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا الدَّرْدَاءِ يَقُولُ «إِنَّ مِنْ أَشَرِّ النَّاسِ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ مَنْزِلَةً يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ عَالِمٌ لَا يَنْتَفِعُ بِعِلْمِهِ»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Ismāʿīl b. Abān \u003e Ibn al-Qāsim b. Qays \u003e Yūnus b. Sayf al-Ḥimṣī \u003e Abū Kabshah al-Salūlī \u003e Abū al-Dardāʾ
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ أَبَانَ عَنِ ابْنِ الْقَاسِمِ بْنِ قَيْسٍ قال حَدَّثَنِي يُونُسُ بْنُ سَيْفٍ الْحِمْصِيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو كَبْشَةَ السَّلُولِيُّ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 269

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْعَمَلِ بِالْعِلْمِ وَحُسْنِ النِّيَّةِ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Working with knowledge and good intentions in it

englishRaw: Abu Darda said, "Whoever increases in knowledge, increases in pain."   – Weak Chain
body: Abu Darda said, "Whoever increases in knowledge, increases in pain."   – Weak Chain
arabic: أَبُو الدَّرْدَاءِ «مَنْ يَزْدَدْ عِلْمًا يَزْدَدْ وَجَعًا»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: ʿAmr b. ʿAwn \u003e Abū Qudāmah \u003e Mālik b. Dīnār
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ عَوْنٍ أَنبَأَنَا أَبُو قُدَامَةَ عَنْ مَالِكِ بْنِ دِينَارٍ قَالَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 270

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْعَمَلِ بِالْعِلْمِ وَحُسْنِ النِّيَّةِ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Working with knowledge and good intentions in it

englishRaw: I am not afraid to be told what I do not know, but I am afraid to be told what I have done.
body: I am not afraid to be told what I do not know, but I am afraid to be told what I have done.
arabic: مَا أَخَافُ عَلَى نَفْسِي أَنْ يُقَالَ لِي مَا عَلِمْتَ وَلَكِنْ أَخَافُ أَنْ يُقَالَ لِي مَاذَا عَمِلْتَ؟
chain: Abū al-Dardā
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا وقالَ أَبُو الدَّرْدَاءِ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 271

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْعَمَلِ بِالْعِلْمِ وَحُسْنِ النِّيَّةِ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Working with knowledge and good intentions in it

englishRaw: Studying knowledge for an hour during the night is better than reviving it.   – Weak Chain
body: Studying knowledge for an hour during the night is better than reviving it.   – Weak Chain
arabic: «تَدَارُسُ الْعِلْمِ سَاعَةً مِنَ اللَّيْلِ خَيْرٌ مِنْ إِحْيَائِهَا»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Hārūn b. Muʿāwiyah \u003e Ḥafṣ b. Ghiyāth \u003e Ibn Jurayj \u003e ʿAmman \u003e Ibn ʿAbbās
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا هَارُونُ بْنُ مُعَاوِيَةَ عَنْ حَفْصِ بْنِ غِيَاثٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ ابْنَ جُرَيْجٍ يَذْكُرُ عَمَّنْ حَدَّثَهُ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 272

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْعَمَلِ بِالْعِلْمِ وَحُسْنِ النِّيَّةِ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Working with knowledge and good intentions in it

englishRaw: He informed us and Abu Huraira said, "Indeed, I divide the night into three parts. I sleep for one third, I stand in worship for one third, and I remember the sayings of the Messenger of Allah, peace be upon him, for one third."
body: He informed us and Abu Huraira said, "Indeed, I divide the night into three parts. I sleep for one third, I stand in worship for one third, and I remember the sayings of the Messenger of Allah, peace be upon him, for one third."
arabic: أَخْبَرَنَا وَقَالَ أَبُو هُرَيْرَةَ إِنِّي لَأُجَزِّئُ اللَّيْلَ ثَلَاثَةَ أَجْزَاءٍ فَثُلُثٌ أَنَامُ وَثُلُثٌ أَقُومُ وَثُلُثٌ أَتَذَكَّرُ أَحَادِيثَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 273

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ الْعَمَلِ بِالْعِلْمِ وَحُسْنِ النِّيَّةِ فِيهِ
chapter.englishTitle: Working with knowledge and good intentions in it

englishRaw: "Whoever seeks something from knowledge, seeking thereby the Face of Allah, Exalted is He, Allah will grant him from it what is sufficient for him."   – Sound Chain
body: "Whoever seeks something from knowledge, seeking thereby the Face of Allah, Exalted is He, Allah will grant him from it what is sufficient for him."   – Sound Chain
arabic: «مَنِ ابْتَغَى شَيْئًا مِنَ الْعِلْمِ يَبْتَغِي بِهِ وَجْهَ اللَّهِ سُبْحَانَهُ آتَاهُ اللَّهُ مِنْهُ مَا يَكْفِيهِ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: al-Ḥasan b. ʿArafah \u003e Jarīr \u003e al-Ḥasan b. ʿAmr \u003e Ibrāhīm
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا الْحَسَنُ بْنُ عَرَفَةَ حَدَّثَنَا جَرِيرٌ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 274

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا مَخَافَةَ السَّقَطِ
chapter.englishTitle: Who fears danger?

englishRaw: According to a narration that was narrated to me, I said, "Indeed, it is attributed to the Prophet ﷺ." He (the narrator) replied, "No, it is more beloved to us that if there is an increase or decrease [in the narration], it is attributed to someone other than the Prophet ﷺ."   – Sound Chain
body: According to a narration that was narrated to me, I said, "Indeed, it is attributed to the Prophet ﷺ." He (the narrator) replied, "No, it is more beloved to us that if there is an increase or decrease [in the narration], it is attributed to someone other than the Prophet ﷺ."   – Sound Chain
arabic: عَنْ حَدِيثٍ فَحَدَّثَنِيهِ فَقُلْتُ إِنَّهُ يُرْفَعُ إِلَى النَّبِيِّ ﷺ فَقَالَ «لَا عَلَى مَنْ دُونَ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ أَحَبُّ إِلَيْنَا فَإِنْ كَانَ فِيهِ زِيَادَةٌ أَوْ نُقْصَانٌ كَانَ عَلَى مَنْ دُونَ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Abū al-Nuʿmān \u003e Thābit b. Yazīd \u003e ʿĀṣim \u003e Saʾalt al-Shaʿbī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو النُّعْمَانِ حَدَّثَنَا ثَابِتُ بْنُ يَزِيدَ حَدَّثَنَا عَاصِمٌ قَالَ سَأَلْتُ الشَّعْبِيَّ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 275

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا مَخَافَةَ السَّقَطِ
chapter.englishTitle: Who fears danger?

englishRaw: The Prophet Muhammad ﷺ prohibited engaging in mukhaalah and muzabana. It was said to him, "Do you not preserve any other hadith from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ?" He replied, "Yes, but I say what Abdullah said, and Alqamah said it is more beloved to me."   – Sound Chain
body: The Prophet Muhammad ﷺ prohibited engaging in mukhaalah and muzabana. It was said to him, "Do you not preserve any other hadith from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ?" He replied, "Yes, but I say what Abdullah said, and Alqamah said it is more beloved to me."   – Sound Chain
arabic: «نَهَى رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ عَنِ الْمُحَاقَلَةِ وَالْمُزَابَنَةِ» فَقِيلَ لَهُ أَمَا تَحْفَظُ عَنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ حَدِيثًا غَيْرَ هَذَا قَالَ بَلَى وَلَكِنْ أَقُولُ قَالَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ قَالَ عَلْقَمَةُ أَحَبُّ إِلَيَّ   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Isḥāq b. ʿĪsá \u003e Ḥammād b. Zayd \u003e Abū Hāshim \u003e Ibrāhīm
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ عِيسَى حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ زَيْدٍ عَنْ أَبِي هَاشِمٍ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 276

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا مَخَافَةَ السَّقَطِ
chapter.englishTitle: Who fears danger?

englishRaw: Abu Darda used to say, when he spoke about a Hadith from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, "This is it, or similar to it, or resembling it, or bearing its form."   – Weak Chain
body: Abu Darda used to say, when he spoke about a Hadith from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, "This is it, or similar to it, or resembling it, or bearing its form."   – Weak Chain
arabic: كَانَ أَبُو الدَّرْدَاءِ إِذَا حَدَّثَ بِحَدِيثٍ عَنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ قَالَ هَذَا أَوْ نَحْوَهُ أَوْ شِبْهَهُ أَوْ شَكْلَهُ   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Muḥammad b. Kathīr \u003e al-Awzāʿī \u003e Ismāʿīl b. ʿUbaydullāh
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ كَثِيرٍ عَنِ الْأَوْزَاعِيِّ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِيلَ بْنِ عُبَيْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 277

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا مَخَافَةَ السَّقَطِ
chapter.englishTitle: Who fears danger?

englishRaw: Abu Darda used to say, whenever he narrated a hadith: "O Allah, grant it (the hadith) to be in this manner or similar to it."
body: Abu Darda used to say, whenever he narrated a hadith: "O Allah, grant it (the hadith) to be in this manner or similar to it."
arabic: كَانَ أَبُو الدَّرْدَاءِ إِذَا حَدَّثَ حَدِيثًا قَالَ اللَّهُمَّ إِلَّا هَكَذَا أَوْ كَشَكْلِهِ
chain: Asad b. Mūsá \u003e Muʿāwiyah \u003e Rabīʿah b. Yazīd
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَسَدُ بْنُ مُوسَى حَدَّثَنَا مُعَاوِيَةُ عَنْ رَبِيعَةَ بْنِ يَزِيدَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 278

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا مَخَافَةَ السَّقَطِ
chapter.englishTitle: Who fears danger?

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah said, "It was a dark night, and then the Messenger of Allah said, and his eyes bulged and his veins swelled, and I saw him as if his buttons were loosed and he said, 'Or like it, or similar to it, or something like it.'"   – Sound Chain
body: The Messenger of Allah said, "It was a dark night, and then the Messenger of Allah said, and his eyes bulged and his veins swelled, and I saw him as if his buttons were loosed and he said, 'Or like it, or similar to it, or something like it.'"   – Sound Chain
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ حَتَّى كَانَتْ ذَاتَ عَشِيَّةٍ فَقَالَ «قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ» قَالَ فَاغْرَوْرَقَتْ عَيْنَاهُ وَانْتَفَخَتْ أَوْدَاجُهُ فَأَنَا رَأَيْتُهُ مَحْلُولَةً أَزْرَارُهُ وَقَالَ «أَوْ مِثْلُهُ أَوْ نَحْوُهُ أَوْ شَبِيهٌ بِهِ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: ʿUthmān b. ʿUmar \u003e Ibn ʿAwn \u003e Muslim Abū ʿAbdullāh \u003e Ibrāhīm al-Taymī from his father \u003e ʿAmr b. Maymūn
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا عُثْمَانُ بْنُ عُمَرَ أَنبَأَنَا ابْنُ عَوْنٍ عَنْ مُسْلِمٍ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ التَّيْمِيِّ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ مَيْمُونٍ قَالَ كُنْتُ لَا تَفُوتُنِي عَشِيَّةُ خَمِيسٍ إِلَّا وَآتِي فِيهَا عَبْدَ اللَّهِ بْنَ مَسْعُودٍ فَمَا سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ لِشَيْءٍ قَطُّ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 279

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا مَخَافَةَ السَّقَطِ
chapter.englishTitle: Who fears danger?

englishRaw: The translation of the given Arabic text is: "About the Messenger of Allah ﷺ , his face would show signs of concern during certain days, and he would say, 'Like this, or something similar to this, like this or something similar to this.'"   – Weak Chain
body: The translation of the given Arabic text is: "About the Messenger of Allah ﷺ , his face would show signs of concern during certain days, and he would say, 'Like this, or something similar to this, like this or something similar to this.'"   – Weak Chain
arabic: عَنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ فِي الْأَيَّامِ تَرَبَّدَ وَجْهُهُ وَقَالَ «هَكَذَا أَوْ نَحْوَهُ هَكَذَا أَوْ نَحْوَهُ»   – إسناده ضعيف
chain: Yazīd b. Hārūn \u003e Ashʿath \u003e al-Shaʿbī And Ibn Sīrīn
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا يَزِيدُ بْنُ هَارُونَ أَنبَأَنَا أَشْعَثُ عَنِ الشَّعْبِيِّ وَابْنِ سِيرِينَ أَنَّ ابْنَ مَسْعُودٍ كَانَ إِذَا حَدَّثَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 280

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا مَخَافَةَ السَّقَطِ
chapter.englishTitle: Who fears danger?

englishRaw: For the people, have you seen so-and-so who says, "The Messenger of Allah said, the Messenger of Allah said?" I sat with Ibn Umar for two or two and a half years, and I did not hear him narrate anything from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ except for this hadith.   – Sound Chain
body: For the people, have you seen so-and-so who says, "The Messenger of Allah said, the Messenger of Allah said?" I sat with Ibn Umar for two or two and a half years, and I did not hear him narrate anything from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ except for this hadith.   – Sound Chain
arabic: لِي الشَّعْبِيُّ أَرَأَيْتَ فُلَانًا الَّذِي يَقُولُ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ؟ قَعَدْتُ مَعَ ابْنِ عُمَرَ سَنَتَيْنِ أَوْ سَنَةً وَنِصْفًا فَمَا سَمِعْتُهُ يُحَدِّثُ عَنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ شَيْئًا إِلَّا هَذَا الْحَدِيثَ   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Sahl b. Ḥammād \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e Tawbah al-ʿAnbarī \u003e Lī al-Shaʿbī Araʾayt Fulān al--Adhī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا سَهْلُ بْنُ حَمَّادٍ حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ حَدَّثَنَا تَوْبَةُ الْعَنْبَرِيُّ قَالَ قَالَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 281

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا مَخَافَةَ السَّقَطِ
chapter.englishTitle: Who fears danger?

englishRaw: My nephew, leave him for he defended Messenger of Allah ﷺ.    – Sound Chain
body: My nephew, leave him for he defended Messenger of Allah ﷺ.    – Sound Chain
arabic: عَنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Asad b. Mūsá \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Abū al-Safar \u003e al-Shaʿbī \u003e Jālast Ibn ʿUmar Sanah Falam Asmaʿh \u003e Ḥadīth
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَسَدُ بْنُ مُوسَى حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ أَبِي السَّفَرِ عَنِ الشَّعْبِيِّ قَالَ «جَالَسْتُ ابْنَ عُمَرَ سَنَةً فَلَمْ أَسْمَعْهُ يَذْكُرُ حَدِيثًا

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 282

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا مَخَافَةَ السَّقَطِ
chapter.englishTitle: Who fears danger?

englishRaw: "He updates us monthly with two or three news stories."   – Good Chain
body: "He updates us monthly with two or three news stories."   – Good Chain
arabic: «يُحَدِّثُنَا فِي الشَّهْرِ بِالْحَدِيثَيْنِ أَوِ الثَّلَاثَةِ»   – إسناده حسن
chain: ʿĀṣim b. Yūsuf \u003e Abū Bakr \u003e Abū Ḥaṣīn \u003e al-Shaʿbī \u003e Thābit b. Quṭbah al-Anṣārī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عَاصِمُ بْنُ يُوسُفَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ عَنْ أَبِي حَصِينٍ عَنِ الشَّعْبِيِّ عَنْ ثَابِتِ بْنِ قُطْبَةَ الْأَنْصَارِيِّ قَالَ كَانَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 283

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا مَخَافَةَ السَّقَطِ
chapter.englishTitle: Who fears danger?

englishRaw: Did you hear from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ? He said, "And I am preparing for."   – Fair Chain
body: Did you hear from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ? He said, "And I am preparing for."   – Fair Chain
arabic: سَمِعْتَ مِنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ؟» فَقَالَ وَأَتَحَلَّلُ   – إسناده جيد
chain: ʿUthmān b. ʿUmar \u003e Yūnus \u003e ʿAbd al-Malik b. ʿUbayd \u003e Mar Binā Anas b. Mālik Faqulnā Ḥaddithnā Bibaʿḍ Mā

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 284

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا مَخَافَةَ السَّقَطِ
chapter.englishTitle: Who fears danger?

englishRaw: "From the Messenger of Allah ﷺ , and whenever he mentioned the Messenger of Allah ﷺ , he would say: "Or as the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said.""   – Sound Chain
body: "From the Messenger of Allah ﷺ , and whenever he mentioned the Messenger of Allah ﷺ , he would say: "Or as the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said.""   – Sound Chain
arabic: عَنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ وَكَانَ إِذَا حَدَّثَ عَنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ قَالَ أَوْ كَمَا قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Sulaymān b. Ḥarb \u003e Ḥammād b. Zayd \u003e Ibn ʿAwn \u003e Muḥammad
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ حَرْبٍ قَالَ ثَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ زَيْدٍ عَنِ ابْنِ عَوْنٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدٍ قَالَ كَانَ أَنَسٌ قَلِيلَ الْحَدِيثِ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 285

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا مَخَافَةَ السَّقَطِ
chapter.englishTitle: Who fears danger?

englishRaw: "Whenever Anas bin Malik finished narrating a Hadith from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, he would say, 'Or as the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said.'"     – Sound Chain
body: "Whenever Anas bin Malik finished narrating a Hadith from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, he would say, 'Or as the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said.'"     – Sound Chain
arabic: عَنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ حَدِيثًا قَالَ أَوْ كَمَا قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ   – إسناده صحيح
chain: ʿUthmān b. Muḥammad \u003e Ismāʿīl \u003e Ayyūb \u003e Muḥammad
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا عُثْمَانُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ حَدَّثَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ عَنْ أَيُّوبَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدٍ قَالَ كَانَ أَنَسٌ إِذَا حَدَّثَ

title: Sunan ad-Darimi 286

chapter.arabicTitle: بَابُ مَنْ هَابَ الْفُتْيَا مَخَافَةَ السَّقَطِ
chapter.englishTitle: Who fears danger?

englishRaw: "I went out with Saad to Makkah, but I did not hear him narrating any hadith from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ until we returned to Madinah."   – Sound Chain
body: "I went out with Saad to Makkah, but I did not hear him narrating any hadith from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ until we returned to Madinah."   – Sound Chain
arabic: «خَرَجْتُ مَعَ سَعْدٍ إِلَى مَكَّةَ فَمَا سَمِعْتُهُ يُحَدِّثُ حَدِيثًا عَنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ حَتَّى رَجَعْنَا إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ»   – إسناده صحيح
chain: Sulaymān b. Ḥarb \u003e Ḥammād b. Zayd \u003e Yaḥyá b. Saʿīd \u003e al-Sāʾib b. Yazīd
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ حَرْبٍ حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ زَيْدٍ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي السَّائِبُ بْنُ يَزِيدَ قَالَ
